jobs.name: Cargo Insurance Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Checks open cargo loss/damage insurance claims for ones that have gone quiet and need a follow-up push. Use this if a damaged-freight claim has ever sat untouched with the insurer for months because nobody was tracking it against the filing deadline or a status update.

jobs.name: Carrier Appointment Renewal Tracker (Per State)
jobs.description: Checks each carrier appointment your agency holds — the carrier's authorization for the agency to sell and service its products in a given state — against its renewal or termination date and flags any expiring soon. Use this if the agency has ever kept quoting a carrier's product in a state after that carrier-agency appointment quietly lapsed, putting every bound policy at risk of being unwound.

jobs.name: Carrier Certificate of Insurance Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each carrier's certificate of insurance on file against its expiry date and warns before it lapses. Use this if a load has ever moved on a carrier whose cargo or auto liability coverage had already quietly expired, leaving you uninsured if something went wrong.

jobs.name: Carrier Load Tender Acceptance Check
jobs.description: Checks recently tendered loads for carriers that haven't accepted or rejected within the expected window. Use this if a tendered load has ever sat unconfirmed until the ship date was already at risk.

jobs.name: Carrier On-Time Delivery Performance Scorecard
jobs.description: Tracks each carrier's on-time delivery rate over recent shipments and flags any carrier that's dropped below your target. Use this if a carrier's reliability has ever quietly slipped for months before a customer complaint made it obvious.

jobs.name: Carrier Rate Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks tracked carrier rate agreements against their expiry date and warns before they lapse. Use this if a freight contract has ever quietly expired and shipments kept moving on it anyway, until a rate dispute surfaced with no valid agreement backing it.

jobs.name: Carrier Tender Rejection Rate Watch
jobs.description: Aggregates how often each carrier has rejected load tenders over a recent period and flags carriers rejecting more than your threshold. Use this if a "reliable" core carrier has ever quietly started rejecting a growing share of your loads, forcing you onto the spot market at a worse rate, before a scorecard caught the trend.

jobs.name: Cart Abandonment Follow-up
jobs.description: Finds abandoned shopping carts old enough to follow up on, and can draft the follow-up email for you. Use this if abandoned-cart recovery is something you know you should do but never get to.

jobs.name: Cart Tax Calculation Error Check
jobs.description: Recomputes expected sales tax for recent orders from the subtotal and rate that should have applied, and flags any order where what was actually charged doesn't match. Use this if a stale tax rate table or a rounding bug has ever quietly over- or under-charged customers for weeks before anyone reconciled it.

jobs.name: Cash Drawer Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares each front-office cash drawer's recorded closing count against the expected total from logged cash transactions for the day, and flags any shift with a discrepancy over a set threshold. Use this if your facility takes cash payments at the counter and wants a routine check for shortages or overages instead of finding out weeks later during an audit.

jobs.name: Cash Flow Forecast Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual cash inflows and outflows for the period against what the cash-flow forecast projected, and flags the categories where the gap is bigger than expected. Use this if your cash forecast has ever quietly drifted from reality for weeks before anyone checked, leaving no early warning of a coming cash crunch or windfall.

jobs.name: Cash Office Deposit Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares the bank deposit slip amount against the store's total reported cash sales for the day and flags a mismatch. Use this if a bank deposit has ever come up short of what the registers reported for days before anyone in accounting reconciled it back to a specific store.

jobs.name: Cashier Drawer Overage/Shortage Pattern Check
jobs.description: Looks at each cashier's till over/short amounts across their last several shifts to spot a recurring pattern of consistently coming up short or consistently over, rather than one-off counting mistakes. Use this if you want to catch a slow drip of cash loss or a training gap tied to one specific employee, instead of only reviewing a single day's totals.

jobs.name: Catastrophe Event Exposure Monitor
jobs.description: Cross-references active policies against a catastrophe (hurricane, wildfire, earthquake, flood) event footprint and estimates policy-count and total insured value exposure inside the impact zone. Use this if a CAT event has ever hit before anyone had a fast answer to "how many policies do we have in that area, and what's our exposure."

jobs.name: Catering Deposit Collection Tracker
jobs.description: Flags catering orders that are approaching their event date without a deposit on file yet. Use this if you've ever found out the week of an event that a catering order was never actually secured with a deposit.

jobs.name: Catering Dietary Restriction Accommodation Tracker
jobs.description: Compares attendee-submitted dietary restrictions and allergies against what the caterer has confirmed they can accommodate, and flags any request the caterer hasn't signed off on. Use this if an attendee with a severe allergy has ever been handed a plate nobody actually checked against the kitchen.

jobs.name: Catering Headcount Finalization Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the caterer's final-guaranteed-headcount deadline passes, since most caterers lock in (and bill for) that number and won't take changes after. Use this if you've ever paid for meals nobody ate, or run short, because the final count deadline slipped by unnoticed.

jobs.name: CDL License Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each driver's commercial driver's license and required endorsements against their expiry dates and flags anyone lapsing soon. Use this if a driver has ever shown up for a long-distance dispatch only for someone to realize their CDL or medical card had already expired.

jobs.name: CDN Bandwidth Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Compares today's CDN bandwidth usage against a trailing average and flags an unusual spike, which can mean a hotlinking/scraping problem or a surprise bill. Use this if CDN bandwidth has ever spiked hard enough to blow through a billing tier before anyone noticed — distinct from cdn-cache-purge-reminder.yaml, which is about cache freshness, not traffic volume anomalies.

jobs.name: CDN Cache Purge Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to purge the CDN cache after a deploy, based on a marker file your deploy script leaves behind. Use this if you've ever shipped a fix and then spent an hour confused why users still saw the old version.

jobs.name: Professional CE Credit Hour Tally Check
jobs.description: Adds up logged continuing-education credit hours against what's required by your licensing period deadline and warns if you're pacing behind. Use this if your professional license requires a set number of CE hours per renewal cycle and you've ever scrambled to cram them in during the last month.

jobs.name: Continuing Education Credit Hours Tracker
jobs.description: Checks each licensed staff member's logged continuing-education hours against their board's renewal-cycle requirement and flags anyone falling behind pace. Use this if a therapist has ever scrambled for CE hours in the final week before a license renewal deadline because nobody was tracking progress throughout the cycle.

jobs.name: Cell Site Battery Backup Runtime Test Check
jobs.description: Checks each cell site's most recent battery backup runtime test against the required test cadence and minimum runtime spec, flagging sites that are overdue for a test or that failed to meet the runtime target. Use this if a cell site has ever gone dark during a power outage sooner than expected because its backup batteries hadn't been load-tested in a long time.

jobs.name: Professional Certification Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a professional certification expires or its renewal window opens. Use this if you've ever let a cert lapse and had to retake an exam that a renewal course would've avoided.

jobs.name: Certificate of Insurance Request Check
jobs.description: Checks for incoming certificate-of-insurance (COI) requests from vendors, clients, or landlords that haven't been fulfilled yet. Use this if a COI request has ever sat unanswered long enough to hold up a contract or a lease signing.

jobs.name: Certificate Transparency Watch
jobs.description: Checks public Certificate Transparency logs for new TLS certs issued for your domain and flags any you didn't expect. Use this if you want an early warning for someone issuing a cert for your domain without your knowledge (a common precursor to phishing/MITM setups).

jobs.name: Certification Exam Retake Eligibility Check
jobs.description: Tracks the mandatory waiting period after a failed certification exam attempt and tells you the earliest date you're eligible to retake it. Use this if you've failed a cert exam before and lost track of exactly when the vendor's cooldown period actually ends.

jobs.name: Booth/Chair Rental Payment Tracker
jobs.description: Flags independent contractors renting a booth or chair whose weekly or monthly rent payment hasn't been logged as received by the due date. Use this if a chair renter has ever fallen a month behind on booth rent before anyone at the front desk noticed.

jobs.name: Champion Departure Watch
jobs.description: Checks whether your champion or economic-buyer contact at open or recently-closed accounts has left the company, using bounce signals or a job-change lookup, and drafts a plan to find the new point of contact. Use this if a deal has ever gone quiet for weeks before you found out your one internal advocate had already left the company.

jobs.name: Change Order Approval Reminder
jobs.description: Flags change orders that have been waiting on client sign-off too long. Use this if work has ever stalled, or gone ahead unapproved, because a change order sat in someone's inbox for weeks.

jobs.name: Changelog Digest
jobs.description: Rolls up recent commits into a draft changelog entry your users could actually read. Use this if you ship regularly but always write the changelog as an afterthought (or skip it).

jobs.name: Changeover Time Tracker
jobs.description: Compares logged changeover/setup durations against a target and flags the ones that ran long. Use this if a slow product changeover has ever eaten into a shift's output without anyone tracing the lost hours back to the setup itself.

jobs.name: Podcast Chapter Marker Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks that a newly published episode's audio file has chapter markers embedded before flagging it as missing. Use this if you've ever promised tappable chapters in the show notes but forgot the embedding step and shipped a flat, unchaptered file.

jobs.name: Chargeback Dispute Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open credit-card chargeback disputes against their bank- or processor-set response deadline and flags the ones coming due soon. Use this if you've ever missed a chargeback response window and lost a dispute you could have won simply because nobody was tracking the clock.

jobs.name: Chargeback Fraud Risk Order Review
jobs.description: Scores new orders against common fraud signals — billing/shipping country mismatch, high order value from a first-time customer, and rush shipping on an unverified address — and flags the risky ones before they ship. Use this if a chargeback has ever landed on an order that, in hindsight, had obvious red flags nobody checked before fulfillment.

jobs.name: Charitable Solicitation Registration Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks your state-by-state charitable solicitation registrations against each one's renewal deadline and flags any about to lapse. Use this if your organization has ever fundraised in a state where its registration had quietly expired, risking fines or a forced pause on soliciting donors there, because each state runs on its own renewal calendar and nobody was tracking all of them in one place.

jobs.name: Chart Note Completion Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags patient appointments whose clinical chart note hasn't been signed or completed within a configurable window after the visit. Use this if an unsigned chart note has ever sat open for days, leaving the record incomplete for insurance, referrals, or a future visit until someone happened to notice.

jobs.name: Live Chat Abandonment Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks what percentage of live chat sessions get abandoned by the customer before an agent ever replies. Use this if a customer has ever given up and left a chat queue silently, which never shows up in response-time metrics because a chat that got no reply also never got a response time recorded against it.

jobs.name: Chat Channel Sprawl Audit
jobs.description: Scans a chat/Slack channel activity export and flags channels whose message volume has dropped below a threshold, so quiet channels get noticed for archiving instead of piling up forever. Use this if your workspace has ever grown to hundreds of channels and nobody could tell which ones were actually still in use versus abandoned relics from a project that ended a year ago.

jobs.name: Cheat/Exploit Report Triage
jobs.description: Reviews the backlog of player-submitted cheat and exploit reports and groups them by likely severity so your trust & safety team knows what to look at first. Use this if a cheating wave has ever gone unchecked for days because reports piled up in a queue nobody triaged.

jobs.name: Check Kiting Pattern Flag
jobs.description: Scans a deposit/withdrawal log for the classic check-kiting signature — rapid deposit-then-withdrawal cycling of similar amounts between two or more accounts — and hands the raw matches plus account context to an agent to judge which ones look like genuine kiting versus normal cash flow. Use this if float abuse between linked accounts has ever gone unnoticed until a check bounced; it's narrower than general fraud-monitoring since it targets this one specific deposit/withdrawal cadence, not fraud broadly.

jobs.name: Checkout Conversion Drop Watch
jobs.description: Compares today's checkout completion rate against your recent baseline and flags a real drop. Use this if a checkout bug has ever silently cut conversion for a day or two before anyone noticed sales looked soft.

jobs.name: Checkout Step Drop-Off Check
jobs.description: Walks a step-by-step self-serve checkout/upgrade funnel and flags whichever single step has the worst drop-off rate, rather than just an overall conversion number. Use this if "checkout conversion is down" is a known fact but nobody's pinned down whether people are bailing at the plan picker, the payment form, or the confirmation step.

jobs.name: Childcare Room Staffing Ratio Check
jobs.description: Compares scheduled childcare-room staff against the number of children checked in per shift and flags any shift where the ratio exceeds the legal or policy maximum. Use this if the kids' room has ever run over its staff-to-child ratio during a busy weekend morning because check-ins weren't compared against staffing until after the fact.

jobs.name: Chimney Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to get your chimney and flue inspected/swept based on how long it's been since the last inspection. Use this if you burn wood regularly and don't want creosote buildup to turn into a chimney fire.

jobs.name: Chronic Absenteeism Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates each student's missed-day percentage for the term and flags anyone crossing the chronic-absenteeism threshold. Use this if a student has ever quietly racked up enough missed days to count as chronically absent before anyone outside the attendance office noticed.

jobs.name: Churn Risk Watch
jobs.description: Flags accounts whose usage has dropped off sharply, before they actually cancel. Use this if you only ever find out someone churned after the cancellation email arrives.

jobs.name: CI Build Time Regression Watch
jobs.description: Compares recent CI build durations to a baseline and flags a real slowdown. Use this if build times have ever crept up gradually until a 30-second CI run became a 15-minute one.

jobs.name: Circuit Outage Detection
jobs.description: Pings each monitored circuit endpoint and flags any that are down. Use this if a customer circuit has ever gone dark and nobody on your team noticed until the customer called in.

jobs.name: Circuit Provisioning Order Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags circuit orders that were placed but never activated within a target number of days. Use this if a provisioning order has ever sat in limbo for weeks because the install date fell through the cracks between sales, the carrier, and the field tech.

jobs.name: Insurance Claim Missing Attachment Check
jobs.description: Cross-references submitted insurance claims against a CDT-code-to-required- attachment map (x-rays, narratives, perio charting) and flags any claim that's missing the documentation its procedure code typically needs. Use this if a claim has ever come back denied purely for a missing x-ray or narrative that could have been attached before submission — this catches it pre-emptively, before the payer ever sees it.

jobs.name: Open Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Checks the status of any open insurance claims and flags ones that haven't moved in a while. Use this if a claim has ever gone quiet for weeks because nobody was following up with the adjuster.

jobs.name: Claim Write-Off Approval Check
jobs.description: Checks logged insurance-claim write-offs above a configurable amount and flags any without a recorded approver. Use this if a large denied-claim write-off has ever gone through on one person's say-so with no second signoff — distinct from claims-denial-resubmission-check.yaml, which tracks whether a denied claim was appealed in time, not whether the eventual decision to write it off (instead of resubmitting) was properly approved.

jobs.name: Claims Aging & Backlog Tracker
jobs.description: Buckets open claims by how long they've been open (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days) and flags any bucket that's grown past target so a claims manager can rebalance the queue. Use this if a backlog of aging claims has ever crept up gradually until a regulator or auditor asked why so many were still open past 90 days.

jobs.name: Claims Denial Resubmission Check
jobs.description: Checks denied insurance claims against their payer resubmission or appeal deadline and flags anything still open as the deadline approaches or has already passed. Use this if a denied claim has ever quietly aged past the window to resubmit or appeal it, turning recoverable revenue into a write-off nobody meant to take.

jobs.name: Claims Insurance Valuation Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks filed damaged-goods claims against the coverage level the customer actually declared on file (released value vs. full-value protection) and flags any claim whose requested payout doesn't match what their coverage supports. Use this if a payout dispute has ever blown up after the fact because a claim was processed against the wrong valuation tier nobody double-checked first.

jobs.name: Claims-Made Insurance Notification Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Flags incidents or potential claims that still need to be reported to a claims-made insurance policy within its reporting window, since missing that window can void coverage entirely regardless of when the underlying incident happened. Use this if a claim has ever been denied, or nearly was, because it was reported to the insurer after the claims-made policy's notification deadline passed.

jobs.name: Claims Reserve Adequacy Review
jobs.description: Reviews open claims where the current reserve looks out of step with claim severity indicators (medical treatment still ongoing, litigation filed, total loss, etc.) and flags candidates for a reserve adjustment. Use this if a reserve has ever sat unchanged for months while the actual claim facts moved on, throwing off loss-ratio and reinsurance numbers until an audit caught the gap.

jobs.name: Class Attendance Trend Report
jobs.description: Pulls week-over-week attendance per class and drafts a short summary of which classes are trending up, flat, or declining. Use this if you've ever made a gut-feel call to cut or promote a class without actually looking at whether attendance was trending down for a month or just had one off week.

jobs.name: Class Cancellation Advance-Notice Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks logged class cancellations against the time they were actually announced and flags any cancellation that went out with less than the required advance notice to enrolled members. Use this if a class has ever been cancelled same-day with members finding out only when they showed up at the studio door.

jobs.name: Class Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming class signups against capacity and flags classes running well under-booked. Use this if a class has ever quietly run half-empty for months before anyone pulled the numbers and considered cutting or rescheduling it.

jobs.name: Class Waitlist Overflow Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming classes for waitlists that have grown past a threshold, a sign there's enough demand to justify adding another session. Use this if a popular class has ever kept a long waitlist for months without anyone noticing there was room to add a second time slot.

jobs.name: Classroom Lesson Plan Submission Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks whether each classroom's weekly curriculum/lesson plan has been submitted for the current week and flags any classroom still missing one. Use this if a classroom has ever gone into a new week without a posted lesson plan because it fell through the cracks during a busy Friday — something licensing inspectors and accreditation reviewers routinely check for.

jobs.name: Classroom Sanitation Log Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks each classroom's daily toy, table, and surface cleaning log against the required number of logged cleanings and flags any classroom that's short today. Use this if a classroom has ever gone a full day without toys or high-touch surfaces actually getting sanitized because a busy shift meant the log — and the task — got skipped.

jobs.name: Classroom Supply Low Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks consumable classroom supplies like diapers, wipes, and formula against a reorder threshold per item and flags anything running low. Use this if a classroom has ever run out of diapers or wipes mid-day because nobody noticed the shelf was nearly empty.

jobs.name: Cleaning Checklist Audit Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews the supervisor's quality-audit spot-check log and flags any scheduled job that went without a spot-check for too long, plus any crew whose recent spot-checks are failing the checklist more often than they should. Use this if quality control has ever slipped because spot-checks were only happening for the crews that already had a problem, not on a regular rotation.

jobs.name: Client Churn Risk Check
jobs.description: Scans recurring clients' cleaning history for a dropped frequency (their gap since the last completed clean has grown well past their expected interval) or repeated recent cancellations, and flags them as an early churn-risk signal. Use this if a recurring client has ever quietly stopped booking and nobody noticed until they'd already switched to a competitor.

jobs.name: Cleaning Crew Checklist Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks whether the daily or nightly cleaning checklist (restrooms, kitchen, common areas, trash) was actually marked complete for each shift, so a skipped cleaning round doesn't go unnoticed until a member complains. Use this if you contract out cleaning and want proof the checklist is actually being done, not just billed.

jobs.name: Unpaid Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks invoices issued to cleaning clients against your standard aging buckets (30/60/90 days) and flags any that are still unpaid past the threshold you set. Use this if recurring or one-off cleaning jobs have ever gone unpaid for weeks because nobody was tracking which invoices had quietly slipped past due.

jobs.name: Client Allergy & Contraindication Flag Audit
jobs.description: Cross-checks tomorrow's booked treatments against each client's recorded allergies and medical contraindications, flagging any mismatch before the appointment happens. Use this if a client has ever reacted to a product or a treatment has ever gone ahead despite a documented contraindication because the front desk didn't see the note.

jobs.name: Client Anniversary Rebooking Outreach Drafts
jobs.description: Flags past clients whose shoot anniversary (wedding anniversary, newborn's first birthday, annual family session) is coming up and drafts a personal rebooking outreach message. Use this if repeat clients have ever slipped through the cracks because nobody reached out again after their original session, even though they'd have happily rebooked for the next milestone.

jobs.name: Client Appointment Reminder Drafts
jobs.description: Reads tomorrow's scheduled cleanings and drafts a short reminder message for each client confirming the date, time window, and crew name, so someone just has to review and send. Use this if a client has ever forgotten they had a cleaning booked, leaving the crew locked out or the home/office not ready.

jobs.name: Client Birthday Reward Reminder
jobs.description: Finds clients with a birthday coming up in the next window and drafts a personal birthday message with their reward or discount. Use this if a client has ever mentioned "you sent a birthday text last year, my old salon never did that" — this keeps that habit from depending on someone remembering to do it.

jobs.name: Client Churn-Risk Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent missed or skipped visits and open complaints per client and flags accounts crossing your churn-risk thresholds, then drafts a short outreach note for each one. Use this if a long-time client has ever cancelled without warning, and you later realized they'd had two missed visits and an unresolved complaint in the month before they left.

jobs.name: Client Staffing Contract Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Flags client service agreements approaching their renewal or expiry date so account managers can start the renewal conversation early. Use this if a client contract has ever lapsed silently and put an active placement's billing in a gray area.

jobs.name: Client Credit-Limit Exposure Check
jobs.description: Compares each client's outstanding accounts-receivable balance against their approved credit limit and flags anyone over or close to the limit before more workers get placed with them. Use this if the agency has ever kept staffing a client whose unpaid balance had already blown past their credit limit.

jobs.name: Client Emergency Contact Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags clients whose emergency contact and authorized-decision-maker information hasn't been confirmed in a while. Use this if you've ever needed to reach someone about a boarded or daycare pet and found the phone number on file was disconnected or years out of date.

jobs.name: Client Gallery Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Flags client online photo galleries approaching their auto-expiry or take-down date so a reminder can go out in time to download images or order prints. Use this if a client has ever emailed asking for their photos after the gallery link already stopped working.

jobs.name: Client Invoice Payment-Terms Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks outstanding client invoices against their agreed payment terms and flags anything past due, since a staffing agency has to pay workers every week regardless of when clients pay. Use this if slow-paying clients have ever squeezed cash flow before anyone noticed how far past terms an invoice had gone.

jobs.name: Client No-Show Fee Collection Check
jobs.description: Finds no-show and late-cancellation fees that were charged in the booking system but never actually collected, and drafts a polite follow-up for the ones sitting longest. Use this if a no-show fee has ever been logged as "charged" and then quietly never made it onto the client's card because the charge failed silently.

jobs.name: Client Onboarding Checklist Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks recently signed clients against the standard onboarding checklist (kickoff call scheduled, contracts countersigned, brand assets received, billing contact confirmed, platform/account access granted) and flags anyone still missing a step past the target window. Use this if a new client has ever reached their first deliverable deadline before the team realized nobody ever got ad-account access or a signed brand style guide.

jobs.name: Client Payment Plan Delinquency Check
jobs.description: Checks active client payment plans (e.g. for a large surgery or emergency bill) against their installment schedule and flags anyone who's missed a payment. Use this if a payment plan has ever quietly gone delinquent for months because nobody was cross-checking installment due dates against what actually came in.

jobs.name: Client Purchase Order Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks client purchase orders against their expiration or not-to-exceed dates and flags ones expiring soon. Use this if timesheets have ever kept billing against a PO that quietly lapsed, leaving an invoice with no valid authorization behind it.

jobs.name: Client Quote Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews cleaning quotes sent to prospects and drafts a friendly follow-up message for anyone who hasn't accepted, declined, or replied within a set number of days. Use this if a quote has ever gone out to a prospect and then quietly disappeared because nobody remembered to check back in.

jobs.name: Client Rebooking Gap Check
jobs.description: Flags clients whose last visit was more than a set number of days ago with no future appointment on the books. Use this if a regular client has ever quietly stopped coming back and nobody noticed until a competitor mentioned seeing them there.

jobs.name: Client Revenue Concentration Check
jobs.description: Calculates what percentage of the agency's trailing revenue comes from each client and flags any single client that has grown past a concentration threshold of total billings. Use this if the agency has ever realized, only after losing a big account, that it made up close to a third of total revenue and nobody had been tracking that risk as it grew quarter over quarter.

jobs.name: Client Satisfaction Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews post-clean satisfaction survey or star-rating data, flags any score below your quality bar, and drafts a personal follow-up message for each unhappy client. Use this if a low rating has ever slipped by unnoticed until the client already canceled instead of getting a chance to have the issue fixed.

jobs.name: Client Satisfaction Survey Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent client satisfaction/NPS survey responses and drafts follow-up outreach for any client who scored low or flagged an issue with a placement. Use this if a low client satisfaction score has ever sat in a spreadsheet for weeks without anyone reaching out to find out what went wrong.

jobs.name: Client Status Report Delivery Check
jobs.description: Checks each active account's contracted status-report cadence (weekly, biweekly, or monthly) against when the last report was actually sent, and flags any account that's overdue. Use this if a client has ever asked "where's our monthly report?" before anyone on the account team realized it hadn't gone out, because sending it lived in someone's memory instead of a tracked schedule.

jobs.name: Client Submittal Feedback Response-Time Check
jobs.description: Tracks how long clients are taking to give feedback (interview, reject, or hold) on submitted candidates and flags submittals sitting silent past a threshold, since a slow client response is one of the top reasons good candidates take another offer. Use this if a strong candidate has ever accepted a competing offer while waiting on client feedback that never came.

jobs.name: Warehouse Climate Control Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks temperature/humidity logs for climate-controlled storage areas and flags any reading outside the safe range. Use this if product has ever been damaged or spoiled because a climate-controlled zone drifted out of range and nobody noticed until the next physical walk-through.

jobs.name: Climate-Controlled Unit Temperature Alert
jobs.description: Checks the latest temperature and humidity sensor readings from climate-controlled units against the facility's target range and flags any unit that's drifted outside it. Use this if you offer climate control as a paid feature and want to catch an HVAC or sensor problem before it damages a tenant's stored goods, not after they complain.

jobs.name: Clinical Supply and PPE Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Scans clinical supply and PPE inventory (gloves, masks, gowns, syringes, exam table paper, sanitizer) against reorder thresholds and flags what's running low. Use this if a clinic has ever discovered it was out of gloves or exam paper mid-morning because nobody was watching stock levels between deliveries.

jobs.name: Clip Repurposing Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks your tracker of short-form clip candidates and flags any that have sat unpublished past a grace period. Use this if a great clip has ever been identified from a long-form video and then just never actually got cut and posted because it fell off the bottom of the list.

jobs.name: Closed-Lost Reason Audit
jobs.description: Finds recently closed-lost deals with no loss reason recorded, and summarizes the reasons that were captured into a short pattern report. Use this if closed-lost deals have ever piled up with a blank reason field, making it impossible to tell whether you're losing to a competitor, on price, or on missing features.

jobs.name: AWS IAM Wildcard Policy Check
jobs.description: Scans your customer-managed AWS IAM policies for statements that grant Action:* on Resource:* and flags them. Use this if a policy has ever been written as a quick "just make it work" wildcard during a deploy and never got tightened up afterward.

jobs.name: Co-Marketing Partner MDF Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks each co-marketing or channel partner's market development fund (MDF) usage against their allocated budget and claim deadline, and flags partners at risk of losing unused funds. Use this if a partner has ever forfeited MDF money because nobody noticed the claim window was closing on a mostly-unused allocation.

jobs.name: Co-op Membership & Patronage Dues Tracker
jobs.description: Checks your agricultural cooperative membership dues and expected patronage dividend/equity payments against what's actually been received or paid, and flags mismatches. Use this if you've ever missed a dues deadline or not noticed a patronage payment was short or never arrived.

jobs.name: COBRA Notification Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Flags terminated employees who are approaching or past the deadline for their COBRA election notice with no notice sent on record. Use this if a COBRA notice has ever gone out late — or not at all — because offboarding paperwork got deprioritized once the employee's last day had already passed.

jobs.name: Code Enforcement Violation Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open property code violation notices against their compliance or reinspection deadline and flags the ones that are due, overdue, or never got a follow-up inspection scheduled. Use this if a violation notice has ever quietly expired with no reinspection or escalation because it fell off an inspector's list once the notice was mailed.

jobs.name: Coffee Machine Maintenance Schedule Check
jobs.description: Looks at brew-cycle counts and days since last service for each coffee machine and flags any that are overdue for descaling or a technician visit before it breaks down mid-morning rush. Use this if a coffee machine going down has ever meant a flood of member complaints on the same day.

jobs.name: Coffee & Snack Inventory Reorder Check
jobs.description: Checks pantry and kitchen consumables — coffee, snacks, cups, and other member-facing supplies — against a reorder threshold, so the community team finds out before the coffee runs out rather than from an annoyed member. Use this if you want a standing reminder of what to reorder before shelves go empty.

jobs.name: Cohort Retention Curve Monitor
jobs.description: Compares a new signup cohort's early retention (e.g. week-1, week-4) against your historical baseline and flags when a cohort is retaining worse than usual. Use this if a bad cohort has ever only been noticed months later when overall retention numbers had already softened.

jobs.name: Podcast Co-Host Recording Availability Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks the next scheduled recording slot against each co-host's calendar and flags a conflict. Use this if a recording has ever gotten cancelled at the last minute because nobody checked everyone's calendar first.

jobs.name: Podcast Co-Host Talk Time Balance Check
jobs.description: Computes each speaker's share of words in a diarized episode transcript and flags a lopsided split. Use this if a co-host or guest has ever listened back to an episode and realized they barely got a word in, and nobody noticed until the episode was already out.

jobs.name: Cold-Chain Produce Shipment Temperature Check
jobs.description: Checks logged reefer/cold-chain temperature readings for outbound produce shipments against the safe range and flags any excursion. Use this if you've ever had a buyer reject a load — or worse, not noticed a temperature excursion until the produce arrived spoiled.

jobs.name: Cold Wallet Firmware Update Check
jobs.description: Checks the manufacturer's published firmware version for a hardware wallet model against your last-known version and flags when an update is available. Use this if you've ever kept a hardware wallet plugged in only rarely and had no idea whether its firmware was months out of date and missing a security fix.

jobs.name: Collab Outreach Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks your collab/outreach tracker for creators or brands you messaged who never replied, and flags who's due a follow-up. Use this if a collab pitch has ever gone quiet and just got forgotten instead of getting one more nudge.

jobs.name: Colo/Data Center Power Redundancy Test Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks each colocation or data center site's log of dual-feed transfer switch and generator load-bank tests against the required test cadence and flags any site that's overdue. Use this if a site's backup power has ever gone untested for so long that the first real test happened during an actual utility outage.

jobs.name: Comment Spam Moderation Backlog Check
jobs.description: Reviews the pending comment moderation queue and flags how big the backlog has gotten and how much of it looks like spam versus real reader comments waiting on approval. Use this if genuine reader comments have ever sat unapproved for weeks buried under spam.

jobs.name: Comment Toxicity Moderation Check
jobs.description: Scans recent comments on your posts/videos for harassment, hate speech, or spam and flags what needs hiding, deleting, or reporting. Use this if you've ever found a pile-on or a spam wave in your comments days after it started because nobody was watching closely enough.

jobs.name: Commercial Bid Win-Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews commercial contract bids and proposals over a rolling window and calculates win rate, average bid value, and how win rate is trending, so the business knows whether its commercial pricing or positioning needs to change. Use this if commercial bids have ever been submitted and forgotten about, with nobody stepping back to ask why so many of them aren't converting.

jobs.name: Commercial Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks commercial cleaning contracts against their renewal or expiry date and flags any coming up within your notice window. Use this if a janitorial or office-cleaning contract has ever auto-lapsed or gotten scooped up by a competitor bid simply because nobody reached out to the account before it expired.

jobs.name: Commercial Contract Scope Creep Detector
jobs.description: Compares logged visit hours against each client's contracted hours per visit and flags visits that ran significantly over, then has an agent review the flagged visits to recommend a change order or contract re-pricing. Use this if crews have ever quietly absorbed extra work on a commercial account until the contract's margin disappeared.

jobs.name: Commercial Loan Collateral Insurance Certificate Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags commercial loan collateral — property, equipment, or other pledged assets — whose required insurance certificate is approaching or past its expiration date. Use this if a lender has ever discovered collateral went uninsured for a stretch because the certificate lapsed unnoticed — distinct from agent-broker-license-expiry-tracker (insurance category), which tracks producer licensing, not collateral coverage on a loan.

jobs.name: Commercial Walkthrough Inspection Scheduler
jobs.description: Checks each commercial client's contracted walkthrough or inspection cadence against when the last walkthrough actually happened and drafts scheduling outreach for anyone overdue. Use this if a commercial contract has ever required a monthly or quarterly site walkthrough with the facilities manager and it quietly stopped happening after the account got busy.

jobs.name: Commission Payout Tracker
jobs.description: Finds closed-won deals whose sales commission hasn't been marked as paid even though the payout grace period has passed, and totals what's owed per rep. Use this if a rep has ever had to chase finance to find out why a commission from weeks ago never showed up in their paycheck.

jobs.name: Agency Commission Statement Reconciliation Tracker
jobs.description: Compares commission amounts owed on your agency's own book against what each carrier's commission statement actually paid and flags policies paid short, missed entirely, or not yet reconciled. Use this if a carrier has ever quietly underpaid or dropped a policy off a commission statement and nobody caught it until year-end.

jobs.name: Common-Area Amenity Booking Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans upcoming reservations for shared amenities like the pool, clubhouse, or gym and flags any overlapping bookings for the same space and time slot. Use this if two residents have ever shown up for the same clubhouse slot because the booking log let a double-booking through.

jobs.name: Community Event RSVP Followup Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming community events — workshops, socials, networking nights — for RSVP counts that are running well below the turnout you were hoping for, so low-interest events get flagged while there's still time to promote them. Use this if you want a heads-up a few days out on which events need an extra push instead of finding out at the door that nobody signed up.

jobs.name: Community Forum Engagement Drop-Off Check
jobs.description: Compares recent posting and reaction activity in your member Slack, forum, or community app against each member's own historical baseline to spot members who've gone quiet, since a sudden drop in community engagement is often an early churn signal. Use this if members have ever cancelled without warning when a fading presence in the community channel would have been the tell.

jobs.name: Community Manager Checklist Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks whether the daily opening or closing checklist — unlocking doors, restocking supplies, checking AV equipment, closing up at night — was actually completed and logged by staff, and flags any day it wasn't. Use this if you want to catch a missed opening or closing routine before a member shows up to a locked door or a broken projector nobody reset.

jobs.name: Commute Buffer Before First Meeting Check
jobs.description: Checks whether tomorrow's first in-person or off-site calendar event leaves enough travel buffer given an estimated commute time, and flags it if you'd need to leave earlier than planned. Use this if you've ever been late to a first meeting because the calendar didn't account for how long it actually takes to get there.

jobs.name: Comp/Void Transaction Anomaly Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews comped and voided POS transactions for the period and flags patterns worth a second look — an employee with an outsized comp rate, comps clustered right before closeout, or repeated same-item voids. Use this if comps and voids have ever quietly become a hole in the till that nobody added up until year-end.

jobs.name: Competition/Event Registration Deadline Check
jobs.description: Tracks upcoming registration deadlines for competitions, races, or in-house events (powerlifting meets, charity 5Ks, member challenges) and warns before the window closes. Use this if a members' event has ever missed its registration cutoff because the deadline lived on one person's calendar instead of somewhere the whole team could see it.

jobs.name: Competitive Loss Pattern Tracker
jobs.description: Aggregates deals lost to a named competitor over a rolling window and summarizes which competitors are winning, on what deal size, and in which segment. Use this if leadership has ever asked "who are we losing to and why" and the honest answer was "nobody's counted."

jobs.name: Competitor Ad Creative Watch
jobs.description: Scans a competitor's public ad library (Meta Ad Library, Google Ads Transparency Center, or similar) for new or changed ad creative and summarizes what's new. Use this if a competitor has ever launched a new campaign, offer, or positioning angle and you found out from a customer instead of watching their ad library yourself.

jobs.name: Competitor Page Diff Watch
jobs.description: Snapshots a competitor's pricing or landing page and diffs it against the last snapshot, turning any real change into a short action memo instead of a wall of markup diff. Use this if a competitor has ever changed pricing or repositioned a page and you found out from a customer instead of noticing it yourself.

jobs.name: Competitor Price Watch
jobs.description: Fetches a competitor's product page for each SKU you're tracking, pulls out the price, and flags any SKU where their price has moved enough to matter relative to yours. Use this if you've ever found out you were underpricing (or getting undercut on) a product only because a customer mentioned it. For brick-and-mortar competitors with no comparable product URL, use the flyer/photo-review alternate method below instead of the scrape command.

jobs.name: Competitor Rate Benchmark Review
jobs.description: Pulls this facility's currently posted unit rates alongside a short list of nearby competitor rates and asks an agent to summarize where this facility is priced above or below the local market by unit size. Use this if you adjust rates manually and want a regular nudge to check whether local competitors have moved their pricing since you last looked.

jobs.name: Corporate Compliance Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a recurring corporate compliance filing is due — annual reports, franchise tax, registered agent renewals. Use this if you've ever had a company administratively dissolved (and had to pay to reinstate it) because a routine state filing quietly lapsed. This is a flat, single-entity filing list (filing_name,due_date); if you're tracking annual reports/renewals across multiple states for an entity that's foreign-qualified elsewhere, use `foreign-qualification-annual-report-tracker` instead, which is per-state/per-entity.

jobs.name: Compliance Training Completion Check
jobs.description: Flags employees with a required compliance training (harassment prevention, safety cert, data-privacy, etc.) approaching or past its due date with no completion on record. Use this if a training deadline has ever been missed and only surfaced when a regulator or auditor asked for proof of completion.

jobs.name: Compounding Log Review
jobs.description: Reviews the pharmacy's compounding log for a batch of custom-prepared medications and checks for missing required fields (formula, lot, beyond-use date, preparer initials, quality-check sign-off). Use this if a compounding log entry has ever been finalized missing a required field that only got caught at an inspection.

jobs.name: Concentration Risk Check
jobs.description: Checks your holdings log for any single position that's grown past a concentration threshold of your total tracked portfolio value. Use this if a winning stock has ever quietly grown into an outsized chunk of your net worth without you deciding that on purpose.

jobs.name: Concierge Request Fulfillment SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks logged concierge requests — restaurant reservations, show tickets, transportation, tours — against your fulfillment SLA and flags any still open past the deadline. Use this if a guest's dinner reservation request has ever gone unconfirmed for hours because it got buried under other front-desk tasks.

jobs.name: Concrete Pour Weather Window Check
jobs.description: Checks the forecast against scheduled concrete pours and flags any pour where temperature, precipitation, or wind conditions fall outside the mix design's acceptable curing window, so a crew doesn't pour into conditions that risk cracking or a failed cure. Use this if a pour has ever gone ahead in a cold snap or downpour and the slab had to be reviewed or replaced afterward.

jobs.name: Conference CFP Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a conference's call-for-papers deadline, and can help draft your talk proposal. Use this if you've ever meant to submit a talk and missed the CFP because you found out a week too late.

jobs.name: Conference Room AV Equipment Fault Check
jobs.description: Checks logged equipment fault reports for meeting and conference rooms — broken screens, dead mics, unresponsive video bars — and flags any that have sat unresolved past a threshold, so a room doesn't stay bookable while it's actually unusable. Use this if you want to catch rooms staff should mark unbookable until IT or facilities fixes them.

jobs.name: Parent-Teacher Conference Sign-Up Fill Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks how many parent-teacher conference slots are still unbooked as the conference date approaches and flags teachers or time blocks with a low sign-up rate. Use this if conference night has ever arrived with a wall of open slots because nobody noticed low sign-up in time to send a reminder.

jobs.name: Conflict-of-Interest Check Tracker
jobs.description: Checks new matters or clients waiting on a conflict-of-interest clearance and flags any that have sat unresolved past a set number of days. Use this if a new engagement has ever started before the conflicts check actually cleared, because the request got sent and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Consignment Stock Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares your internal record of consignment stock (inventory you hold but don't own until it sells, or that you've placed at a partner site) against the supplier or partner's own count and flags mismatches. Use this if a consignment relationship has ever gone months without anyone confirming both sides still agree on how much stock is actually there.

jobs.name: Constituent Casework Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Checks open constituent casework (a resident's request for help with a government agency, benefit, or service issue) and flags anything sitting without an update. Use this if a constituent has ever called back asking for a status update because their case quietly went quiet on staff's end too.

jobs.name: Container Demurrage/Detention Fee Watch
jobs.description: Checks tracked containers against their free-time deadline and warns before demurrage or detention fees start accruing. Use this if a container has ever sat at port past its free days and the fee bill only showed up weeks later as a surprise.

jobs.name: Container Image Scan Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks a container image inventory log for images whose last vulnerability scan is older than a configurable window and flags them. Use this if a production image has ever gone months without a fresh CVE scan because nobody re-ran it after the initial build — distinct from license-compliance-check.yaml, which audits dependency license terms, not vulnerability scan freshness.

jobs.name: Content Calendar Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks that you have something scheduled to post in the next few days. Use this if your publishing cadence has ever quietly broken because nothing was queued and nobody noticed until the gap already showed.

jobs.name: Content Feed Publish Cadence Check
jobs.description: Fetches your site's RSS/Atom feed and flags it if the most recent item's publish date is older than expected, meaning new content has stopped going out on schedule. Use this if a newsletter, blog, or magazine feed has ever gone quiet for weeks without anyone noticing until a reader asked why nothing new showed up.

jobs.name: Age-Rating Content Compliance Re-Review Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds the compliance owner to re-review a game's age rating and content descriptors before a major update ships, whenever the update adds content (violence, gambling-like mechanics, chat, user-generated content) that could change the rating. Use this if a content update has ever shipped without a fresh ratings-board check and the rating drifted out of sync with the actual game, risking a storefront pull or a compliance fine.

jobs.name: Content Repurposing Opportunity Scan
jobs.description: Reviews recently published articles' performance data and suggests which ones are strong candidates to repurpose into a newsletter roundup, social post, or updated evergreen piece. Use this if high-performing content has ever been published once and never touched again, leaving obvious repurposing value on the table.

jobs.name: Content Syndication Lead Quality Check
jobs.description: Checks the leads a content-syndication vendor delivered this period against your contract's promised volume and basic quality bar (required fields filled in, job title and industry matching your target list), and flags a shortfall. Use this if you've ever paid a vendor for a batch of leads and only found out weeks later that half of them were incomplete or outside your target market.

jobs.name: Content Translation Staleness Check
jobs.description: Compares each translated page's last-updated date against its source-language version and flags translations that have fallen behind by more than a set number of days. Use this if you publish content in multiple languages and want to catch translations that quietly went stale after the source page was revised.

jobs.name: Context Switch Frequency Check
jobs.description: Checks your calendar export for days with an unusually high number of back-to-back meetings across different topics or teams, and flags heavy context-switching days. Use this if certain days leave you feeling scattered and you want early warning before they're fully booked.

jobs.name: Contingent Worker Conversion Window Tracker
jobs.description: Flags contingent/temp workers whose contract is ending soon with no convert-to-perm-or-release decision recorded yet. Use this if a contractor's end date has ever arrived before anyone decided whether to extend, convert, or let the contract lapse, leaving the team scrambling or losing someone worth keeping.

jobs.name: Contract Obligation Clause Tracker
jobs.description: Watches for upcoming trigger dates on specific contract obligations buried inside clauses — renewal notice windows, price escalators, minimum purchase commitments, exclusivity reviews — that aren't the contract's own expiry date. Use this if a contract has ever renewed on unfavorable terms, or a price escalator kicked in unnoticed, because the obligation was tracked nowhere but the contract's fine print.

jobs.name: Contract Redline Legal Queue Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags contracts sitting in legal review with redlines past a maximum turnaround threshold, so deals don't quietly slip a quarter waiting on paperwork nobody is chasing. Use this if a deal has ever gone from "verbally agreed" to "lost to no-decision" purely because a redline sat in someone's legal review queue for weeks.

jobs.name: Contract Renewal Opportunity Tracker
jobs.description: Flags existing customer contracts approaching their renewal date so account management can start the renewal conversation early. Use this if a contract has ever auto-lapsed or renewed on unfavorable terms because nobody flagged it until it was almost too late. Applies equally to agencies tracking client contracts and retainer agreements — same pattern, just swap `contracts` for whatever table holds client/retainer end dates.

jobs.name: Contract Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a vendor or customer contract auto-renews or expires. Use this if a contract has ever auto-renewed for another year because nobody flagged the cancellation window in time.

jobs.name: Contract Signature Missing Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming photography or videography bookings for a signed contract on file and flags any shoot happening soon with no signature yet. Use this if you've ever shown up to shoot a wedding or event only to realize afterward that the client never actually signed the contract.

jobs.name: Contractor 1099 Threshold Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks year-to-date payments per contractor and flags anyone approaching or past the tax reporting threshold that triggers a 1099. Use this if you pay freelancers or contractors and don't want to discover in January that you're missing W-9s for someone you owe a filing for.

jobs.name: Contractor Misclassification Risk Check
jobs.description: Scans a contractor roster export for common worker-misclassification risk signals — long tenure, high weekly hours, a company-set schedule, company-provided equipment, or an exclusive engagement — and flags contractors worth a closer legal look. Use this if a long-running 1099 contractor relationship has ever quietly drifted into looking like employment without anyone re-checking the classification factors.

jobs.name: Contributor Onboarding Checklist Check
jobs.description: Flags new contributors (writers, illustrators, photographers) who are missing a required onboarding item — signed contract, tax form, bio, or payment details — before their first piece is scheduled to run. Use this if a contributor has ever been paid late, or a byline has ever gone out without a bio on file, because onboarding paperwork was tracked in scattered emails instead of one place.

jobs.name: Controlled Substance Count Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares the expected running count of controlled substances on the medication cart against the actual count that staff logged, and flags any mismatch. Use this if you want an early warning when a controlled-substance count doesn't add up, before it turns into a bigger compliance problem. Distinct from jobs/healthcare/controlled-substance-inventory-reconciliation.yaml, which reviews a clinic's narrative dispensing/administration log rather than structured medication-cart count data from a care facility.

jobs.name: Controlled Substance Dispensing Anomaly Watch
jobs.description: Reviews a period's controlled-substance dispensing log for patterns worth a second look — one staff member's dispensing volume of a Schedule II/III drug far outside the team's normal range, or an unusual concentration of early refills or overrides tied to one prescriber or patient. Use this if a diversion or fraud pattern has ever only come to light during a DEA audit, when a routine internal review earlier could have caught it first.

jobs.name: Controlled Substance Inventory Reconciliation
jobs.description: Reviews the practice's controlled-substance dispensing/administration log (e.g. in-office injectable opioids, ketamine, testosterone, Schedule II-V medications kept on site) for gaps or unreconciled counts. Use this if a discrepancy in a controlled-drug count has ever gone unnoticed for weeks in a human practice instead of being caught same-day — this covers a clinic's own in-office stock, the same DEA-style pattern as jobs/veterinary/controlled-substance-log-audit.yaml but for a human medical/dental practice rather than an animal clinic, so both are kept as separate jobs. Also distinct from jobs/senior-living/controlled-substance-count-discrepancy-check.yaml, which reconciles structured medication-cart count data in a care facility rather than a narrative dispensing/administration log in a clinic.

jobs.name: Controlled Substance Log Audit
jobs.description: Checks the controlled-substance usage log for gaps or unreconciled counts. Use this if a discrepancy in the controlled-drug log has ever gone unnoticed for weeks instead of being caught the same day it happened, which is exactly what a DEA/board inspection will ask about.

jobs.name: Controlled Substance Perpetual Inventory Check
jobs.description: Compares the pharmacy's running perpetual-inventory log for Schedule II drugs against the last physical count and flags any mismatch beyond a small tolerance. Use this if a Schedule II count has ever drifted for days before anyone noticed, rather than being caught the same shift.

jobs.name: Controlled Substance Waste Witness Signature Check
jobs.description: Checks logged controlled-substance waste/disposal entries (e.g. a partial-dose discard) for a required second-witness signature and flags any that only have one signer. Use this if a controlled-drug waste entry has ever gone through with only one person's initials on it, which is exactly the kind of gap a DEA or board inspection flags — distinct from controlled-substance-log-audit.yaml, which checks running-balance reconciliation and gaps rather than the specific two-signature requirement on waste entries.

jobs.name: Conveyor & Sortation System Downtime Watch
jobs.description: Checks the material handling system's downtime log for conveyor and sortation equipment and flags outages exceeding a target duration, or a segment with repeat outages in the period. Use this if a conveyor jam has ever backed up the whole outbound line for an hour while everyone treated it as a one-off instead of the third time that segment failed this week.

jobs.name: Copay Assistance Card Expiration Tracker
jobs.description: Checks patients on file with a manufacturer copay assistance/coupon card against its expiration or annual benefit-cap date and flags anyone whose card is about to lapse or run out before their next expected refill. Use this if a patient has ever shown up for a refill and been hit with the full brand-name price only because their assistance card quietly expired between visits.

jobs.name: Copyright Claim and Strike Monitor
jobs.description: Checks your channel dashboard for new copyright claims, content ID matches, or strikes and summarizes what needs a dispute or response. Use this if a copyright claim has ever sat on a video for weeks, quietly demonetizing it, before you noticed the notification.

jobs.name: Corporate Minute Book Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks the corporate minute book against the list of resolutions and actions that should be documented for the year and flags anything missing. Use this if a board resolution or annual consent has ever been discussed and acted on but never actually got written up and filed in the minute book, which surfaces at the worst time — due diligence for a financing or sale.

jobs.name: Corporate Negotiated Rate Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares what was actually charged on corporate/negotiated-rate reservations against the contracted rate for that company and flags mismatches. Use this if a reservation has ever quietly posted at the wrong rate because a rate code was mistyped or a stale contracted rate never got updated in the PMS.

jobs.name: Corporate Relocation Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks corporate and relocation-management-company contracts against their renewal or expiry date and flags any coming up within your notice window. Use this if a corporate account has ever auto-lapsed or gotten scooped up by a competitor bid simply because nobody reached out before the contract expired.

jobs.name: Corporate Wellness Partnership Utilization Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks how many employees from each corporate wellness partner are actually using their gym access and drafts a short utilization summary for renewal conversations. Use this if a corporate partnership has ever come up for renewal and nobody could say whether the employees who signed up for it were actually showing up, only that the contract existed.

jobs.name: Cloud/API Cost Alert
jobs.description: Checks your recent cloud or API spend against a budget and warns you if you're over or on pace to go over. Use this if you've ever been surprised by a bill.

jobs.name: Cost Basis Lot Log Check
jobs.description: Compares your trade log against your cost-basis lot log and flags any buy that's missing a matching lot entry. Use this if you've ever manually tracked cost basis and had a lot slip through unrecorded, turning tax time into a scramble to reconstruct it.

jobs.name: Cost-per-Hire Budget Check
jobs.description: Totals recruiting spend (job board posts, agency fees, sourcing tools) per hire and flags roles running well over your cost-per-hire target. Use this if you've ever discovered an agency fee or a rush job-board boost blew the recruiting budget only after the invoice showed up.

jobs.name: Council/Board Agenda Item Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks how many submitted agenda items are still waiting to be scheduled for a council or board meeting, and flags how many have been waiting longer than your target. Use this if an item has ever sat in a "to be scheduled" pile for months because nobody was tracking total backlog size, not just individual item status.

jobs.name: Mandatory Counseling Offer Documentation Check
jobs.description: Scans a day's dispensing log for new prescriptions where the required offer-to-counsel wasn't documented. Use this if a state board inspection has ever asked to see proof the counseling offer was made on a new prescription and the pharmacy had nothing but "we're pretty sure we did" to show for it.

jobs.name: Count Discrepancy Resolution Aging Check
jobs.description: Tracks previously identified inventory count discrepancies that still have no adjustment posted, and flags any sitting open past a set number of days. Use this if a discrepancy has ever gotten logged during a count and then just... sat there, never actually corrected in the system.

jobs.name: Counter-Offer Renege Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks candidates who accepted an offer but then backed out before their start date — often because their current employer countered — and flags a rising renege rate. Use this if you've ever only noticed a string of accepted offers falling through right before day one after it had already happened several times.

jobs.name: Coupon Code Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks active promo and coupon codes against their expiry date and flags any expiring soon so you can decide to extend, replace, or let them lapse on purpose. Use this if a customer has ever complained a code from your last campaign stopped working and nobody on the team knew it had quietly expired.

jobs.name: Course Platform Unused-Seat Check
jobs.description: Flags when you're paying for an online learning platform subscription (Coursera Plus, Pluralsight, O'Reilly, etc.) but haven't logged any activity recently. Use this if you've ever kept paying for a course subscription for months after you stopped actually using it.

jobs.name: Course Progress Check-in
jobs.description: Compares your current chapter/lesson against a target date and tells you if you're on track or falling behind. Use this if you've ever signed up for a course and quietly stopped halfway through.

jobs.name: Court Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of court/filing deadlines and warns before any come due. Use this if a filing deadline has ever been missed because it lived only in one person's head or a sticky note instead of a shared, checked calendar.

jobs.name: Courtesy Inspection Upsell Conversion Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews multi-point courtesy inspections performed over the past week and measures what share of recommended additional work actually turned into sold repair orders, broken down by technician or advisor. Use this if inspections have ever been getting done but nobody could tell whether the recommendations were actually converting into booked work.

jobs.name: Cover Design Revision Round Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks how many revision rounds a book cover has gone through against its contracted or budgeted limit, and warns when a feedback deadline for the current round is close. Use this if a cover has ever quietly burned through more revision rounds than the designer's contract allows, or a round sat waiting on feedback until it blew the cover deadline.

jobs.name: Coverage Gap Audit
jobs.description: Compares your current insurance policies against a standard coverage checklist for your situation and flags anything missing or underinsured. Use this if you've ever added a policy for one specific thing and never circled back to check the overall picture still made sense.

jobs.name: Covered Call / Cash-Secured Put Expiration Reminder
jobs.description: Warns when an open covered call or cash-secured put is approaching its expiration date, so you have time to decide whether to let it expire, roll it, or close it early. Use this if you've ever been surprised by an option expiring and shares getting called away (or put to you) when you meant to act first.

jobs.name: CPE Firmware/Warranty Update Tracker
jobs.description: Checks deployed customer-premises equipment against current firmware versions and warranty expiry dates, flagging anything out of date or soon out of warranty. Use this if a modem or router has ever been running years-old firmware with a known vulnerability because nobody was tracking the fleet's patch level.

jobs.name: Crane Lift Plan Approval Tracker
jobs.description: Flags scheduled critical or heavy crane lifts that don't yet have a signed-off lift plan on file, so a lift never proceeds without the qualified rigger review it's supposed to have. Use this if a crane lift has ever been scheduled and the paperwork trail for who approved the rigging plan only got assembled after the fact.

jobs.name: Crash-Report Symbolication Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts how many crash reports in your crash reporter are still stuck unsymbolicated (raw memory addresses instead of readable stack traces), since a growing pile of those makes every crash triage session slower. Use this if debug symbols have ever failed to upload for a build and weeks of crashes from that build sat as unreadable noise until someone finally noticed the symbol files never made it up.

jobs.name: Creative Brief Approval Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks creative briefs that are waiting on client sign-off and flags any that have sat pending approval longer than a set number of days. Use this if production work keeps getting delayed because a brief was quietly waiting on a client signature for a week and nobody on the account team noticed until the timeline was already blown.

jobs.name: Creative Production Capacity Check
jobs.description: Compares the hours booked against the production calendar for each creative discipline (design, copy, video, etc.) for the coming weeks against that discipline's available team capacity, and flags any week that's overbooked. Use this if a creative director has ever accepted a new project deadline only to discover the design team was already booked solid for that week on other client work.

jobs.name: Creative Review Round Count Check
jobs.description: Counts how many rounds of revisions a creative deliverable has gone through and compares it against the number of rounds allotted in the client's statement of work, flagging projects that have hit or are about to exceed the cap. Use this if unlimited-feeling "just one more round" revision requests have ever eaten into a project's profitability without anyone tracking it against the contract.

jobs.name: Influencer/Creator Code Performance Tracker
jobs.description: Digests which creator/influencer referral codes drove revenue or installs in the last period and flags codes that have gone completely dead, so partnerships get renewed based on actual performance instead of vibes. Use this if a paid creator partnership has ever kept auto-renewing months after the creator's code stopped converting, because nobody was watching the per-code numbers.

jobs.name: Creator Fund and Ad Revenue Payout Reconciliation
jobs.description: Compares expected platform ad-revenue or creator-fund payouts against what actually landed, and flags anything missing or short. Use this if a payout has ever come in lower than the platform's own estimated earnings dashboard said it would, or just never showed up, and nobody noticed until months later.

jobs.name: Creator Reputation and Brand-Safety Mention Watch
jobs.description: Scans press, forums, and social media for mentions of you outside your own comment sections, and flags negative or brand-safety-relevant ones. Use this if a controversy or callout thread has ever built up about you for a day before you even knew it existed, or a sponsor's ever asked about something you hadn't seen yet.

jobs.name: Creator Sponsor Category Exclusivity Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming sponsored posts across any platform for two sponsors in the same product category running too close together. Use this if you've ever signed a skincare brand for one post and a competing skincare brand for the next, breaking an exclusivity clause neither sponsor should have had to discover on their own.

jobs.name: Creator Workload and Burnout Sustainability Check
jobs.description: Checks your own logged hours and rest days against sustainable thresholds and flags when you're running too hot for too long. Use this if you've ever kept a perfectly steady posting schedule while quietly working every single day to hit it, and only noticed you were burned out once the content itself started slipping.

jobs.name: Credit Card Annual Fee Review
jobs.description: Reminds you before a credit card's annual fee posts so you can decide whether the rewards and perks you've used this year justify keeping it, or whether it's time to downgrade or cancel. Use this if you've ever been surprised by an annual fee charge for a card you rarely use.

jobs.name: Credit Memo Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks issued credit memos and refunds that haven't yet been applied to an invoice or paid out, and flags the ones that have been sitting open longer than expected. Use this if outstanding credit memos have ever piled up unnoticed, tying up money that should have gone back to a customer or been netted against a bill.

jobs.name: Credit Note Issuance Approval Check
jobs.description: Checks issued credit notes above a configurable amount and flags any without a recorded approver. Use this if a large credit note has ever gone out the door on one person's say-so with no second signoff — distinct from credit-memo-aging-check.yaml, which tracks how long outstanding credit memos have sat unapplied, not whether issuing them in the first place was properly approved.

jobs.name: Credit Union Member Share Minimum Check
jobs.description: Flags credit union member accounts whose share (membership) balance has fallen below the minimum required to maintain membership. Use this if a member's share balance has ever dropped below the threshold without anyone noticing until an audit — distinct from dormant-account-flagging-check, which flags inactivity, not an insufficient share balance on an active member.

jobs.name: Credit Utilization Watch
jobs.description: Checks the balance-to-limit ratio on a credit card or line of credit and warns when utilization crosses a threshold. Use this if you want to protect your credit score or stay within a business line of credit's comfortable operating range, rather than finding out only when a statement arrives.

jobs.name: Crew Dispatch Schedule Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans the day's move schedule for any crew or truck booked onto two moves that overlap, or booked back-to-back with too little time between them to drive from one job site to the next. Use this if a crew has ever shown up late to a move (or had to rush and cut corners) because dispatch quietly double-booked the same crew or truck.

jobs.name: Crew Equipment Loss & Theft Tracker
jobs.description: Checks your equipment loss/theft log for open reports that have gone without resolution longer than your follow-up window and flags them. Use this if a stolen mower or trimmer has ever fallen through the cracks because nobody followed up on the insurance claim or police report after the initial report was filed.

jobs.name: Crew No-Show Tracker
jobs.description: Checks the crew attendance log for missed jobs and late arrivals against what was scheduled, then flags any crew or cleaner with a repeated pattern so it can be addressed before a client complains. Use this if a cleaner has ever been late or a no-show more than once and nobody noticed until a client called to ask where the crew was.

jobs.name: Crew Overtime Hours Check
jobs.description: Totals each cleaner's logged hours for the week and flags anyone approaching or over your overtime threshold. Use this if payroll surprises or crew burnout have ever snuck up on you because overtime only got noticed once the payroll run came back higher than expected.

jobs.name: Crew Route & Schedule Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans the day's cleaning schedule for any crew or cleaner booked onto two jobs that overlap, or booked back-to-back with too little travel time between them. Use this if a crew has ever shown up late (or not at all) to a job because the schedule quietly double-booked them or left no time to drive between two addresses.

jobs.name: Crew Safety Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each crew member's safety certifications, like OSHA 10/30 or forklift operator cards, against their expiry date and flags anyone lapsing soon. Use this if a worker has ever been pulled off a site because their safety card expired and nobody caught it beforehand.

jobs.name: Crew Safety Training Renewal Check
