jobs.description: Checks each crew member's safety training records (equipment handling, chemical safety, OSHA refreshers) for certifications expiring within your warning window and flags them. Use this if a crew member's safety training has ever lapsed without anyone noticing until an incident or audit brought it up.

jobs.name: Crew Vehicle Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Checks each company vehicle's mileage and last-service date against its maintenance interval and flags anything due or overdue for an oil change, inspection, or other scheduled service. Use this if a crew van has ever broken down mid-route because nobody was tracking when it was last serviced.

jobs.name: Critical Patch SLA Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks patch-management records for critical and high-severity vulnerabilities that have gone past the organization's patch SLA window, then flags every system that is still unpatched. Use this if you want to make sure "critical" vulnerabilities actually get fixed on schedule instead of aging quietly on a dashboard nobody revisits.

jobs.name: Critical-Path Material Lead Time Review
jobs.description: Reviews long-lead-time materials (elevators, structural steel, custom windows, switchgear, and similar) against the project schedule to catch items that haven't been ordered yet but need to be, given their lead time. Use this if a schedule has ever slipped months because a long-lead item wasn't placed on order until someone finally asked "wait, did we order that yet?"

jobs.name: Critical Spare Parts Stock Check
jobs.description: Compares on-hand stock of critical maintenance spare parts against a set minimum and flags anything running low. Use this if a machine has ever sat down for days waiting on a spare part that a stock check would have caught weeks earlier.

jobs.name: Critical Supply Backorder Tracking Check
jobs.description: Tracks backordered critical medical supplies against their promised ETA and flags ones overdue or with no ETA on file at all. Use this if a critical item has ever gone on backorder and then quietly stayed that way with nobody chasing the vendor — distinct from clinical-supply-low-stock-check.yaml, which flags current on-hand stock dropping below a reorder point, not the status of an order already placed and delayed.

jobs.name: Crop Insurance Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Tracks key crop insurance dates — sales closing date, acreage reporting date, production reporting date — per crop/policy and warns before each one passes. Use this if you've ever missed an acreage reporting date and put coverage at risk over paperwork, not weather.

jobs.name: Crop Price Market Watch
jobs.description: Checks a commodity crop's current market price against a target and alerts when it crosses your threshold. Use this if you've ever missed a good selling window because nobody was watching the market that week.

jobs.name: Crop Rotation Planning Reminder
jobs.description: Once a year, ahead of planting season, reminds you to review each field's recent crop history and flags any field that's about to grow the same crop family two years running. Use this if you've ever planted corn on corn (or any repeat) out of habit and paid for it in yield or pest pressure.

jobs.name: Crop Yield vs. Projection Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual harvested yield per field against your pre-season projection and flags fields that came in significantly above or below plan. Use this if you've ever finished harvest and realized months later that one field quietly underperformed every year without anyone digging into why.

jobs.name: Cross-Border Customs Broker Fee Audit
jobs.description: Compares a customs broker's billed entry fees against your contracted fee schedule and flags overcharges. Use this if a customs broker has ever quietly billed extra "disbursement" or "entry processing" line items above the agreed schedule and it only got caught during an annual trade-compliance review.

jobs.name: Cross-Connection Control Survey Reminder
jobs.description: Checks which commercial and industrial water customers are coming due for their periodic cross-connection control survey — the site-hazard assessment that determines what backflow risk a property poses and what device protection it needs — and lists the ones due within a lookahead window. Use this if your water utility is required to re-survey commercial/industrial accounts on a regulatory cycle and needs a heads-up before an account falls overdue; this is the hazard survey/assessment itself, not the annual backflow-device test-and-certification reminder (that's a separate, narrower job).

jobs.name: Cross-Dock Dwell Time Watch
jobs.description: Checks freight moving through a cross-dock facility against a target dwell time and flags anything sitting too long between inbound and outbound legs. Use this if freight has ever quietly stalled at a cross-dock for days, turning a same-day transfer into a missed delivery window.

jobs.name: Cross-Platform Branding Consistency Audit
jobs.description: Checks your handle, profile picture, bio, and bio link across all your platform profiles for drift. Use this if you've ever updated your profile picture or bio link everywhere except one app, and a fan or brand found the stale one first.

jobs.name: Podcast Cross-Platform Episode Parity Check
jobs.description: Compares the published episode count across Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and YouTube and flags a mismatch. Use this if an episode has ever gone out on your main feed but silently failed to show up on one of the platforms your listeners actually use.

jobs.name: Cross-Team Dependency Check-in
jobs.description: Reminds you to check the status of work your team is depending on from other teams, and flags dependencies past their expected date. Use this if a project has ever slipped because a dependency from another team quietly stalled and nobody checked in until it was already blocking the roadmap.

jobs.name: Cross-Team Meeting Attendance Decline Check
jobs.description: Scans attendance history for recurring cross-team meetings and flags ones whose turnout has dropped, either falling below a floor or declining sharply since the meeting started. Use this if a cross-team sync has ever kept running on the calendar for a year after everyone quietly stopped showing up, because nobody looked at attendance trends, only whether the invite still existed.

jobs.name: Cross-Team Stakeholder Update Cadence Check
jobs.description: Checks a log of status updates your team owes to other stakeholders and flags any project where the last update sent is older than your cadence allows. Use this if a stakeholder has ever had to ping you first asking "so what's the status?" because a recurring update your team was supposed to send quietly stopped going out.

jobs.name: Crosspost Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks that content published on your primary platform actually got mirrored to your other channels. Use this if a video or post has ever gone up on YouTube and just never made it to the other platforms because crossposting was manual and someone forgot.

jobs.name: Crypto Cold Wallet Backup Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to re-verify that your cold wallet seed phrase backup is intact and accessible once it's been longer than your check interval since the last verification. Use this if you've ever set up a hardware wallet, written the seed phrase down once, and never actually re-checked that it's still legible and in a safe place.

jobs.name: Crypto Price Alert
jobs.description: Checks a crypto asset's price and alerts when it crosses a threshold you set. Use this if you're waiting for a price target and don't want to keep a tab open all day watching a chart.

jobs.name: Crypto Tax-Lot Cost-Basis Export Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you on a recurring cadence to export transaction/cost-basis data from exchanges and wallets into your tax tracking tool, so records don't fall behind and become a scramble at filing time. Use this if you've ever had to reconstruct a year of trades from memory in April.

jobs.name: CSAT Detractor Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Flags individual low-scoring (detractor) CSAT survey responses that haven't had a follow-up outreach logged within a configurable window. Use this if an unhappy customer has ever left a bad survey score and then never heard back from anyone — distinct from csat-score-watch.yaml, which tracks the aggregate score trend, not whether any specific detractor response actually got a follow-up.

jobs.name: CSAT Score Watch
jobs.description: Checks your recent customer satisfaction score and flags it if it drops below your target. Use this if CSAT only gets looked at once a quarter, by which point a bad week is old news.

jobs.name: CSAT Survey Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews recent customer satisfaction survey responses, flags the low scores, and drafts a personal follow-up message for each so a manager can reach out before the customer churns quietly. Use this if a customer has ever left a bad rating that nobody read, or read but never followed up on, and later cancelled the maintenance contract.

jobs.name: CSAT Survey Response Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks what percentage of closed tickets actually got a CSAT survey response, separate from the score itself. Use this if your CSAT score has ever looked great simply because only your happiest customers bother to answer the survey, while a shrinking response rate quietly made the number less meaningful.

jobs.name: Customer Satisfaction Index (CSI) Score Monitor
jobs.description: Checks incoming customer satisfaction (CSI) survey scores from service and sales against a minimum threshold and flags any individual score low enough to put the dealership's manufacturer standing at risk. Use this if a bad CSI score has ever sat unnoticed in a survey inbox until the manufacturer's monthly report flagged it first.

jobs.name: CTR Filing Threshold Tracker
jobs.description: Flags cash transactions at or above the $10,000 Currency Transaction Report threshold that don't have a matching filed CTR on record. Use this if a reportable cash transaction has ever slipped through without a CTR getting filed within the regulatory window — distinct from ofac-sanctions-screening-staleness-check.yaml, which covers sanctions screening, not BSA cash-reporting obligations.

jobs.name: Curbside Pickup Wait Time Check
jobs.description: Measures the time between a customer checking in for curbside pickup and an associate delivering the order to their car, then flags orders or days that blew past the store's service-level target. Use this if you promise customers a fast curbside experience and want to catch slow days before they show up in complaints or reviews.

jobs.name: Currency Exchange Favorable-Window Alert
jobs.description: Checks a currency pair's exchange rate against a target rate you set and alerts you when it's favorable to convert. Use this if you're planning to exchange money for an upcoming trip and want to catch a good rate instead of converting on autopilot.

jobs.name: Currency Hedge Exposure Check
jobs.description: Adds up open receivables and payables held in non-base currencies and flags when total unhedged exposure in any currency crosses a risk threshold. Use this if you invoice or pay in foreign currencies and want a heads-up on when your exposure has grown large enough that a hedge (or at least a conversation with treasury) is worth considering, rather than just watching the exchange rate move.

jobs.name: Custom 404 Traffic Report
jobs.description: Pulls the URLs hitting your 404 page most often and separates the ones worth a redirect (real traffic, likely an old link or typo) from the noise. Use this if you'd rather fix the handful of broken links people actually hit than guess at what's worth redirecting.

jobs.name: Customer Appointment Reminder Drafts
jobs.description: Reads tomorrow's scheduled appointments and drafts a short reminder message for each customer confirming the date, time window, and tech name, so someone just has to review and send. Use this if no-shows or last-minute reschedules have ever cost a tech a wasted trip because nobody reminded the customer the day before.

jobs.name: Customer Arrearage Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks how far past due each customer account balance is (30/60/90+ days) and flags accounts that have crossed the threshold where collection action normally kicks in. Use this if a utility's collections team has ever been surprised by how large an account's unpaid balance had grown before anyone looked at it.

jobs.name: Customer Bandwidth Overage Billing Accuracy Check
jobs.description: Uses an agent to compare metered usage records against the overage charges that actually appeared on customer invoices and flags mismatches in either direction. Use this if a customer has ever been billed an overage fee that didn't match their metered usage, or usage that should have triggered a fee slipped through unbilled.

jobs.name: Telecom Customer Contract Expiry Churn Risk Check
jobs.description: Checks customer service contracts approaching their term end date and flags them for a renewal outreach before they can quietly roll to month-to-month or churn to a competitor. Use this if a contract has ever expired with no renewal conversation because sales only found out after the customer already left.

jobs.name: Customer Deposit Refund Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks cancelled or adjusted bookings that owe a customer a deposit refund and flags any refund that has sat unpaid past a set number of days. Use this if a move has ever been cancelled and the customer's deposit refund quietly stalled in accounting while the customer kept calling to ask where their money is.

jobs.name: Customer Health Score Monitor
jobs.description: Rolls up usage, support, billing, and sentiment signals into a per-account health score and flags accounts that dropped into the red zone. Use this if account health only ever comes up in a QBR deck, long after an account has already quietly gone cold.

jobs.name: Customer Health vs Ticket Volume Correlation Watch
jobs.description: Cross-references your account health scores against recent support ticket volume and flags accounts where a rising ticket count lines up with a dropping health score. Use this if an account has ever churned after weeks of piling up support tickets that nobody connected back to the customer-success health dashboard because the two lived in different tools.

jobs.name: Customer Move Day Reminder Drafts
jobs.description: Reads tomorrow's scheduled moves and drafts a short reminder message for each customer confirming the move date, arrival window, and crew size or truck details, so someone just has to review and send. Use this if a customer has ever been caught off guard or unprepared on move day because nobody reminded them what to expect and when the crew would show up.

jobs.name: Customer-Pay vs Warranty-Pay Mix Tracker
jobs.description: Checks the weekly split of repair order revenue between customer-pay, warranty-pay, and internal-pay against your target mix and flags a drift. Use this if a service department has ever found out at month-end that warranty work quietly ate into the higher-margin customer-pay volume nobody was tracking day to day.

jobs.name: Customer Sentiment Spike Check
jobs.description: Reads recent incoming customer messages and flags a spike in frustrated or angry language, even if SLA and CSAT still look fine. Use this if customer anger has ever built up over a bad release or outage days before it ever showed up in a survey score or reopen rate.

jobs.name: Customer SLA Credit Issuance Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks approved SLA credit requests (from outages or missed commitments) against how long they've sat unissued and flags ones past the promised turnaround. Use this if a customer has ever had to call in and ask where their promised SLA credit went because the approved credit just sat in a queue nobody was tracking.

jobs.name: Customs Clearance Check
jobs.description: Flags a shipment that's been sitting in customs longer than expected. Use this if a shipment has ever been stuck at the border for weeks before anyone thought to follow up with the broker.

jobs.name: CVE Watch
jobs.description: Checks for newly published CVEs affecting packages in your stack. Use this if you want a heads-up on a critical vulnerability before it shows up in a routine dependency audit days later. This is an incremental, new-CVE-only feed checked since the last run — it does not flag stale/outdated packages or do a full sweep; for that, see devops/dependency-audit.

jobs.name: Cycle Count Accuracy by Counter Check
jobs.description: Aggregates recent cycle counts by who performed them and flags any counter whose mismatch rate against system quantity is well above the rest, a sign of a training gap or a genuinely harder zone to count. Use this if a cycle count program has ever tracked overall accuracy but never broken it down by counter, so a consistently sloppy count kept passing as just normal variance.

jobs.name: Cycle Count Schedule Adherence Check
jobs.description: Checks whether scheduled cycle counts actually happened on time, zone by zone. Use this if a cycle count program has ever quietly stopped happening for a whole section of the warehouse because nobody was tracking adherence to the schedule itself, only the count results.

jobs.name: Daily Attendance Headcount Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares each classroom's sign-in count against its sign-out count at end of day and flags any child who was checked in but never checked out. Use this if a child has ever still shown as "present" after closing because a pickup didn't get logged — a gap that matters most during a fire drill or real evacuation, when the headcount has to be trustworthy.

jobs.name: Daily Flashcard Review
jobs.description: Lists which flashcards are due for review today from a simple deck file. Use this if you're learning something with spaced repetition but don't want a whole separate app for it.

jobs.name: Daily Jobsite Log Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews whether each active site's daily log/report was actually submitted and contains the expected substance (crew count, weather, work performed, delays) rather than being a rubber-stamped copy of the day before. Use this if a dispute has ever come down to "what actually happened on site that day" and the daily logs were too thin to help.

jobs.name: Daily Sales Flash Report
jobs.description: Pulls yesterday's key sales numbers (net sales, covers, average check, comp/void total) and compares them against the same day last week and last year, then writes a short flash summary. Use this if you've ever wanted a same-day read on how the restaurant performed without waiting for the full weekly P&L close.

jobs.name: Daily Standup Summary
jobs.description: Pulls together what you did yesterday (commits, closed tasks) plus today's calendar, and drafts a quick 3-line standup update. Use this if you're tired of writing the same "yesterday / today / blockers" recap every morning.

jobs.name: Dam Safety Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds staff when a regulatory-required safety inspection for a dam or reservoir is coming due, based on each structure's last inspection date and required inspection interval. Use this if your utility operates a hydro dam or water-storage reservoir and needs to keep inspections on schedule to stay compliant with dam-safety regulations.

jobs.name: Damage Incident Report Tracker
jobs.description: Checks reported damage or breakage incidents from cleanings and flags any still open past your target resolution window. Use this if a damage claim has ever sat unresolved long enough that the client escalated it or your insurer asked why nobody followed up sooner.

jobs.name: Damaged Goods Claim Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks customer-reported damaged or lost item claims from a move and flags any claim still open past your target resolution window. Use this if a damage claim has ever sat unresolved for weeks because nobody was watching the clock on it, leaving an unhappy customer chasing you for an update.

jobs.name: Damaged Merchandise Write-Off Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews logged damaged/defective merchandise write-offs for patterns worth a closer look — a single SKU with a recurring damage reason, or one store writing off well above the chain average. Use this if write-offs have ever just gotten rubber-stamped monthly instead of getting checked for a root cause (bad packaging, a rough receiving process, or something less innocent).

jobs.name: DAO Governance Vote Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a DAO's active governance proposals for ones you haven't voted on yet and warns before voting closes. Use this if you hold governance tokens and have ever missed a vote you actually cared about because the window closed while you weren't looking.

jobs.name: Dark Fiber Lease Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks leased dark fiber routes for how many strands are actually lit (in use) versus paid for, and flags routes sitting mostly idle. Use this if you've ever kept paying for a full dark fiber lease on a route where most strands sat unused because nobody reviewed utilization after the initial buildout.

jobs.name: Dark Fiber Splice Record Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks the fiber splice record log for missing or incomplete entries (no splice location, no fiber count, no technician sign-off) across recently completed splice work orders. Use this if a fiber cut has ever taken longer to repair than it should have because the splice records for that segment were incomplete or never got filed.

jobs.name: Dashcam Footage Retention Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews dashcam footage tied to open incidents and confirms it's been preserved before the provider's auto-delete window closes, while flagging routine footage that's overdue for purge under your retention policy. Use this if incident footage has ever auto-deleted before an insurance or legal team asked for it, because nobody flagged it for a hold in time.

jobs.name: Data Privacy Request (GDPR/CCPA) Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Flags open data subject access/deletion requests approaching their statutory response deadline and drafts a status summary for whoever owns the response. Use this if a GDPR or CCPA-style privacy request has ever come uncomfortably close to its response window because tracking it lived in someone's inbox instead of a real deadline list.

jobs.name: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion Check
jobs.description: Checks how many connections your database's connection pool is currently using compared to its configured maximum, and flags it when utilization is trending toward running out. Use this if you've ever had requests start timing out or erroring because the app ran out of database connections before anyone noticed the pool was nearly full.

jobs.name: Database Index Bloat Check
jobs.description: Runs a bloat-estimate query against a Postgres database and flags indexes whose estimated bloat ratio exceeds a configurable threshold. Use this if query performance has ever degraded slowly over months because dead tuples piled up in an index nobody was watching — distinct from database-migration-drift-check.yaml, which checks schema drift, not index storage bloat.

jobs.name: Database Migration Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares the set of database migrations that have been applied in each environment (e.g. staging vs. production) and flags any migration that's present in one environment but missing from another. Use this if you've ever had a bug show up only in production because a migration got applied there but was never run in staging, or vice versa.

jobs.name: DAU/MAU Engagement Ratio Check
jobs.description: Computes the daily-active-to-monthly-active user ratio (a standard stickiness measure) and flags when it drops below a healthy floor. Use this if "engagement feels down lately" has ever been a gut feeling nobody could confirm with a number until the next board deck.

jobs.name: DAU/MAU Stickiness Watch
jobs.description: Checks your game's daily-active-to-monthly-active user ratio (a core "stickiness" health metric) and flags when it's trending down. Use this if engagement has ever quietly eroded for weeks before it showed up as a scary number in a monthly business review.

jobs.name: Day Pass Utilization Check
jobs.description: Compares how many day passes have been sold or checked in against your total walk-in capacity for each day, and flags any day that's running near or over that limit. Use this if a day has ever filled up on drop-ins without anyone noticing until members started complaining there was nowhere to sit.

jobs.name: Daycare Playgroup Staff-to-Dog Ratio Check
jobs.description: Compares the number of dogs checked into each daycare playgroup against the staff assigned to supervise it and flags any group over your target ratio. Use this if you've ever had a playgroup get too crowded for the handlers on the floor before anyone noticed.

jobs.name: Daycare Temperament Evaluation Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans your daycare roster for dogs whose on-file temperament/behavior evaluation has expired or is expiring soon under your required re-evaluation interval. Use this if a dog's original temperament eval has ever quietly aged for years while new behaviors went unassessed, right up until something happened in a playgroup.

jobs.name: Database Backup Restore Verification
jobs.description: Actually restores your latest database backup to a throwaway database and checks it's queryable. Use this if `backup-reminder` isn't enough — a backup file existing doesn't mean it's actually restorable.

jobs.name: DCA Contribution Reminder
jobs.description: Checks your dollar-cost-averaging log and warns if it's been longer than your planned interval since the last logged contribution. Use this if you've ever meant to invest a fixed amount on a schedule and let a month slip by without actually placing the order.

jobs.name: DEA Biennial Controlled Substance Inventory Reminder
jobs.description: Checks the date of the pharmacy's last full physical inventory of controlled substances (required at least every two years by DEA rule, or on whatever shorter interval your state requires) and warns as the deadline approaches. Use this if scheduling the full count has ever slipped your mind until it was almost overdue.

jobs.name: Deal Slippage Quarter-End Check
jobs.description: Checks open deals whose close date has been pushed more than once across a quarter boundary, and flags these chronically-slipping deals for manager review. Use this if you want to catch deals that quietly keep getting pushed "to next quarter" before they eat into another forecast.

jobs.name: Debit Card Fraud Alert Response Time Check
jobs.description: Checks logged debit card fraud alerts against how long they took to close out and flags any that exceeded the target response time. Use this if a fraud alert has ever sat open longer than it should have before a rep called the cardholder or blocked the card — distinct from aml-alert-backlog-check, which tracks unresolved AML case volume, not per-alert response latency on card fraud.

jobs.name: Decision Log Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks your decision log for entries that were opened or referenced in meeting notes but never actually got written down and closed out, and flags the gap. Use this if decisions get made verbally in meetings but the log everyone's supposed to check afterward doesn't reflect them.

jobs.name: Deck/Fence Stain & Reseal Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you it's the season to inspect and reseal a wood deck or fence based on how long it's been since the last treatment. Use this if you've ever noticed graying, splintering wood after skipping a resealing season because there was no obvious trigger to do it.

jobs.name: Dedicated Desk Vacancy Check
jobs.description: Checks dedicated-desk assignments for desks that are being paid for but are unassigned to any member, or assigned but showing no recent check-ins. Use this if you've ever discovered a dedicated desk sitting empty for weeks that nobody flagged as a gap in revenue or a member who quietly stopped coming in.

jobs.name: Deep Work Block Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks scheduled deep-work or focus blocks on your calendar export for ones that got overbooked with other meetings, and flags the intrusion. Use this if you block time for focused work but other invites keep sneaking in on top of it without anyone noticing until the day arrives.

jobs.name: Study Focus-Time Weekly Goal Check
jobs.description: Sums up logged study/deep-work minutes for the current week and compares against your weekly goal, so you know by midweek whether you're on pace. Use this if you tell yourself you'll "study more this week" without ever actually measuring the hours.

jobs.name: DeFi Liquidation Risk Watch
jobs.description: Checks a lending position's current collateral ratio and warns before it gets close to the liquidation threshold. Use this if a position has ever gotten liquidated during a price dip because nobody was watching the health factor in real time.

jobs.name: DeFi Protocol TVL Drop Alert
jobs.description: Checks a DeFi protocol's total value locked (TVL) via a public API and alerts when it drops sharply over a short window — often an early sign of a bank run, exploit, or loss of confidence. Use this if you've ever wanted a warning before a protocol you have funds in got worse, not after.

jobs.name: Delegated Task Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks tasks you delegated to someone else for ones with no status update in a while, and flags them for a check-in. Use this if things you've handed off tend to go quiet and you only find out they stalled when a deadline is already close.

jobs.name: Delinquent Account Lien Timeline Check
jobs.description: Looks at every past-due storage unit account and compares how many days it's been late against the notice and waiting periods your state requires before a lien can be filed on the unit's contents. Use this if you want an early warning when an overdue account is approaching (or has crossed) a legal deadline, instead of finding out only when a customer calls angry.

jobs.name: Delivery Driver Wait Time Complaint Tracker
jobs.description: Summarizes third-party delivery driver wait times and any "order was cold" style complaints from platform feedback to spot patterns by daypart or platform. Use this if you've ever suspected slow handoffs during a rush were quietly costing you delivery ratings and never had the data pulled together to check.

jobs.name: Third-Party Delivery Commission Reconciliation
jobs.description: Recalculates what a delivery platform (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub) should have paid out after commission and fees, and flags orders where the actual payout came in lower than expected. Use this if you've ever suspected a delivery platform's payout report doesn't quite match its own published commission rate but never checked.

jobs.name: Supplier Delivery Receiving Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares what was ordered from a supplier against what was actually received on the delivery receiving log and flags shortages or overages. Use this if a supplier has ever shorted a case of product and it only got noticed mid-service when the kitchen ran out.

jobs.name: Demand Response Event Participation Check
jobs.description: After a demand-response event has been called, compares each enrolled customer's or device's actual load reduction against their baseline and committed curtailment amount, and lists which ones didn't curtail as expected. Use this if your utility runs demand-response programs and needs a quick way to see who followed through on an event versus who needs a follow-up call, a performance-payment adjustment, or a non-compliance notice.

jobs.name: Dementia Care Staff Certification Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks memory-care and dementia-care specialized training certifications for direct-care staff and flags anyone whose certification is expiring soon. Use this if a staff member has ever kept working a memory-care unit past the point their required dementia-care credential lapsed, separate from their general CPR or first-aid card.

jobs.name: Dental Cleaning Recall Reminder
jobs.description: Checks which patients are due or overdue for a professional dental cleaning based on their last recorded cleaning date and lists them for outreach. Use this if a pet has ever gone years past the recommended dental interval because nobody was tracking cleaning dates separately from vaccine due dates — distinct from pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml, which tracks vaccines, not periodontal care cadence.

jobs.name: Dental Equipment Calibration Due Check
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of dental equipment — x-ray sensors, autoclaves, handpieces — against their calibration or inspection due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a piece of equipment has ever gone overdue for calibration unnoticed; distinct from a sterilization-log-compliance job, which checks daily sterilization cycle records, not the equipment's own inspection/calibration schedule.

jobs.name: Dental Insurance Claim Denial by CDT Code Check
jobs.description: Parses a dental claims log and flags denied claims, grouped by CDT procedure code, that are approaching or past the payer's resubmission or appeal deadline. Use this if denied claims (especially recurring ones tied to a specific procedure code like a crown or scaling code) are quietly aging past the window to appeal instead of being caught early.

jobs.name: Dental Lab Case Turnaround Tracker
jobs.description: Checks crown, denture, and appliance cases sent to an outside dental lab against the lab's promised turnaround date and flags anything overdue. Use this if a lab case has ever gone quiet past its due date, leaving a patient's seat appointment at risk because nobody chased the lab in time.

jobs.name: In-House Membership Plan Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks renewal dates for the practice's own in-house discount or membership plan — not dental insurance — and flags patients approaching renewal or already lapsed. Use this if a membership-plan patient has ever lapsed and kept booking at member pricing without anyone noticing the plan wasn't active.

jobs.name: Dental Supply Reorder Threshold Check
jobs.description: Scans a dental operatory supply inventory (impression material, anesthetic cartridges, gloves, prophy paste, burs) against reorder thresholds and flags what's running low. Use this if a chair has ever gone quiet mid-procedure because nobody noticed the last box of anesthetic cartridges or impression material got used up between supplier deliveries.

jobs.name: Dentist Appointment Due Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you when it has been roughly six months since your last dental cleaning so you can book the next one before it's overdue. Use this if cleanings tend to slip past the recommended interval because there's nothing urgent nudging you to call the office.

jobs.name: Dentist Schedule Utilization Check
jobs.description: Calculates what percentage of each provider's bookable chair time was actually filled with appointments over a trailing window, and flags days or providers below a target utilization rate. Use this if open chair time has ever gone unnoticed until the month's production numbers came in low — this tracks the schedule-fill trend, distinct from the no-show/cancellation rate jobs which look at broken appointments rather than raw open capacity.

jobs.name: Denture Reline Due Date Tracker
jobs.description: Flags denture patients approaching or past their recommended reline interval based on their last reline date. Use this if denture patients have ever gone years past a comfortable fit because nobody was tracking reline dates separately from routine recall — distinct from hygiene-recall-cadence-tracker.yaml, which tracks natural-dentition cleaning cadence, not denture-specific maintenance.

jobs.name: Department Budget Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares each department's or program's actual spending against its budget and flags meaningful overages or underspend. Use this if a department has ever blown through its annual budget months early because nobody was checking actual-vs-budget until year-end reconciliation.

jobs.name: Dependabot Alert Digest
jobs.description: Rolls up open Dependabot security alerts across a repo into one digest. Use this if Dependabot alerts have ever piled up in a tab nobody checks instead of getting triaged as they come in.

jobs.name: Dependency Vulnerability Audit
jobs.description: Checks your project's dependencies for known security vulnerabilities and packages that are way out of date, then summarizes what to fix first. Use this if you want a heads-up before something exploitable slips into production. This is the full periodic sweep, covering every known vulnerability plus outdated packages, not just newly-published CVEs — for a lightweight daily incremental check on newly-published CVEs only, see security/cve-watch.

jobs.name: Deployment Rollback Frequency Watch
jobs.description: Checks deployment history for how often recent releases had to be rolled back and flags it when that rate is climbing compared to the prior window. Use this if release quality has ever quietly gotten worse without anyone noticing until several bad deploys in a row.

jobs.name: Deposit Account Fee Waiver Audit
jobs.description: Checks fee-waiver approvals on customer deposit accounts and flags waivers above a dollar threshold or past their approved expiration date without a recorded re-approval. Use this if a teller or branch manager's fee waiver has ever kept quietly renewing itself past its approved window — distinct from bank-fee-anomaly-check.yaml (finance category), which looks for unusual fees a company itself is paying, not waivers the bank granted to its own depositors.

jobs.name: Depreciation Schedule Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the fixed-asset depreciation schedule's expected expense for the period against what was actually recorded in the general ledger, and flags any assets where the two don't match. Use this if fixed assets are tracked in a separate schedule from the GL and you want to catch a missed, duplicated, or miscalculated depreciation entry before it throws off the close.

jobs.name: Design Proposal Site Visit Scheduling Check
jobs.description: Checks your design-proposal lead list for site walk-through requests that haven't been scheduled within your SLA window and flags them. Use this if a landscape design lead has ever gone cold because nobody scheduled the initial site visit before the prospect called a competitor.

jobs.name: Desk Sharing / Sublease Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews badge-in activity and headcount for dedicated desks and private offices against the number of people actually listed on the membership agreement, to catch teams quietly subletting or sharing seats beyond what their plan allows. Use this if you suspect some members are splitting a desk or office with people who were never added to the contract.

jobs.name: Destination Entry Requirement Change Watch
jobs.description: Checks close to departure whether visa, ETA, or entry-form requirements for your destination have changed since you last looked, since these rules can shift with little notice. Use this if you've ever booked a trip under one set of entry rules only to find out closer to departure that a new visa-waiver form or fee was added.

jobs.name: Destination Vaccination/Health Requirement Check
jobs.description: Reminds you to verify vaccination and health-entry requirements for your destination before you travel. Use this if you've ever booked an international trip and only found out about a required vaccine or health form a week before departure.

jobs.name: Developmental Milestone Screening Due Check
jobs.description: Checks each enrolled child's developmental screening (like an ASQ-3) against its required re-screening interval and flags anyone due or overdue. Use this if a child has ever gone well past the interval between screenings because nobody was tracking the schedule separately from the child's regular file.

jobs.name: Student Device Checkout Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the list of school-issued devices (Chromebooks, tablets, hotspots) checked out to students against what's actually been returned and flags anything still outstanding past your cutoff. Use this if a device has ever gone missing at year-end because nobody reconciled the checkout list against returns until inventory was already overdue.

jobs.name: Diagnostic Equipment Calibration Check
jobs.description: Tracks calibration due dates for in-house diagnostic equipment (x-ray, in-house lab analyzers, ultrasound) and warns before any lapse. Use this if a lab result has ever been called into question because equipment calibration had quietly lapsed and nobody noticed until an audit.

jobs.name: Diagnostic Scan Tool Software Update Check
jobs.description: Checks each shop diagnostic scan tool's installed software version against its last-known-current version and flags any tool that's overdue for an update. Use this if a tech has ever misdiagnosed a newer model, or missed a module reflash, because the scan tool's software was months out of date.

jobs.name: Diaper Change Log Frequency Check
jobs.description: Checks each enrolled infant/toddler's most recent logged diaper change against a maximum allowed gap and flags anyone overdue during operating hours. Use this if a child has ever gone far longer than expected between logged changes because a busy room meant the log — and possibly the check itself — got missed.

jobs.name: DID/Phone Number Inventory Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks your pool of unassigned DIDs (direct inward dial numbers) per rate center or area code and warns when the available count is running low. Use this if a sales order has ever stalled because there were no numbers left to assign in the customer's requested area code.

jobs.name: Dietary Restriction Menu Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares the planned meal-service menu against each resident's logged dietary restrictions and allergies, and flags any resident whose planned meal appears to conflict with their file before it goes out to the dining room. Use this if a resident has ever been served a dish that clashed with a documented allergy or diet order because the kitchen menu and the care file were never cross-checked.

jobs.name: DIR Fee Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares a PBM's direct and indirect remuneration (DIR) fee assessments against the claims they're supposedly clawing back against, and flags any DIR fee with no matching claim on file or one that exceeds your expected per-claim cap. Use this if a DIR fee statement has ever landed and gotten filed away unchecked because reconstructing which claims it actually ties to felt like too much work.

jobs.name: Direct-Bill vs Agency-Bill Premium Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares each policy's billing method on file (carrier direct-bill vs. agency-bill) against how the premium was actually collected and flags mismatches, such as a direct-bill policy the agency mistakenly collected premium for, or an agency-bill policy the carrier billed the client directly. Use this if a client has ever been billed twice for the same premium, or not billed at all, because the billing method on file didn't match reality.

jobs.name: Discharge Medication Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Flags discharged patients whose medication list wasn't reconciled (reviewed for duplicates, discontinued meds, and dosage conflicts against their pre-admission list) before discharge. Use this if a patient has ever left with a discharge med list that still included a medication that should've been stopped in-house — distinct from prescription-refill-request-backlog-check.yaml, which tracks pending refill requests, not the discharge reconciliation step itself.

jobs.name: Discord Community Mod Queue Digest
jobs.description: Summarizes flagged messages, mod-bot actions, and open reports in your game's Discord server since the last check, so moderators start their shift with a prioritized list instead of scrolling channel history. Use this if a raid, a flame war, or a scam-link wave has ever been well underway before a moderator happened to notice.

jobs.name: Discount Approval Pending Check
jobs.description: Flags deals with a discount above your standard threshold that are still waiting on manager approval, especially ones that have been sitting for a while. Use this if a rep has ever quoted a customer a deep discount and the deal stalled for days waiting on an approval nobody knew was pending.

jobs.name: Disk Space Check
jobs.description: Checks how full a disk/volume is and warns you before it fills up. Use this if you've ever had a server or laptop grind to a halt because disk usage crept up unnoticed.

jobs.name: Dispatch Route Fuel Cost Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares each long-haul route's estimated fuel cost against its actual fuel spend and flags routes drifting past a set percentage over estimate, then explains the likely causes. Use this if a cross-country dispatch has ever come in way over its fuel budget and nobody could say afterward whether it was detours, idling, or just bad routing.

jobs.name: Distributed Generation Interconnection Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks the interconnection-application queue for distributed generation (rooftop solar, storage, small wind) requests that have sat in a review stage longer than the target turnaround time, and lists them oldest first. Use this if a solar installer or customer has ever complained that an interconnection application vanished into a backlog with no visible movement.

jobs.name: Distributor Return Rate Spike Check
jobs.description: Flags titles whose unsold-copy return rate from a distributor or wholesaler has spiked above a threshold this period, which can signal a demand miscalculation, a bad print run, or a shelving problem. Use this if a spike in returns has ever gone unnoticed until the reconciled royalty statement showed a much smaller net sale than expected.

jobs.name: Dividend Payment Tracker
jobs.description: Checks that an expected dividend payment actually landed by its scheduled pay date. Use this if a dividend has ever quietly not shown up and it took weeks to notice something was wrong with a holding or broker.

jobs.name: DNS Email Authentication Record Check
jobs.description: Checks that your domain has valid SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records published and flags any that are missing or not enforcing a policy. Use this if you've ever had a spoofed email pretending to be from your domain land in a customer's inbox because one of these records was never set up or quietly disappeared during a DNS migration.

jobs.name: DNS Propagation Check
jobs.description: Looks up a DNS record from several public resolvers around the internet and flags it if they don't all agree on the same value, which usually means the change is still propagating. Use this if you've ever made a DNS change and needed to know whether it's safe to tell people "it's live everywhere" yet, instead of guessing.

jobs.name: DNS Record Drift Check
jobs.description: Checks that a DNS record still resolves to the value you expect, and flags drift. Use this if you've ever had DNS quietly change (an expired record, a misconfigured provider) and only found out when something broke.

jobs.name: DNS Zone / Nameserver Health Check
jobs.description: Checks that every authoritative nameserver for a customer-facing zone actually resolves the zone's SOA record and that the serial numbers agree across all of them. Use this if a zone has ever gone half-stale because one authoritative nameserver silently fell behind on a zone transfer while the others kept serving fine.

jobs.name: Loading Dock Schedule Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's dock appointments for double-bookings or gaps too tight to actually unload a truck in. Use this if two carriers have ever shown up for the same dock door at the same time because scheduling was done in a shared spreadsheet nobody cross-checked.

jobs.name: Docker Image & Container Prune
jobs.description: Cleans up stopped containers and dangling Docker images so they don't quietly eat your disk. Use this if you run Docker locally or on a server and never remember to clean up after yourself.

jobs.name: State DOI Regulatory Filing Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Warns before a state Department of Insurance filing deadline (rate filings, annual statements, market conduct reports) so nothing gets submitted late. Use this if a regulatory filing has ever gone out late because the deadline lived only in one compliance person's memory.

jobs.name: Domain Registration & DNSSEC Check
jobs.description: Checks a core domain's registration expiry date and whether DNSSEC is enabled, and flags either a soon-to-lapse registration or a missing DS record. Use this if you want an early warning against domain hijacking — a lapsed registration or a domain with no DNSSEC chain of trust is exactly what an attacker looks for to take over your domain or spoof your DNS.

jobs.name: Domain Registration Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each domain's registration expiry date via WHOIS and flags any approaching or past expiry. Use this if a domain has ever lapsed and gotten snapped up by a squatter because the auto-renew setting was wrong or the card on file expired — distinct from ssl-cert-expiry-check.yaml, which watches TLS certificate expiry, not the underlying domain name registration itself.

jobs.name: Donation Acknowledgment Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags donations that haven't been thanked yet and are approaching or past your acknowledgment window. Use this if a donor has ever given and waited weeks for a thank-you, or if a gift needing a timely tax-receipt letter almost slipped past the deadline.

jobs.name: Donor Gift Downgrade Check
jobs.description: Flags donors who are still giving but whose most recent gift is significantly smaller than their historical average, a warning sign before they lapse entirely. Use this if a donor has ever quietly downgraded from a major gift to a token one for a couple of cycles before disappearing, and nobody caught the slide while it was still a conversation instead of a loss.

jobs.name: Donor Pledge Installment Overdue Check
jobs.description: Checks a multi-year pledge schedule for installments that are past due and haven't been received. Use this if a multi-year pledge has ever fallen behind on its payment schedule without anyone noticing until the pledge period was almost over.

jobs.name: Major Donor Portfolio Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Reviews your major-donor list against relationship-manager assignments and flags donors who have no one assigned to manage the relationship. Use this if a major donor has ever fallen through the cracks — no proposal in flight, no stewardship contact, nothing — simply because they were never actually assigned to anyone's portfolio after being identified as major-gift capable.

jobs.name: Donor-Restricted Fund Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks donor-restricted gifts (earmarked for a specific purpose or time window, but not a grant) against their spend-by deadline and flags any with an unspent balance as the deadline approaches. Use this if a time-restricted donor gift has ever sat partly unspent past its designated period, creating a compliance question about whether the money has to be returned or released to unrestricted funds.

jobs.name: Dormant Account Flagging Check
jobs.description: Flags customer accounts with no transaction activity past a configurable dormancy threshold, the usual precursor step before escheatment to the state. Use this if your bank or credit union needs a standing list of accounts drifting toward dormant status so outreach can happen before funds have to be escheated — this is bank-internal ops, distinct from the `finance` category's personal/business bookkeeping jobs.

jobs.name: Dormant Account Reactivation Check
jobs.description: Flags accounts that have gone completely silent — no login at all for an extended stretch — regardless of payment status, so they can be routed into a reactivation effort instead of being written off silently. Use this if accounts that stopped logging in months ago only come up again when finance asks why you're still paying to host them.

jobs.name: DOT/MC Operating Authority Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks the moving company's DOT/MC operating authority and required filings (BOC-3 process agent designation, cargo and liability insurance filings, state permits) against their renewal or expiry dates and flags anything lapsing within your warning window. Use this if you've ever worried a truck could get pulled off a long-distance job — or the whole company shut down — because a federal filing quietly lapsed and nobody was watching the renewal date.

jobs.name: DOT Vehicle Annual Inspection Check
jobs.description: Checks each truck and trailer's DOT annual inspection date against today and flags any vehicle whose inspection is expired or due soon. Use this if a truck has ever been dispatched on a long-haul job only for the crew to discover the annual inspection sticker had already lapsed.

jobs.name: Downloads Folder Auto-Organize
jobs.description: Sorts files sitting in your downloads folder into subfolders by type (images, documents, archives, installers), so it doesn't turn into an unsearchable pile. Use this if your downloads folder has ever hit hundreds of files with zero structure.

jobs.name: Data Processing Agreement Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Watches vendor and customer data processing agreements (DPAs) for upcoming renewal or expiry dates and drafts a review checklist so standard contractual clauses, subprocessor lists, and transfer mechanisms get re-checked before signing rather than auto-renewing unread. Use this if a DPA has ever renewed with a stale subprocessor list or an outdated transfer mechanism because nobody reviewed it at renewal time.

jobs.name: Draft Review Queue Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags drafts that have been sitting in "in review" status for too long without being approved, rejected, or bounced back to the writer. Use this if posts have ever gone stale in editorial limbo because a reviewer forgot they were waiting on them.

jobs.name: DRIP Enrollment Audit
jobs.description: Compares your dividend-paying positions against which ones are actually enrolled in a dividend reinvestment plan, and flags mismatches against your intended DRIP list. Use this if you've ever noticed a dividend landed as idle cash instead of reinvesting because DRIP got switched off (or never turned on) after a transfer or account change.

jobs.name: Driver Detention Time Billing Check
jobs.description: Compares logged arrival and departure times at a pickup or delivery stop against the free-time allowance and flags stops that generated billable detention time. Use this if a driver has ever sat waiting at a shipper's dock for hours and the detention charge never made it onto an invoice because nobody added up the minutes.

jobs.name: Driver Drug & Alcohol Testing Schedule Check
jobs.description: Tracks when each safety-sensitive driver last completed a required drug/alcohol test and flags anyone overdue for their next periodic or random-pool test. Use this if a driver's testing record has ever gone stale for a year or more because compliance was only checked when an auditor asked for the file.

jobs.name: Driver Hours-of-Service Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks logged driving hours against the daily hours-of-service limit and flags any driver close to or over it. Use this if a driver has ever run over their legal on-duty hours because nobody was tallying it in real time.

jobs.name: Driver Hours-of-Service Violation Check
jobs.description: Checks each driver's logged hours for the day against the federal hours-of-service driving and on-duty limits and flags anyone at or over the threshold. Use this if a driver has ever been kept on a long-distance run past their legal driving limit because nobody was watching the clock in real time.

jobs.name: Driver License/CDL Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks tracked drivers' license or CDL expiry dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a driver has ever kept driving a fleet vehicle on an expired license because nobody was tracking renewal dates separately from vehicle registration.

jobs.name: Driver Mileage Log Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks whether each driver has submitted their required periodic mileage/trip log and flags anyone overdue. Use this if a mileage reimbursement or IRS business-use log has ever gone unfiled for weeks, making tax records or expense reports incomplete when someone finally asked for them.

jobs.name: Driver MVR Review Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks when each driver's motor vehicle record (MVR) was last pulled and reviewed, and flags drivers overdue for their periodic re-check. Use this if a driver has ever kept racking up points or violations on their record for a year or more before anyone at the company noticed.

jobs.name: Driver Safety Score Monitor
jobs.description: Reviews telematics-derived driver safety scores (harsh braking, hard acceleration, speeding events) and flags drivers trending toward risky behavior. Use this if a driver's habits have ever gone unaddressed until an accident or a spiked insurance premium made it impossible to ignore.

jobs.name: Driveway Sealing Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you it's time to seal-coat an asphalt driveway based on how long it's been since the last sealing. Use this if you've ever watched hairline cracks in your driveway slowly turn into potholes because resealing never had a trigger date attached to it.

jobs.name: Drone Operator Compliance Check
jobs.description: Flags an aerial/drone photography operation whose pilot certificate, drone registration, or drone liability insurance is expired or expiring soon, and separately flags any upcoming drone shoot that hasn't had its airspace authorization checked yet. Use this if you've ever booked a drone shot for a property or event and only remembered the pilot certificate had lapsed the morning of the shoot.

jobs.name: Drought Monitor Severity Alert
jobs.description: Checks the current U.S. Drought Monitor (or equivalent regional drought index) category for your county/region and alerts you when it worsens, so long-term water and planting decisions aren't made on stale information. Use this if you've ever found out your county moved into "extreme drought" weeks after it happened.

jobs.name: Drought Watering Restriction Compliance Check
jobs.description: Looks up the current outdoor watering restriction stage for your service area and compares it against each client's irrigation schedule to flag non-compliant watering days or times, then drafts a client notification for any schedule that needs updating. Use this if a client's irrigation controller has ever kept running on a schedule that violated a drought stage the city announced weeks earlier.

jobs.name: Drug Recall vs. On-Hand Stock Check
jobs.description: Matches a list of recently announced drug recalls against the pharmacy's current inventory export and flags any lot number in stock. Use this if a recalled lot has ever sat on the shelf for days after the recall notice went out simply because no one cross-checked it against inventory.

jobs.name: Drug Screening Result Turnaround Check
jobs.description: Flags candidates whose drug screening was ordered more than a set number of business days ago but still shows no result on file, since a stalled lab result is one of the most common reasons a confirmed start date slips. Use this if a candidate's start date has ever had to be pushed because nobody chased down a pending screening result in time.

jobs.name: Drug Shortage and Backorder Substitution Tracker
jobs.description: Checks the pharmacy's active shortage/backorder list against on-hand inventory and flags any drug that's out of stock with no therapeutic substitution already noted, plus any patient waiting on a fill of a shorted item. Use this if a patient has ever shown up for a refill only to find out at the counter that the drug had been on backorder for days with no substitution plan in place.

jobs.name: Dryer Vent Cleaning Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to clean out your dryer vent and lint duct based on how long it's been since the last cleaning. Use this if you've ever noticed clothes taking longer than usual to dry, which is a fire-risk warning sign, not just an annoyance.

jobs.name: Duplicate Content Check
jobs.description: Fetches text from published pages and compares them pairwise to find near-duplicate or highly-similar content living at different URLs, a common cause of search engines splitting ranking signal across pages instead of boosting one. Use this if you maintain templated pages, syndicated posts, or multiple landing pages and want to catch cannibalization before it quietly drags down rankings.

jobs.name: Duplicate Content Spot Check
jobs.description: Scans a newly submitted article against your archive of previously published pieces for suspiciously long shared word sequences, and flags matches for a human to review. Use this if a submission has ever turned out to be substantially recycled from an older piece (your own archive or someone else's) and only got caught after it published.

jobs.name: Podcast Duplicate Episode Audio Check
jobs.description: Checks a new episode's audio checksum against every previously published episode's checksum before it goes out. Use this if you've ever nearly published (or actually published) the wrong export — the same audio file as an earlier episode — because two similarly-named files got mixed up during upload.

jobs.name: Duplicate Payment Detection
jobs.description: Scans a payments/disbursements log for the same vendor and invoice number (or same vendor/amount/date) paid more than once. Use this if a bill has ever gotten paid twice because it was submitted through two channels or reprocessed after a system hiccup.

jobs.name: Duplicate Product Description Check
jobs.description: Scans your product catalog export for SKUs that share identical, lengthy description text across different products instead of just variants of the same item. Use this if you've ever copy-pasted a manufacturer's boilerplate description across a dozen unrelated SKUs and later wondered why none of them rank in search.

jobs.name: Duplicate Vendor Record Check
jobs.description: Scans the vendor master list for likely duplicate vendor records — same tax ID or a near-identical normalized name — and flags them. Use this if the same vendor has ever ended up entered twice under slightly different names, splitting payment history and enabling accidental double-payment — distinct from duplicate-payment-detection.yaml, which catches a specific invoice paid twice, not duplicate entries in the vendor master data itself.

jobs.name: DUR Alert Override Log Review
jobs.description: Reviews the day's drug utilization review (DUR) alerts that a pharmacist overrode at the point of sale — drug interaction, duplicate therapy, high dose — and checks whether each override has a documented clinical rationale on file. Use this if a DUR override has ever gone out the door with nothing but a keystroke to explain why the alert was cleared, leaving nothing to show if that fill is ever questioned later.

jobs.name: Veterinarian License & DEA Registration Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each veterinarian's state license and DEA registration expiry dates and warns before either lapses. Use this if a vet has ever discovered a lapsed DEA registration only when trying to write a controlled-substance prescription — distinct from license-credential-expiry-check.yaml in healthcare, which tracks general staff credentials rather than the DVM license plus DEA dual-registration requirement specific to prescribing controlled substances for animal patients.

jobs.name: E911 Address Database Accuracy Audit
jobs.description: Uses an agent to compare the current E911/ALI address database export against recent service address changes (new installs, moves, MDU unit additions) and flag subscriber records that look stale or mismatched. Use this if a 911 dispatch has ever gone to the wrong address, or no address at all, because a subscriber's location record was never updated after they moved or a unit number changed.

jobs.name: Earnings Calendar Watch
jobs.description: Checks for upcoming earnings dates on stocks you hold, so a report doesn't catch you off guard. Use this if a holding has ever moved sharply overnight and you only afterward realized earnings had been scheduled for that day.

jobs.name: Economic Nexus Threshold Check
jobs.description: Checks your year-to-date sales revenue and transaction count per state against economic nexus thresholds and flags states you're approaching or have crossed. Use this if you've ever registered for sales tax in a state only after crossing the threshold months earlier, because nobody was tracking cumulative sales by state.

jobs.name: ED/Hospital Discharge Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Checks patients discharged from the emergency department or an inpatient stay for ones who don't have a primary-care or specialist follow-up appointment booked within the recommended window. Use this if a patient has ever bounced back to the ED for something a timely follow-up visit could have caught, because nobody in the practice was tracking who'd been discharged and needed a post-discharge visit scheduled.

jobs.name: E-Discovery Review Batch Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks e-discovery document review batches for ones approaching their review completion deadline and still not marked complete, so a review batch doesn't slip past a production date unnoticed. Use this if a document production has ever been late because a review batch was still sitting untouched days before the deadline.

jobs.name: Editing Backlog Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks shoots that have been shot but not yet culled or edited against an aging threshold, and lists the oldest backlog first. Use this if editing work has ever piled up quietly until a client who shot months ago is still waiting, while more recent shoots kept jumping the queue.

jobs.name: Podcast Editing Turnaround SLA Check
jobs.description: Flags episodes sitting in the editor's queue past your usual turnaround time. Use this if an episode has ever missed its publish date because it was quietly stuck waiting on an edit and nobody followed up with the editor in time.

jobs.name: Editorial Calendar Gap Check
jobs.description: Looks at the scheduled publish dates on your editorial calendar and flags any stretch of days that's longer than expected with nothing scheduled. Use this if your publish cadence has ever quietly gone quiet because everyone assumed someone else had filled the calendar for that week.

jobs.name: EEO-1 Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Counts down to the annual EEO-1 component filing deadline so data collection and submission don't get rushed at the last minute. Use this if the EEO-1 window has ever snuck up because it only comes around once a year and nobody put it on a recurring calendar.

jobs.name: E-Learning Video/Resource Broken Link Check
jobs.description: Checks the video and resource links in your course outline and flags any that no longer load. Use this if a course has ever sat published for months with a dead video link nobody caught until a learner complained.

jobs.name: Election Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks upcoming candidate and petition filing deadlines tracked by an elections office and flags the ones coming up soon. Use this if a filing window has ever closed without your office having sent out the reminders it meant to send to prospective candidates or petitioners.

jobs.name: Email A/B Test Significance Check
jobs.description: Checks a running email subject-line or content A/B test's sample size and results against the math needed for statistical significance, and flags whether the test has reached a confident winner or has been running too long without one. Use this if your team has ever called an email test "the winner" after a few hundred sends when the gap was actually just noise.

jobs.name: Email Deliverability Check
jobs.description: Checks recent bounce and spam-complaint rates for your email sends and flags a spike. Use this if a deliverability problem has ever quietly tanked open rates for a week before anyone checked the actual bounce numbers.

jobs.name: Email List Growth Rate Check
jobs.description: Compares net email list growth (new subscribers minus unsubscribes and bounces) over a recent period against a minimum growth rate, flagging a stalled or shrinking list. Use this if a list has ever been quietly shrinking for months because unsubscribes were outpacing signups and nobody was tracking the net number.

jobs.name: Email Response Time Check
jobs.description: Checks inbox threads awaiting your reply for ones that have sat past a response-time threshold, so you catch them before they go cold. Use this if important threads have ever slipped your mind for so long that replying started to feel awkward.

jobs.name: Embargo Date Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a press or review embargo on a title is set to lift, so announcements, ads, and retail listings can go live right on time — not early, not late. Use this if an embargo has ever been broken by accident (a listing flipped live too soon) or missed (nobody remembered to lift it) because the date only lived in an email from the publicist.

jobs.name: Embassy Registration & Travel Advisory Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you before international trips to register with your home country's traveler safety program (e.g. the US State Department's STEP program) and check the current travel advisory level for your destination. Use this if you've ever needed emergency consular help abroad and realized no one back home even knew which country you were in.

jobs.name: Emergency Contact Information Currency Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since each child's emergency contact information was last verified with the family and flags anyone overdue for a re-confirmation. Use this if a phone number on an emergency card has ever turned out to be disconnected or years stale right when someone actually needed to make the call — distinct from parent-pickup-authorization-verification-check, which tracks who's allowed to pick a child up, not whether the contact numbers on file still work.

jobs.name: Emergency/After-Hours Dispatch Escalation Check
jobs.description: Checks incoming emergency or after-hours service calls (burst pipe, no heat, no power) for ones that haven't been acknowledged by on-call dispatch within your response window, and flags them for escalation. Use this if an after-hours emergency call has ever sat in a queue for an hour while the on-call tech's phone was on silent.

jobs.name: Emergency Preparedness Drill Reminder
jobs.description: Checks the facility's drill log for each shift and flags when the next required fire or emergency-evacuation drill is coming due or is already overdue, based on the required drill cadence. Use this if a required drill has ever been missed or run late because nobody was tracking the schedule across every shift.

jobs.name: Emergency Preparedness Plan Review Tracker
jobs.description: Checks your agency's emergency operations, continuity-of-operations, and hazard mitigation plans against their required periodic review date and flags any that are due or overdue for update. Use this if a plan has ever gone years past its review cycle and only got noticed when a grant application or an actual emergency required a current copy.

jobs.name: Emergency Slot Utilization Check
jobs.description: Tracks how many held same-day emergency appointment slots actually got filled versus went unused over a trailing window, and flags a fill rate below a configurable target. Use this if reserved emergency capacity has ever sat empty on slow days while the schedule stayed rigid on busy ones — distinct from dentist-schedule-utilization-check.yaml, which measures overall chair utilization rather than the reserved emergency-slot carve-out specifically.

jobs.name: Environmental Emissions Permit Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks logged air/water discharge readings against your facility's environmental permit limits and flags any exceedance or approaching permit renewal date. Use this if a discharge reading has ever crept past a permit limit without anyone noticing until the regulator's inspection.

jobs.name: Employee Discount Abuse Check
jobs.description: Reviews employee discount usage for patterns that look like abuse — unusually high dollar volume, discounts applied to gift cards, or discounts rung up under an employee's number when they weren't scheduled to work. Use this if employee-discount abuse has ever quietly eaten margin for months because each transaction looked fine in isolation.

jobs.name: Employee Engagement Survey Action-Item Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews the latest employee engagement/pulse survey results and checks whether the follow-up action items assigned to low-scoring drivers are still open past their target date. Use this if a survey has ever produced a great readout deck that nobody looked at again three months later.

jobs.name: Employee Food Handler Certification Tracker
jobs.description: Checks each individual employee's food handler certification expiry date and flags anyone whose card is expired or about to expire. Use this if you've ever found out an employee's certification lapsed only during a health inspection, distinct from tracking the business-level permit itself.

jobs.name: Employee Handbook Acknowledgment Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks which employees still haven't signed off on the current version of the employee handbook past its rollout deadline, so a missing acknowledgment doesn't surface as a gap only during a dispute or audit. Use this if you've ever needed to prove an employee acknowledged a policy and found the record was missing.

jobs.name: Employee Shift Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks the upcoming schedule for unfilled shifts and flags them while there's still time to find coverage. Use this if a shift has ever gone unfilled and nobody noticed until the store was short-staffed that morning.

jobs.name: Government Employee Mandatory Training Compliance Tracker
jobs.description: Checks municipal/county employees' required training completions (ethics, harassment prevention, cybersecurity, etc.) against their due dates and flags anyone overdue. Use this if compliance training has ever gone unmet past its deadline with no one tracking it centrally until an audit asked.

jobs.name: Employer Match Capture Check
jobs.description: Checks that your current 401(k) contribution percentage is at least what's needed to capture your full employer match. Use this if you've ever dropped your contribution rate temporarily and forgot to bump it back up, quietly leaving free match money on the table.

jobs.name: Employer Review Site Monitor
jobs.description: Checks your employer review site profiles (like Glassdoor or Indeed company reviews) for new reviews or a rating change and flags a negative review or a rating drop worth a response. Use this if a critical employer review has ever sat unanswered for months because nobody outside comms was checking the reviews page, and it kept showing up in candidates' pre-interview research.

jobs.name: Empty-Mile (Deadhead) Percentage Watch
jobs.description: Compares each unit's empty/deadhead miles against its loaded miles and flags anything running an unusually high empty-mile percentage. Use this if a truck or lane has ever quietly bled money running empty between loads and nobody noticed until the fuel and cost-per-mile numbers came in bad for the whole quarter.

jobs.name: End-of-Day Shutdown Checklist
jobs.description: Pulls together what you actually got done today, today's unfinished tasks, tomorrow's first meeting, and any unread high-priority messages into a short end-of-day wrap-up so you close out with a clear head instead of work bleeding into the evening. Use this if you tend to keep half-checking things after hours because you never gave the day a deliberate close, or close your laptop without a clear sense of what actually happened.

jobs.name: End-of-Life Aftercare Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews recent euthanasia cases and checks whether the expected aftercare steps — sympathy acknowledgment, cremation/ashes return status, final invoice closure — have actually happened, then drafts any outreach that's missing. Use this if a grieving client has ever been left wondering whether their pet's ashes were ready, or never received any acknowledgment from the clinic, because aftercare follow-up wasn't tracked anywhere once the appointment ended.

jobs.name: End of Week Retro Reminder
jobs.description: Sends a Friday-afternoon reminder to do a short personal weekly retrospective covering what worked, what didn't, and what's next. Use this if weeks tend to blur together without you ever pausing to notice patterns worth repeating or avoiding.

jobs.name: Endcap Display Refresh Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares each promotional endcap or feature display against the merchandising calendar's required refresh schedule and flags any display that is overdue for its next reset. Use this if you run rotating promotional displays on a calendar cadence and want to catch a store that never took down last month's promo, rather than waiting for a store visit to notice it.

jobs.name: Policy Endorsement Request Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks requested policy endorsements or amendments (e.g. adding a driver, changing coverage limits) that haven't been confirmed processed within a set window and flags them for follow-up. Use this if you've ever submitted a change request to a carrier and only found out months later it was never actually applied.

jobs.name: Endowment Spending Policy Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares the amount drawn from an endowment fund this year against your board-approved spending policy rate (a percentage of fund value) and flags a draw that's running over. Use this if an endowment has ever been drawn down faster than its own spending policy allows, eroding the principal the fund was meant to protect in perpetuity, before anyone compared the actual withdrawal to the approved rate.

jobs.name: Endpoint Disk Encryption Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks the laptop and endpoint device inventory for machines whose disk encryption (e.g. FileVault or BitLocker) is missing or disabled, then flags every non-compliant device. Use this if you want to catch unencrypted laptops before one gets lost or stolen and turns into a data breach and compliance incident.

jobs.name: Energy Assistance Program Enrollment Deadline Reminder
