jobs.description: Checks the mail and package log for member mail or deliveries that have been sitting uncollected at the front desk past a set number of days. Use this if you want a simple reminder list so staff can nudge members before the mail room shelf turns into permanent overflow.

jobs.name: Maintenance Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks recurring service/maintenance contracts (annual HVAC tune-ups, quarterly plumbing inspections) against their renewal date and flags any coming up so the customer can be rebooked before the contract lapses. Use this if a maintenance customer has ever silently churned because nobody called to renew before the term ran out.

jobs.name: Recurring Maintenance Plan Renewal Upsell Tracker
jobs.description: Finds customers whose recurring maintenance plan (annual tune-up, seasonal inspection membership) is expiring soon and drafts a renewal or upgrade outreach message for each. Use this if maintenance plans have ever silently lapsed at renewal time because nobody proactively reached out before the coverage ran out.

jobs.name: Maintenance Request SLA Check
jobs.description: Scans open tenant maintenance requests and flags any that have blown past your response or resolution SLA. Use this if a leaky faucet or broken heater has ever sat unaddressed for weeks because the request got logged and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Maintenance Window Customer Notification Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming planned network maintenance windows and flags any that are inside your required customer-notice lead time but haven't been marked as notified yet. Use this if a maintenance window has ever gone out with too little warning and customers found out only when their service dropped.

jobs.name: Major Donor Proposal Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Tracks major-gift proposals that have been sent and flags any with no recorded response after a set number of days, drafting a follow-up. Use this if a major donor proposal has ever gone quiet for months because nobody had a system for chasing a response.

jobs.name: Manufacturer Recall Notice Check
jobs.description: Cross-references newly issued manufacturer recall notices against vehicles in service history and current inventory, flagging any match that hasn't been contacted or scheduled yet. Use this if a customer has ever found out about a safety recall on their own before the shop that services their car did.

jobs.name: Manuscript Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Flags manuscript milestones (first draft, revisions, final delivery) coming due from authors or editors. Use this if a book has ever slipped its production schedule because a manuscript deadline only lived in an email thread nobody rechecked.

jobs.name: Manuscript Style Guide Compliance Scan
jobs.description: Reads a manuscript in editing and checks it against your house style guide for consistency issues (terminology, capitalization, number formatting, citation style) that a mechanical find-and-replace can't reliably catch. Use this if manuscripts have ever gone to copyedit with style inconsistencies that should have been caught earlier and cost extra copyedit rounds to fix.

jobs.name: MAP Violation Watch
jobs.description: Fetches each tracked reseller's product page and checks whether they're listing your product below your minimum advertised price (MAP), then drafts a factual notice for any violation found. Use this if an authorized reseller has ever quietly undercut your MAP policy for months before a competitor or another reseller complained about it.

jobs.name: Markdown Execution Audit Check
jobs.description: Confirms that approved markdowns were actually applied at the register, not just flagged as candidates. Use this if a markdown has ever been approved on paper but never keyed into the POS, so the item kept ringing at full price for weeks while it sat on the clearance rack.

jobs.name: Marketing Automation Workflow Error Check
jobs.description: Checks the marketing automation platform's workflow and journey execution logs for failed steps and stuck contacts, then flags any workflow whose error rate is rising. Use this if an automated nurture or onboarding journey has ever silently broken and stopped moving contacts along because nobody was watching the execution logs.

jobs.name: Marketing Qualified Account Engagement Check
jobs.description: Checks the engagement scores of target accounts in an account-based marketing (ABM) program and flags any account whose score is trending down over the recent window. Use this if you run ABM and want to catch a target account going quiet before it goes fully cold, instead of finding out at the next quarterly business review.

jobs.name: Marketplace Account Health & Policy Risk Watch
jobs.description: Checks your marketplace seller account's health metrics and any open policy or IP complaints against that marketplace's suspension thresholds, and flags what's actually at risk this week. Use this if a seller account has ever gotten suspended and the warning signs — a climbing defect rate, an unanswered complaint — had been sitting in the account health dashboard for weeks first.

jobs.name: Marketplace Listing Sync Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares price and stock on your source-of-truth catalog against what's actually live on a marketplace (Amazon, eBay, Etsy) and flags any SKU that's drifted out of sync. Use this if a marketplace listing has ever shown a stale price or "in stock" on an item you'd already sold out of on your own store, because the sync job silently failed.

jobs.name: Podcast Master Audio Backup Verification Check
jobs.description: Confirms every episode's master audio file has a matching, checksum-equal backup copy. Use this if you've ever lost (or nearly lost) an unreleased or unedited master file because the only copy lived on one laptop and nobody had verified the backup was actually current.

jobs.name: Matching Gift Claim Backlog Check
jobs.description: Reports the total number and dollar value of employer matching-gift claims that still haven't been submitted, bucketed by how long they've sat unfiled, regardless of any single company's deadline. Use this if your matching-gift pipeline has ever quietly grown into a pile of unfiled paperwork because everyone was watching individual deadlines and nobody stepped back to see the backlog as a whole.

jobs.name: Matching Gift Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks pledged employer matching gifts against each company's own submission deadline and flags ones about to expire unclaimed. Use this if a donor's employer match has ever gone unclaimed because nobody tracked the separate deadline for submitting the match request.

jobs.name: Matchmaking Queue Health Check
jobs.description: Pings your game's matchmaking service health endpoint and flags it if it's down or responding too slowly. Use this if players have ever sat in a matchmaking queue for minutes before anyone on the team noticed a region's matchmaker had quietly stalled.

jobs.name: Material Delivery Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks ordered construction materials against their expected delivery date and flags anything overdue from the supplier. Use this if a crew has ever stood idle on site because a material delivery was quietly late and nobody chased it up.

jobs.name: Meal Benefit New Application Processing Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks newly submitted free/reduced meal benefit applications against how long they've been waiting for a determination and flags any past your target processing window. Use this if a family has ever gone weeks without a meal-benefit decision because new applications piled up behind other cafeteria-office work.

jobs.name: Weekly Meal Plan Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to plan the week's meals, and can draft a simple 7-day plan plus grocery list for you. Use this if you dread the "what's for dinner" question every night and want to decide once a week instead.

jobs.name: Media Buy Pacing Check
jobs.description: For each active media flight, compares the percentage of the flight's calendar duration that has elapsed against the percentage of the client's approved budget spent so far, and flags any campaign pacing meaningfully ahead or behind plan mid-flight. Use this if a campaign has ever blown through half its budget in the first week, or sat barely spending with ten days left, and nobody caught it until the flight was already over. Distinct from media-buy-reconciliation-check, which compares planned spend against what the platform actually billed after the fact — this one watches an in-flight campaign's pace against the calendar, not the final invoice.

jobs.name: Media Buy Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the media spend an agency planned for a client against what the ad platform or vendor actually billed, and flags any campaign where the two don't line up. Use this if you've ever sent a client an invoice based on the media plan and only later found out the platform charged a different amount.

jobs.name: Medicaid Recertification Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks residents whose care is covered by Medicaid for eligibility recertification deadlines coming up soon. Use this if you want to make sure the recertification paperwork gets filed in time so a resident's coverage never lapses because a deadline was missed.

jobs.name: Medical Equipment Calibration Check
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of medical equipment (blood pressure cuffs, glucometers, defibrillators, scales) against calibration due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a piece of equipment has ever been found overdue for calibration only when an inspector or auditor flagged it.

jobs.name: Medication Administration Log Check
jobs.description: Checks today's list of children with a scheduled medication (daily prescriptions, inhalers, etc.) against the administration log and flags any dose that's due but not yet logged as given. Use this if a scheduled dose has ever been missed simply because it slipped everyone's mind during a busy stretch of the day.

jobs.name: Medication Administration Record Gap Check
jobs.description: Scans the medication administration record (MAR) log for scheduled doses that have no matching administration entry logged, which usually means a dose was missed or a caregiver forgot to document giving it. Use this if you want a daily heads-up on gaps before they turn into a missed-dose incident or a compliance finding during survey.

jobs.name: Medication Inventory Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans the clinic's drug and vaccine inventory log for items expiring soon so they can be used, returned, or discarded before they go bad. Use this if expired medication has ever turned up still on the shelf during an audit.

jobs.name: Medication Refill Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to refill a medication before you run out, based on how many days of supply you have left. Use this if you've ever run out of a prescription over a weekend when the pharmacy's closed.

jobs.name: Medication Therapy Management Outreach Drafter
jobs.description: Reads the list of patients due for a Medication Therapy Management (MTM) review this month and drafts a short, plain-language outreach message for each, explaining why a review is being offered. Use this if MTM-eligible patients have ever gone un-contacted because drafting individual outreach took longer than anyone had time for.

jobs.name: Meeting Cost Estimator
jobs.description: Checks your calendar export for recurring meetings, multiplies attendee count by duration and an hourly rate to estimate their weekly dollar cost, and flags the most expensive ones. Use this if standing meetings keep getting added but nobody ever tallies what they actually cost in people-hours.

jobs.name: Meeting-Free Day Protection Check
jobs.description: Scans a designated no-meeting day (like "no-meeting Wednesdays") on your calendar export for any meetings that got booked on it anyway and flags the violation. Use this if you've set a protected focus day but keep finding it quietly filled with meetings nobody double-checked against the rule.

jobs.name: Meeting Minutes Publication Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since a public meeting happened and flags it if the minutes still haven't been published past your sunshine-law window. Use this if approved minutes have ever gone up online weeks late because drafting and posting them fell to the bottom of someone's list after the meeting itself was handled.

jobs.name: Meeting Prep Doc Missing Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming meetings on your calendar export for ones lacking a linked agenda or prep doc, and flags them so organizers can add one. Use this if meetings routinely start without anyone having written down what they're actually for.

jobs.name: Meeting Room Double-Booking Check
jobs.description: Scans meeting and conference room reservations for two bookings on the same room with overlapping times. Use this if a team has ever walked into a meeting room mid-call because someone else's booking overlapped theirs and nobody caught it beforehand.

jobs.name: Member Access Card Deactivation Check
jobs.description: Cross-references cancelled or expired memberships against the active key-fob and access-card list and flags any card that's still enabled for someone who shouldn't have access anymore. Use this if a cancelled member has ever kept badging into the gym for weeks after their membership ended because deactivating the fob wasn't part of the cancellation checklist.

jobs.name: Member Attendance Drop-off Check
jobs.description: Compares each active member's visit count over a recent window against their prior baseline and flags anyone whose attendance has quietly fallen off a cliff. Use this if a member has ever cancelled out of the blue when a steep drop in check-ins weeks earlier would've been the moment to reach out.

jobs.name: Member Business Insurance Certificate Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks certificates of insurance (COIs) on file for member businesses against your lease or license agreement's required coverage, and flags ones that have already expired or are expiring soon. Use this if your space requires members to carry liability insurance and you don't want to discover a lapsed COI only after an incident happens.

jobs.name: Member Churn Notice Followup Check
jobs.description: Checks membership cancellation notices logged in the last period for ones that haven't had a retention or exit-interview conversation yet, so a member who's already decided to leave doesn't also leave without anyone finding out why. Use this if you want to make sure every cancellation gets a follow-up call or email before the notice period runs out.

jobs.name: Member Goal Progress Milestone Celebration Nudge
jobs.description: Reviews members' tracked progress toward their stated goals (weight, strength benchmarks, class-attendance streaks) and drafts a short celebration message for anyone who's just crossed a meaningful milestone. Use this if a member has ever hit a real milestone — a strength PR, a goal weight, a 20-class streak — and nobody at the gym acknowledged it because there was no process for noticing.

jobs.name: Member Invoice Failed Payment Check
jobs.description: Checks recurring membership dues and autopay charges for ones that failed to go through, so a lapsed card or expired payment method doesn't silently turn into a member losing access. Use this if you want a daily heads-up on who needs a payment retry or a manual follow-up before their membership status is affected.

jobs.name: Member Referral Bonus Payout Check
jobs.description: Checks approved member referrals where the referred person has completed their qualifying period (e.g. first paid month) but the referring member's bonus or credit hasn't been paid out yet. Use this if your referral program has ever quietly lost trust because a member referred a friend and never got the credit they were promised.

jobs.name: Member Satisfaction Survey Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Looks at recent member satisfaction or NPS survey responses and flags detractors or low scorers who haven't had any follow-up contact logged yet. Use this if surveys have ever gone out and the low scores just sat in a spreadsheet with nobody circling back to the unhappy members.

jobs.name: Member Survey NPS Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Reads recent member satisfaction survey scores and drafts a personal follow-up for anyone who left a detractor score, plus a short win-back or thank-you note for promoters willing to leave a review. Use this if a member has ever left a low satisfaction score and the survey just sat in a spreadsheet with no one ever circling back to find out what went wrong.

jobs.name: Membership Freeze/Hold Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks paused or frozen memberships against their scheduled resume date and flags the ones ending soon, so billing and access resume as expected instead of surprising the member. Use this if a member has ever been charged full price the moment their freeze ended with zero warning, or kept frozen past when they meant to come back.

jobs.name: Membership Plan Downgrade Risk Check
jobs.description: Looks at how often members are checking in and how many desk hours they're actually using compared to what their membership plan tier includes, then flags anyone using well below what they're paying for. Use this if a member has ever cancelled out of nowhere when a steady drop in check-ins for weeks beforehand would have been the moment to reach out.

jobs.name: Membership Tier Fulfillment Check
jobs.description: Checks that each paid membership tier's promised perk (exclusive post, Discord shoutout, mailed reward, etc.) actually went out this cycle. Use this if a Patreon or channel-membership tier has ever quietly not delivered its perk for a month before a member called it out.

jobs.name: Membership/Package Unused-Session Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags members or package holders whose prepaid sessions or membership credits are about to expire unused. Use this if a client has ever paid for a monthly facial membership, banked three unused visits, and let them evaporate because nobody reminded them to book.

jobs.name: Memory Care Wander Alarm Test Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds memory-care unit staff that the required periodic functional test of the wander-management door alarm system is due, based on the last recorded test date. Use this if you've ever discovered during an actual exit-seeking event that the door alarm wasn't actually working because routine testing quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Mentor 1:1 Follow-up Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to follow up on action items from your last mentor or mentee 1:1 if too much time has passed since the meeting. Use this if you've ever left a mentoring conversation with good advice and then never actually acted on it.

jobs.name: Mentor/Mentee Check-in Cadence Tracker
jobs.description: Checks every active mentorship pairing's last check-in date against a shared cadence and flags pairs that have gone quiet. Use this if your mentorship program has ever had pairs "matched" at kickoff and then never actually met again, because nobody but the two people involved would have any way of knowing.

jobs.name: Menu Item 86 Frequency Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews how often each menu item gets 86'd (marked sold out) mid- service and flags items that run out repeatedly, which usually points to a par-level or ordering problem rather than one bad night. Use this if the same dish has ever been 86'd three Fridays in a row before anyone connected the dots.

jobs.name: Menu Item Profitability Check
jobs.description: Compares each menu item's plate cost against its menu price and flags items whose contribution margin has dropped below target. Use this if an ingredient cost has ever crept up on a specific dish until it was quietly losing money on every order, unlike the overall food-cost percentage which only shows the average.

jobs.name: Merch Inventory Sync Check
jobs.description: Checks merch stock levels against recent sales pace and flags anything about to sell out or that's been dead stock for months. Use this if a best-selling shirt has ever gone out of stock mid-launch because nobody was watching the count, or slow movers have quietly tied up cash.

jobs.name: Meta Description Length Check
jobs.description: Fetches pages from your sitemap and flags any meta description that's missing, empty, or outside the length search engines typically display without truncating. Use this if you've ever shipped a page with no meta description at all, or one so long it gets cut off with "..." in results.

jobs.name: Meter Reading Route Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks whether today's scheduled meter-reading routes were actually completed by field crews or automated meter-reading equipment, versus falling back to an estimated read. Use this if estimated bills (and the customer complaints that follow) keep slipping through because a route quietly went unfinished.

jobs.name: Material Handling Equipment Preventive Maintenance Check
jobs.description: Checks scheduled preventive maintenance due dates for material handling equipment other than forklifts — pallet jacks, order pickers, conveyor drive units — and flags anything overdue. Use this if a piece of MHE has ever broken down mid-shift for a service item that was actually due weeks earlier and nobody was tracking anything but the forklifts.

jobs.name: Microchip Registration Verification Check
jobs.description: Reviews recently implanted microchips and checks whether the chip was actually registered with the manufacturer's database under the owner's current contact info. Use this if a lost pet has ever been scanned at a shelter, chip found, but the registry came back with no owner info or an outdated phone number — the chip is only useful if the registration behind it is current.

jobs.name: Microwave Backhaul Weather-Fade Risk Check
jobs.description: Uses an agent to cross-reference microwave backhaul link margins with an upcoming weather forecast and flag links at elevated risk of rain or fog fade over the next few days. Use this if a microwave link has ever dropped during a storm that was forecast days in advance, when a heads-up could have let ops pre-stage a failover to a redundant path.

jobs.name: Mid-Term Endorsement Premium Audit
jobs.description: Checks processed mid-term policy endorsements (a driver added, a limit raised, a location removed) against the premium adjustment the carrier actually charged or refunded, and flags any that look off relative to the change requested. Use this if an endorsement has ever come back processed with a premium change that didn't match what the change itself should have cost, and nobody double-checked before invoicing the client.

jobs.name: Minibar Charge Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares housekeeping's logged minibar restocks against folio charges posted for the same room and flags mismatches. Use this if a restocked minibar has ever gone uncharged, or a guest was charged for an item housekeeping never actually replaced.

jobs.name: Missed Clean Reschedule Tracker
jobs.description: Checks recently skipped or cancelled cleaning appointments and flags any that still haven't been rebooked within your target window. Use this if a missed clean has ever quietly fallen through the cracks and turned into a client complaint or a cancelled contract instead of a quick reschedule.

jobs.name: Missed Hygiene Reappointment Check
jobs.description: Checks recently completed hygiene visits against the future schedule and flags any patient who left without a next hygiene appointment booked at all. Use this if a patient has ever walked out after a cleaning with nothing on the books because checkout got busy and nobody rebooked them — this catches the "never rebooked" gap right after checkout, distinct from a recall-cadence job that flags patients who are already overdue by date for their next cleaning.

jobs.name: Mobile Data Roaming Overage Watch
jobs.description: Warns you daily during a trip if your logged mobile data usage is tracking toward blowing through your roaming plan or eSIM data cap. Use this if you've ever come home to a surprise $200 roaming charge because you didn't notice your data plan ran out on day three.

jobs.name: Mobile/House-Call Vet Route Scheduling Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans tomorrow's house-call schedule for any veterinarian booked onto two visits that overlap, or booked back-to-back with too little drive time between addresses. Use this if a mobile vet has ever shown up late to a house call (or had to rush an exam) because the schedule quietly double-booked them or left no travel buffer between stops.

jobs.name: Community Moderator Shift Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks your upcoming moderator shift schedule for streams or peak posting hours against the minimum mods you need on duty, and flags any shift that's short-staffed. Use this if a stream has ever gone live with only one mod on duty during a raid or a comment brigade because nobody double-checked the sign-up sheet beforehand.

jobs.name: Mod/Workshop Submission Review Queue Check
jobs.description: Checks how long mod or user-generated-content submissions have been sitting unreviewed in your workshop/marketplace queue and flags the oldest ones. Use this if a modder has ever given up on your platform because their submission sat in review limbo for weeks with no response.

jobs.name: Model Release Missing Check
jobs.description: Checks completed shoots against signed model or property release records and flags any shoot that's missing a release on file. Use this if you've ever wanted to use a photo commercially (portfolio, ads, stock, a website redesign) and then realized nobody ever got the subject or property owner to sign off on that use.

jobs.name: Monetization Conversion Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks the conversion rate from free player to paying player (or store visit to purchase) and flags a meaningful drop. Use this if a store UI change or a pricing tweak has ever quietly tanked purchases for a week before anyone checked the revenue dashboard.

jobs.name: Month-End Close Checklist Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks a list of month-end financial close tasks (reconcile bank, post accruals, review AR/AP, close subledgers, etc.) and flags incomplete items as the close deadline approaches. Use this if your monthly close has ever slipped a step because nobody had a single place tracking whether every task actually got done.

jobs.name: MOOC Assignment Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a list of upcoming online-course assignment/quiz deadlines and flags any coming up soon. Use this if you're taking a Coursera/edX/ Udacity-style course with graded deadlines and have missed one because the platform's own email reminder got buried.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing Digest
jobs.description: Pulls together overnight email, today's calendar, and any connected analytics/monitoring dashboards into one short digest waiting for you at the start of the day. Use this if you start your morning tab-hopping across five dashboards before you've even had coffee.

jobs.name: Mortgage Escrow Analysis Schedule Check
jobs.description: Flags mortgage loan accounts that are due for their required annual escrow analysis and disclosure but haven't had one run within the required window. Use this if an escrow analysis has ever been late, risking a compliance gap on the required annual disclosure to the borrower — distinct from reg-dd-disclosure-accuracy-audit, which checks deposit account rate disclosures, not escrow analyses on loan accounts.

jobs.name: Mortgage Loan Covenant Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares each property's current debt-service coverage ratio (DSCR) against the minimum required by its loan covenant and flags any property that has fallen below threshold. Use this if you've ever found out about a covenant breach only when the lender's servicer called, instead of catching it from your own numbers first.

jobs.name: Move-In/Move-Out Inspection Checklist Tracker
jobs.description: Flags move-ins and move-outs where the condition inspection checklist hasn't been completed within a set number of days of the move date. Use this if a deposit dispute has ever fallen apart because there was no signed move-in or move-out condition report to point to.

jobs.name: Move-Out Inspection Backlog Check
jobs.description: Looks at units tenants have recently reported as moved out of and flags the ones still waiting on a final walkthrough to confirm the unit's condition and settle any deposit. Use this if you want to catch a growing backlog of unfinished move-out inspections before it turns into disputed deposit refunds or a unit re-rented without anyone checking it was actually empty and undamaged.

jobs.name: Moving Crew Background Check Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks each crew member's background check against your renewal interval and flags anyone whose check is overdue or expiring soon, since many corporate relocation and household moving clients require a current background check before letting a crew into a customer's home. Use this if a crew has ever been assigned to an in-home move only to find out the background check on file was too old to satisfy the client's requirement.

jobs.name: Moving Crew Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each moving crew member's required certifications, like specialty piano/antique-handling certs or warehouse forklift cards, against their expiry dates and flags anyone lapsing soon. Use this if a crew has ever been assigned to a specialty-item move or a warehouse shift only to find out on-site that the certification covering that job had already expired.

jobs.name: Moving Crew Overtime Hours Check
jobs.description: Totals each moving crew member's logged hours for the week and flags anyone approaching or over your overtime threshold. Use this if payroll surprises or crew burnout have ever snuck up on you because overtime only got noticed once the payroll run came back higher than expected, especially during a heavy moving season.

jobs.name: Moving Customer Satisfaction Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews post-move customer satisfaction survey responses, flags any score below your quality bar, and drafts a personal follow-up message for each unhappy customer. Use this if a bad move (broken item, late crew, surprise charge) has ever gone unaddressed until the customer left a public review instead of giving you a chance to make it right.

jobs.name: Moving Day Weather Risk Check
jobs.description: Pulls the forecast for each upcoming move's origin and destination zip codes and drafts a heads-up for any move at risk from severe weather in the days before the truck rolls. Use this if a crew has ever arrived at a move only to get caught off guard by a storm, heat advisory, or road closure that could have been flagged days earlier.

jobs.name: Moving Estimate vs Actual Weight Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares a shipment's binding/non-binding estimated weight to the actual scale weight and flags large variances. Use this if a customer has ever been blindsided by a final bill much higher than the estimate because nobody flagged the weight gap before delivery.

jobs.name: Completed Move Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks invoices for completed moves against an aging threshold and flags any that are still unpaid past the number of days you set. Use this if a move has ever wrapped up fine but the final invoice quietly went unpaid for weeks because nobody was tracking it after the truck left.

jobs.name: Moving Off-Season Promo Reminder
jobs.description: Flags past customers who haven't moved again or referred anyone in over a set number of months and drafts a promo outreach message offering an off-peak discount during the slow season. Use this if trucks and crews have ever sat underbooked in the off-season because past customers were never reminded you're still around and offering a deal.

jobs.name: Moving Referral Partner Commission Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks commissions owed to referral partners, like realtors and relocation companies, for each completed move and flags any that are still unpaid past the agreed payment terms. Use this if a referral partner has ever had to chase you to find out why a commission from a move weeks ago still hadn't shown up.

jobs.name: Moving Truck Fleet Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Checks the facility's rental moving truck fleet against mileage- and date-based maintenance schedules and flags any truck that's due or overdue for service. Use this if your facility rents out moving trucks or vans to customers and needs to keep them roadworthy and out of an unplanned breakdown mid-rental.

jobs.name: Mower/Trimmer Equipment Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Checks your equipment log for mowers, trimmers, and blowers whose hours or days since last service have passed the maintenance interval, and flags them before they break down mid-route. Use this if a mower has ever died on a job site because nobody tracked when the blades or oil were last serviced.

jobs.name: Mowing Frequency Contract vs. Actual Visits Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares each client's contracted mowing frequency (e.g. weekly, biweekly) against the actual number of visits logged in the trailing window, and flags clients who are under- or over-serviced relative to their contract. Use this if you've ever gotten a call asking why a "weekly" client only got mowed twice in a month, or realized you were giving a biweekly client weekly service for free.

jobs.name: MQL-to-SQL Handoff SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks how long marketing-qualified leads have been sitting since becoming an MQL without sales accepting them as sales-qualified, and flags leads stuck past the handoff SLA. Use this if a hot lead has ever gone cold sitting in the queue between marketing handing it off and sales actually picking it up.

jobs.name: MQL Volume Pace Check
jobs.description: Compares marketing-qualified-lead (MQL) volume so far this period against the target pace and flags under-delivery early. Use this if a quarter has ever ended short on MQLs and sales only found out during the pipeline review, instead of marketing catching it mid-quarter with enough runway to fix it.

jobs.name: Mulch/Material Inventory Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks your bulk material inventory (mulch, topsoil, rock, gravel) against a reorder threshold and flags anything running low. Use this if a crew has ever shown up to a mulch job and found the yard was already out of the material they needed.

jobs.name: Multi-Account Cash Position Rollup
jobs.description: Sums balances across multiple bank/cash accounts into one total position and flags if the total or any single account drops below a minimum threshold. Use this if cash is spread across several accounts or entities and you want a single low-balance tripwire instead of checking each account separately.

jobs.name: Multi-Channel Response Time Parity Check
jobs.description: Compares response times across your support channels (email, chat, phone callback, social) and flags one that's lagging well behind the others. Use this if a channel like social or SMS has ever been treated as an afterthought and quietly built up much slower response times than email or chat, without a single combined metric ever catching it.

jobs.name: Multi-Location Stock Imbalance Check
jobs.description: Compares stock of the same SKU across multiple locations and flags cases where one location is critically low while another is sitting on a large surplus of the same item. Use this if you've ever placed a new purchase order for a SKU that was actually out of stock at one store or warehouse but overflowing at another one nearby, when a transfer would have solved it for free.

jobs.name: Multi-Stop Route Sequence Deviation Check
jobs.description: Compares the planned stop order for a multi-stop route against the order stops were actually completed and flags routes that ran out of sequence. Use this if a driver has ever gone off the planned stop order on a multi-drop route and it quietly added miles and blew a delivery window without anyone reviewing it after the fact.

jobs.name: Multi-Threading Gap Check
jobs.description: Flags open deals above a minimum size that are tied to only a single contact, a classic single-threaded deal risk. Use this if a deal has ever stalled or died because your only contact went dark and there was nobody else at the account to fall back on.

jobs.name: Multi-Year Renewal Escalation Tracker
jobs.description: Flags multi-year contracts approaching their next contract-year anniversary, where a pre-agreed price escalation kicks in, so the customer gets notice before the higher invoice arrives. Use this if a customer has ever been surprised by a built-in price increase on a multi-year deal because nobody sent the required notice ahead of the anniversary date.

jobs.name: Multisig Pending Transaction Watch
jobs.description: Checks a multisig wallet (e.g. Gnosis Safe) for transactions awaiting additional signatures and flags ones that have been pending too long. Use this if you've ever had a transaction stuck for days because a co-signer forgot it was waiting on them.

jobs.name: Multisig Signer Availability Watch
jobs.description: Checks a locally maintained roster of your multisig's signers against when each was last confirmed reachable, and flags it if too few signers are currently available to reach quorum. Use this if a multisig transaction has ever stalled because a co-signer turned out to be on vacation or had gone quiet, and nobody knew that before it mattered.

jobs.name: Municipal Bond Covenant Compliance Check
jobs.description: Calculates a revenue bond's debt service coverage ratio and reserve fund balance from your latest financials and flags a breach of the bond covenant's minimum requirements. Use this if a covenant breach has ever gone unnoticed until the trustee or bondholders raised it, instead of finance catching it the same month the numbers came in.

jobs.name: Mutual Fund Short-Term Redemption Fee Window Check
jobs.description: Checks how many days you've held a mutual fund lot against the fund's minimum holding period, so you don't accidentally trigger a short-term redemption fee by selling too early. Use this if you've ever sold a fund and gotten hit with a surprise 1-2% redemption fee because you didn't realize you were still inside the minimum holding window.

jobs.name: NDA Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a signed NDA reaches its expiration or renewal date. Use this if an NDA has ever lapsed mid-relationship and nobody noticed the confidentiality coverage had run out.

jobs.name: Negative Inventory Check
jobs.description: Scans inventory records for SKUs showing a negative quantity on hand, a sign that sales, receiving, or adjustment transactions were recorded out of order or a count was never corrected. Use this if a "negative stock" bug has ever quietly thrown off reorder math or fulfillment promises because nobody was checking for impossible numbers.

jobs.name: Negative Review Alert
jobs.description: Checks for new low-star product reviews and flags them same-day instead of letting them sit in a dashboard nobody checks. Use this if a bad review has ever sat live for a week before anyone on the team noticed and responded.

jobs.name: NERC CIP Patch Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks critical cyber assets covered by NERC CIP patch-management requirements for systems that have gone longer than the evaluation window without a documented security patch or patch-applicability assessment, and lists them by how overdue they are. Use this if a critical OT/cyber asset has ever fallen out of NERC CIP patch compliance because a patch evaluation slipped past the required cycle unnoticed.

jobs.name: Net Worth Snapshot Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to log your net worth each month and shows the trend from your last two entries. Use this if you want to track your finances over time but keep forgetting to actually sit down and do it.

jobs.name: Network Equipment End-of-Life/End-of-Support Tracker
jobs.description: Checks your network equipment inventory against known end-of-life and end-of-support dates and warns when a device in production is approaching or past its support cutoff. Use this if a core router or switch has ever kept running past its vendor support date, leaving no path to a fix when it eventually failed.

jobs.name: New Account Fraud Hold Review Check
jobs.description: Flags new customer accounts placed on an early-fraud hold that have sat past a configurable review window without a recorded disposition. Use this if a new account has ever stayed frozen on a fraud hold for weeks because the case sat unreviewed in a queue — distinct from kyc-reverification-aging-tracker.yaml, which covers periodic identity re-verification on existing accounts, not early-fraud holds placed at account opening.

jobs.name: New Business Policy Issuance Backlog Tracker
jobs.description: Checks bound new-business submissions against how long they've waited for the carrier to actually issue the formal policy and flags anything stuck past the target turnaround. Use this if a client has ever paid their first premium and waited months for policy documents that never showed up because nobody was watching the issuance queue after bind.

jobs.name: New-Business Pipeline Stale Check
jobs.description: Scans the agency's new-business/pitch pipeline for opportunities that haven't had any logged activity in a set number of days and flags them as stale. Use this if pitches quietly go cold because nobody circles back to follow up before a prospect loses interest.

jobs.name: New-Client Conflict of Interest Check
jobs.description: When a new-business opportunity is added to the pipeline, checks it against the agency's current client roster for a competitive conflict (same industry category, direct competitor already under contract) and flags the opportunity for legal/leadership review before the pitch team invests time. Use this if the agency has ever gotten well into a pitch before someone realized the prospect directly competes with an existing client, and the client relations conversation happened after the fact instead of before.

jobs.name: New Client Intake Packet Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks recently registered new clients for outstanding intake paperwork — signed consent-to-treat, payment policy acknowledgment, and patient history form — and flags anyone still missing a piece before their first appointment. Use this if a new client has ever shown up for a first visit without a signed consent-to-treat on file, forcing the front desk to scramble at check-in — distinct from patient-record-completeness-audit.yaml, which spot-checks established patients' clinical records rather than new-client onboarding paperwork.

jobs.name: New Driver Onboarding Training Check
jobs.description: Checks newly-hired drivers against required onboarding safety-training completion before they're cleared to drive a company vehicle, and flags anyone driving without it done. Use this if a new driver has ever been handed keys before finishing the safety course that's supposed to come first.

jobs.name: New Hire Buddy Assignment Check
jobs.description: Checks recent new hires against whether an onboarding buddy has been assigned yet, and flags anyone still unassigned once they've been started for a few days. Use this if a new hire has ever spent their first two weeks with no one to ask "dumb" questions because assigning a buddy fell through the cracks along with everything else in a busy onboarding.

jobs.name: New Hire Equipment Order Check
jobs.description: Checks accepted candidates against equipment order status and flags anyone whose start date is coming up fast with no laptop/gear ordered yet. Use this if a new hire has ever shown up on day one to a desk with no computer because the equipment order never got placed.

jobs.name: New Hire Equipment Provisioning Check
jobs.description: Flags new hires whose laptop, badge, or other required equipment hasn't been marked provisioned within a few days of their start date. Use this if a new hire has ever shown up on day one without a working laptop because IT provisioning fell through the cracks.

jobs.name: New Hire Onboarding Checklist Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks each newly hired staff member's required pre-solo-shift onboarding items (orientation, mandated-reporter training, TB test, shadowing hours) against how many are actually complete, and flags anyone who's run out of grace period still incomplete. Use this if a new hire has ever been left alone with children before finishing the checklist that's supposed to come first — distinct from staff-annual-training-hours-tracking-check, which is an ongoing annual requirement rather than a one-time onboarding gate, and from staff-background-check-recertification-check, which covers the recurring clearance renewal rather than initial onboarding.

jobs.name: New Hire Onboarding Task Check
jobs.description: Checks which new hires have onboarding tasks (accounts, equipment, paperwork) that are still open past their target date. Use this if a new hire has ever shown up without laptop access or benefits paperwork because a checklist item silently slipped through the cracks.

jobs.name: New Hire Paperwork Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks which recently started employees still have incomplete onboarding paperwork (I-9, tax forms, benefits enrollment, signed handbook) and flags them before they become a compliance problem. Use this if onboarding paperwork has ever slipped through the cracks past the legal deadline.

jobs.name: New-Hire Training Completion Tracker
jobs.description: Checks each new hire's required training modules (safety, chemical handling, client-facing conduct, etc.) against what's actually been completed and flags anyone overdue before they're sent out solo on a job. Use this if a new cleaner has ever been sent to a client site without finishing chemical-safety training because nobody was tracking completion against the hire date.

jobs.name: New Manager 30-60-90 Check
jobs.description: Tracks a new manager's 30/60/90-day plan milestones and reminds them (and their manager) when a checkpoint is coming up or was missed. Use this if a first-time manager has ever been left to figure out what "day 60" is supposed to look like with zero structure or check-ins from above.

jobs.name: New Member Onboarding Check-in
jobs.description: Looks at members who joined in the last 30 days and drafts a personalized check-in for anyone who hasn't come back after their first visit or completed an intro session, since the first month is when most cancellations get decided. Use this if a new member has ever signed up, come in once, and quietly never returned without anyone reaching out during that critical early window.

jobs.name: New Patient Conversion Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates the rate of new-patient exam leads that converted to a scheduled or completed first appointment over a trailing window, and flags when the rate drops below a threshold. Use this if new-patient inquiries have ever piled up without anyone noticing that fewer of them were actually turning into booked first visits.

jobs.name: New Restaurant Roundup
jobs.description: Checks for restaurants that newly opened near you in the last week and gives you a short list to consider. Use this if you like trying new places but never remember to actually go looking for what just opened.

jobs.name: New Vehicle Acquisition Onboarding Check
jobs.description: Checks newly acquired fleet vehicles against the setup checklist (telematics install, insurance added, registration filed, fuel card assigned) and flags any already in service with steps still missing. Use this if a new vehicle has ever gone out on the road without a fuel card or telematics device because it skipped a step in the intake process.

jobs.name: Newly Funded Companies Lead Scout
jobs.description: Checks funding-announcement sources for companies that just raised in your target market and drafts a first-outreach message for each. Use this if you sell to companies that spend differently right after a funding round and you want to reach them before every other vendor does.

jobs.name: Newsletter Open Rate Trend Alert
jobs.description: Tracks whether your newsletter's open rate has been trending down over recent issues and, when it has, gets an LLM pass to suggest likely causes and next steps. Use this if open rates have ever slid gradually issue after issue without anyone flagging it until it was a full-blown deliverability or content problem.

jobs.name: Newsletter Unsubscribe Spike Check
jobs.description: Checks your most recent newsletter send's unsubscribe rate against a threshold and flags it if it's abnormally high. Use this if a bad subject line or list segment has ever quietly torched your audience before anyone compared it to prior sends.

jobs.name: NFT Floor Price Watch
jobs.description: Checks an NFT collection's floor price via a public marketplace API and alerts if it drops below a threshold. Use this if you've ever wanted a heads-up when a collection you hold or track dips below a price level you care about, without staring at a marketplace tab all day.

jobs.name: NFT Royalty Enforcement Watch
jobs.description: Checks whether a tracked NFT collection's creator royalty is still being honored across major marketplaces, and flags any marketplace that has gone optional or zero-royalty on it. Use this if you rely on ongoing royalty income from a collection and want to know when a marketplace quietly stops paying it, not months later when revenue looks off.

jobs.name: No-Agenda Meeting Flag
jobs.description: Scans upcoming calendar events for meetings that have no description, no agenda items, and no attached doc, and lists them so organizers can fix it before the meeting starts. Use this if you keep walking into calls where nobody's sure what's actually being decided.

jobs.name: No-Show Rate by Provider Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates each provider's weekly no-show rate from logged appointment history and flags anyone whose rate is running above threshold or trending up. Use this if a specific provider's schedule has ever quietly developed a chronic no-show problem — a scheduling-window mismatch, a long wait for that provider, a demographic mismatch — that never showed up as a single incident worth investigating.

jobs.name: No-Spend Day Streak Check
jobs.description: Checks a logged no-spend-day challenge and reports your current streak, flagging it clearly if the streak just broke. Use this if you're running a personal no-spend challenge and want a quick daily read on how you're doing without digging through the log yourself.

jobs.name: Non-Compete / Non-Solicit Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks the restricted-period end date of non-compete and non-solicit agreements for departed employees and warns as each one is about to expire. Use this if you've ever needed to know exactly when a former employee's restrictive covenant runs out — before deciding whether to act on a suspected violation, or before it's too late to.

jobs.name: Non-Conformance Report Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts open non-conformance reports (NCRs) that have gone past their disposition deadline without a root cause or corrective action logged. Use this if an NCR has ever sat open for months with the nonconforming material still floating around because nobody was tracking the disposition clock.

jobs.name: Non-Revenue Water Loss Check
jobs.description: Compares how much water a water utility pumped or produced against how much it actually billed customers for, and flags days where the gap (non-revenue water, often from leaks or meter error) crosses a set percentage. Use this if you want an early warning on distribution-system leaks or metering problems before they show up as a costly annual audit finding.

jobs.name: Notification Backlog Sweep
jobs.description: Pulls unread notification counts across your connected tools (chat, tracker, docs, code review) into one list, so you can see the whole backlog at a glance instead of tool-hopping to check each one. Use this if you only discover a stale mention or review request days later because it was buried in a red badge you never opened.

jobs.name: NPI Provider Registry Staleness Check
jobs.description: Compares each provider's practice-management-system record (address, taxonomy code, phone) against a manually-noted last-verified-against-NPI date and flags anyone not re-checked within a configurable window. Use this if a mismatched NPI registry entry has ever caused a claim rejection because the payer's lookup didn't match what was billed — distinct from payer-recredentialing-deadline-check.yaml, which tracks panel status, not registry data accuracy.

jobs.name: NPS Trend Tracker
jobs.description: Computes Net Promoter Score from a survey response log and flags when it drops meaningfully from the prior period. Use this if NPS only gets looked at once a quarter in a slide, instead of catching a slide in sentiment while there's still time to find out why.

jobs.name: NSF/Overdraft Repeat Usage Check
jobs.description: Scans an account transaction log for customers who've hit NSF or overdraft fees a set number of times within a trailing window and flags them for proactive outreach. Use this if you'd rather offer overdraft-protection enrollment or a courtesy call before a fair-lending or UDAAP review flags the same repeat-fee pattern for you.

jobs.name: Number Porting Request Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags LNP (local number portability) port-in or port-out requests that have been open longer than expected without completing. Use this if a customer has ever been stuck mid-port for weeks, unable to make or receive calls, because a porting request stalled with the losing or gaining carrier and nobody followed up.

jobs.name: Nurse Staffing Ratio Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks logged shift staffing counts against a required nurse-to-patient ratio (mandated by state regulation in some jurisdictions, or internal policy elsewhere) and flags shifts that fell short. Use this if a unit has ever run understaffed relative to a required ratio without it surfacing until a regulatory survey or an incident forced the question — distinct from waiting-room-time-check.yaml, which measures patient wait experience, not staffing-ratio compliance itself.

jobs.name: Nutrition/Meal-Plan Check-in Reminder
jobs.description: Reviews clients on an active nutrition or meal-plan coaching track and drafts a personalized check-in message for anyone who hasn't logged progress or heard from their coach recently. Use this if a client has ever paid for ongoing nutrition coaching and gone silent for weeks with nobody reaching out to see how the plan was actually going.

jobs.name: Occupancy Forecast Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares this week's forecasted occupancy against actual rooms sold and flags a meaningful gap in either direction. Use this if a forecast has ever been quietly wrong for weeks, leaving staffing either overbooked on labor during a slow stretch or short-staffed during a rush nobody planned for.

jobs.name: Odometer/Fuel Mileage Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares telematics-reported mileage against the odometer readings entered at the fuel pump for the same period and flags large mismatches. Use this if a fuel card has ever been used away from the actual vehicle, or an odometer figure has ever looked off, and nobody cross-checked the two numbers against each other.

jobs.name: OEE Efficiency Check
jobs.description: Calculates Overall Equipment Effectiveness (availability x performance x quality) for a line from a production log and flags it when it drops below target. Use this if a line has ever "felt slow" for weeks before anyone put a single number on how much effectiveness it was actually losing.

jobs.name: OEM Factory Training Hours Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks each technician's completed manufacturer/OEM factory training hours for the current program year against the required minimum and flags anyone falling behind pace. Use this if a tech has ever gotten close to year-end still short on required training hours, risking loss of factory-certified status even though their individual certifications hadn't technically expired yet.

jobs.name: OFAC Sanctions Screening Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks a log of OFAC sanctions-list screening runs against the customer base and flags if the most recent completed run is older than a configurable interval. Use this if your bank has ever gone longer than intended between full-customer-base OFAC screenings because nobody was watching the run log — this is bank-internal compliance ops, not a transaction-level watchlist match tool.

jobs.name: Offboarded Employee Access Audit
jobs.description: Compares active access grants across systems and apps against the current HR employee roster, then flags any access still active for someone who has already left the company. Use this if you want a safety net catching leftover accounts after offboarding, separate from routine key rotation — this is specifically about access nobody remembered to remove.

jobs.name: Offer Acceptance Rate Trend Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent offers and flags when the acceptance rate drops below a healthy baseline, which often signals a compensation or process problem before it shows up anywhere else. Use this if you've ever only noticed a string of declines after several offers in a row fell through. Applies equally to direct-hire offers tracked in a corporate ATS and to agency-placement offers tracked in a staffing ATS/VMS (e.g. Bullhorn, JobDiva, Vincere) — same accept/decline math, different source system.

jobs.name: Offer Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Flags extended offers that are close to their response deadline with no answer yet. Use this if an offer has ever quietly expired because nobody followed up before the deadline passed.

jobs.name: On-Call Fatigue Check
jobs.description: Checks the on-call rotation history and flags if the same person has been covering on-call more often than the rotation intends. Use this if someone has ever quietly ended up on-call three weeks running because swaps kept landing on the same person and nobody was tracking the pattern.

jobs.name: On-Call Handoff Checklist Check
jobs.description: Checks a logged on-call handoff record for the current shift transition and flags it if required fields (open incidents, known issues, pending actions) were left blank. Use this if an on-call handoff has ever happened with nothing written down, leaving the incoming engineer to discover open issues the hard way — distinct from incident-postmortem-action-item-check.yaml, which tracks postmortem follow-ups rather than the shift-handoff moment itself.

jobs.name: Onboarding Completion Stall Check
jobs.description: Checks new users against your onboarding checklist and flags anyone who's been stuck on the same step for too long. Use this if new users have ever quietly abandoned setup partway through and nobody reached out until they'd already churned.

jobs.name: Onboarding Funnel Drop-off Check
jobs.description: Computes the step-by-step completion rate across your onboarding funnel and flags whichever step is losing the most users. Use this if you know onboarding completion isn't great but have never actually seen where in the funnel people give up.

jobs.name: Onboarding Ticket Response Time Check
jobs.description: Checks tickets from customers still in their onboarding window against a tighter first-response SLA than standard tickets, and flags misses. Use this if a brand-new customer has ever had a rocky first week because their ticket sat in the same queue as everyone else's — distinct from first-response-time-drift-check.yaml, which watches the overall response-time trend, not a stricter SLA carve-out for still-onboarding accounts specifically.

jobs.name: On-call Handoff Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges outgoing and incoming on-call to sync before the shift changes. Use this if a handoff has ever happened silently and the new on-call found out about an open incident from a page instead of a briefing.

jobs.name: On-Call Stipend Payout Check
jobs.description: Checks a log of on-call stipends against payout status and flags any that are still marked pending well after the shift happened. Use this if someone has ever covered an on-call rotation and had to personally chase down payroll weeks later because their stipend quietly never got processed.

jobs.name: Online Booking Abandonment Check
jobs.description: Checks an online-booking-widget session log for started-but-not-completed bookings and flags ones past a configurable follow-up window so front desk can reach out. Use this if a prospective patient has ever picked a time slot on the website and then quietly bailed before confirming — distinct from new-patient-conversion-rate-tracker.yaml, which measures the aggregate lead-to-appointment rate rather than individual abandoned sessions worth a direct follow-up.

jobs.name: Online Ordering Platform Menu Sync Check
jobs.description: Checks that your online ordering menu (website or delivery app) is reachable and pings back a normal response, catching silent outages or sync failures. Use this if a menu page has ever gone down or frozen out of sync without anyone noticing until an order failed.

jobs.name: Online Reservation Move-In Conversion Check
jobs.description: Compares online unit reservations made in the last several days against which of those reservations actually converted into a completed move-in, and flags reservations that are still open past a reasonable window with no move-in on record. Use this if you take online reservations and suspect some of them are quietly falling through the cracks instead of becoming paying tenants or getting followed up on.

jobs.name: Online Review Rating Trend Watch
jobs.description: Tracks your average online review rating over time and flags a meaningful downward trend before it tanks your overall score. Use this if you've ever only noticed a slump in reviews after a bad month was already baked into your public rating.

jobs.name: Out-of-Office Handoff Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks whether upcoming out-of-office calendar blocks have a matching handoff doc, a delegated owner for open tasks, and an auto-reply set up, then flags whatever's missing. Use this if you've ever come back from time off to a pile of things that needed a decision nobody was authorized to make while you were gone.

jobs.name: Open Data Portal Publication SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks datasets your agency has committed to publish or refresh on its open data portal against their required update cadence and flags any that have gone stale. Use this if a dataset has ever silently stopped updating for months while the portal page still looked live to the public.

jobs.name: Open Enrollment Exception Tracker
jobs.description: Scans processed open-enrollment elections for exceptions — carrier rejections or elections that never synced to payroll — that need manual cleanup before the plan year starts. Use this if an enrollment election has ever "gone through" on the employee's end but silently failed to reach payroll or the carrier, and nobody found out until the first paycheck or a denied claim.

jobs.name: Expected Open Ports Check
jobs.description: Checks that the ports you expect to be open on a host actually are, and flags any that aren't. Use this if a service has ever silently stopped listening and you found out from a user instead of a monitor.

jobs.name: Open Req Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags job requisitions that have been open too long without enough candidates in the pipeline. Use this if a req has ever sat open for months before anyone asked why it wasn't moving.

jobs.name: Operator Certification-to-Equipment Match Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks the shift roster or crew assignment sheet against operator equipment certifications and flags anyone assigned to a machine they aren't certified to run. Use this if an uncertified operator or crew member has ever ended up running a press, forklift, crane, or aerial lift because the scheduler didn't know their certification had lapsed or didn't check cert records against the equipment assignment sheet.

jobs.name: Order Fulfillment On-Time-Ship SLA Watch
jobs.description: Checks yesterday's order log for orders that missed their promised ship-by date/time and flags the on-time-ship rate against target. Use this if an on-time-ship rate has ever slipped for a week before anyone outside the warehouse noticed, because nobody was tallying misses against the SLA daily.

jobs.name: Ordinance Implementation Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks newly passed ordinances or regulations against their effective date and flags any that are close to taking effect while the actual implementation work (updated fee schedule live, new form published, system or signage updated) is still marked not done. Use this if a law has ever taken effect before staff finished doing what it takes to actually enforce or administer it.

jobs.name: Org Chart Manager Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares the manager field in the HRIS against a separately maintained org-chart source of truth and flags mismatches. Use this if the "reports to" field has ever gone stale after a reorg, leaving reviews, approvals, or reminders routed to someone's old manager for months.

jobs.name: Organic Certification Audit & Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks your organic certification's annual inspection date and certificate renewal deadline, and warns before either one lapses. Use this if you've ever nearly missed the window to schedule your annual organic inspection and risked losing certified status.

jobs.name: Organic Traffic Decay Watch
jobs.description: Compares recent organic search traffic per page against each page's own prior peak and flags pages that were doing well and have since dropped off. Use this if content has ever quietly lost its ranking and traffic months before anyone on the team noticed.

jobs.name: Orphaned Branch Cleanup
jobs.description: Lists remote branches already merged into main that nobody's deleted yet. Use this if your branch list has become a graveyard nobody wants to clean up.

jobs.name: Orphaned Cloud Resource Check
jobs.description: Checks a tagged-resource inventory export for resources missing an owner/team tag or a linked active workload, and flags them as candidates for cleanup. Use this if unattached volumes, idle load balancers, or leftover snapshots have ever quietly kept costing money after the project that created them ended — distinct from cost-alert.yaml, which watches total spend against a budget threshold rather than identifying which specific resources are orphaned.

jobs.name: Orphaned Page Internal Link Check
jobs.description: Crawls the site's internal link graph and flags published pages that have zero inbound internal links, meaning nothing else on the site points to them. Use this if you want to catch pages that visitors and search engine crawlers can only reach by knowing the exact URL, since orphaned pages rarely get discovered or ranked.

jobs.name: Ortho Retainer Check-In Reminder
jobs.description: Flags orthodontic retention patients who are overdue for their scheduled retainer check-in appointment. Use this if a retention patient has ever gone quiet after finishing active treatment and drifted out of retainer compliance because nobody was tracking check-in due dates once braces came off.

jobs.name: OSHA Jobsite Inspection Readiness Check
jobs.description: Reviews the jobsite's self-inspection checklist log for open safety findings that haven't been closed out within the required window, so an unannounced OSHA inspection doesn't catch an already-known hazard still sitting open. Use this if a site has ever scrambled the morning an inspector showed up because nobody was tracking which findings from last week's walkthrough were actually fixed.

jobs.name: OSHA Recordable Incident Log Audit
jobs.description: Checks the incident log for recordable injuries that haven't been logged on the OSHA 300 form within the required window. Use this if a recordable incident has ever slipped past the logging deadline because the person who handled the report forgot to also update the 300 log.

jobs.name: Open-Source Contribution Streak Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since your last open-source contribution (PR, issue, review) via the GitHub API, to keep your portfolio visibly active. Use this if you keep meaning to build an open-source track record for your resume but let it go cold for months.

jobs.name: OTA Rate Parity Check
jobs.description: Compares your listed room rates across OTAs (Booking.com, Expedia, etc.) against your direct-booking rate and flags any channel undercutting you. Use this if an OTA has ever quietly shown a lower rate than your own website, driving bookings away from your cheapest channel.

jobs.name: Outage Restoration SLA Check
jobs.description: Looks through currently open power, water, or gas outage tickets and flags any that are close to or past the restoration-time commitment the utility promised customers or regulators. Use this if crews sometimes miss SLA windows simply because nobody was watching the clock on open tickets.

jobs.name: Outbound Load Audit Accuracy Check
jobs.description: Compares the final loaded-pallet manifest at the dock door against the outbound order/BOL before the trailer leaves, and flags any mismatch in quantity or destination. Use this if a trailer has ever pulled away with the wrong pallet, or missing a pallet, because the load wasn't checked against the order after picking and packing were already verified.

jobs.name: Outdoor Event Weather Contingency Alert
jobs.description: Checks the forecast for an upcoming outdoor event against your go/no-go thresholds (rain chance, wind, heat) and flags it when the contingency plan should start getting activated. Use this if an outdoor event has ever been caught flat-footed by a forecast that everyone privately worried about but nobody officially acted on.

jobs.name: Outside Counsel Invoice Budget Check
jobs.description: Compares outside counsel invoices billed to date against each matter's approved budget and flags matters approaching or over budget. Use this if a matter budget has ever been blown through silently because invoices got approved one at a time without anyone tracking the running total against the budget set at intake.

jobs.name: Outside Counsel Rate Card Compliance Audit
jobs.description: Compares billed hourly rates on outside counsel invoices against the negotiated rate card for each timekeeper and flags any overbilled rate, then drafts a summary for whoever manages the panel relationship. Use this if outside counsel has ever quietly billed above the negotiated rate and it only got caught months later, if at all.

jobs.name: Overbooking Risk Alert
jobs.description: Compares confirmed reservations for each upcoming night against total available rooms and flags nights where bookings exceed inventory. Use this if an intentional overbooking cushion has ever tipped into an actual walked guest because nobody was watching the running total as last-minute bookings came in.

jobs.name: Overdraft Fee Reversal Request Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags customer requests to reverse an overdraft fee that are still pending past a configurable turnaround window. Use this if reversal requests have ever sat in a queue long enough that customers start escalating or complaining before anyone got to them — this is bank-internal ops, distinct from the `finance` category's personal/business bookkeeping jobs.

jobs.name: Overdue Library Materials Check
jobs.description: Scans checked-out library items and flags anything past its due date by more than a grace period. Use this if overdue textbooks or library books have ever piled up unnoticed until inventory time.

jobs.name: Overlock Notice Followup Check
jobs.description: Looks at units that staff have overlocked (added a second lock to) for nonpayment and flags any where the required followup notice letting the tenant know about the overlock hasn't actually been sent yet. Use this if you want to make sure overlocked tenants are told promptly, instead of a unit sitting overlocked with no notice on file until someone shows up confused at the gate.

jobs.name: Overstock / Slow-Mover Check
jobs.description: Flags SKUs sitting well above normal stock levels with low recent sales velocity, tying up capital and warehouse space. Use this if slow-moving stock has ever piled up quietly until a year-end count revealed how much cash was sitting on shelves doing nothing.

jobs.name: Overtime / Burnout Pattern Check
jobs.description: Scans a weekly hours log and flags anyone who's logged above-threshold hours for several weeks running. Use this if someone on your team has ever burned out quietly because nobody was looking at logged hours across multiple weeks at once, only one week at a time.

jobs.name: Packing Materials Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks packing supply inventory (boxes, tape, moving blankets, shrink wrap) against each item's reorder threshold and flags what needs to be reordered. Use this if a crew has ever shown up to load a truck and found the warehouse was already low on wardrobe boxes or tape right before a busy move week.

jobs.name: Page Speed Regression Watch
jobs.description: Checks a page's load time against a baseline and flags a real regression. Use this if a page has ever gotten slowly, silently slower release after release until it was a real problem.

jobs.name: Paid Search Negative Keyword Waste Check
jobs.description: Reviews the recent search terms report for a paid search account and flags spend on queries that are clearly irrelevant to what's being sold and should be added as negative keywords. Use this if a paid search account has ever burned budget for weeks on obviously mismatched search terms because nobody reviewed the search terms report.

jobs.name: Paid Social Audience Overlap Check
jobs.description: Checks the audience targeting across your active paid social ad sets or campaigns for significant overlap, which means two of your own ads are competing against each other in the same auction and driving your own costs up. Use this if your cost-per-result has crept up without a clear reason and you suspect your campaigns are cannibalizing each other's reach.

jobs.name: Body Shop Paint Mix Inventory Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks body shop paint toners, mixes, and clearcoat/hardener stock against each product's shelf life and flags anything close to or past its expiry date. Use this if a paint job has ever come out wrong, or gotten scrapped, because a toner or hardener had gone past its usable shelf life without anyone checking the can date.

jobs.name: Pallet/Asset Tracking Reconciliation
jobs.description: Compares pooled or company-owned pallets (or other reusable shipping assets) shipped out against the count returned or exchanged, and flags a location losing more than your threshold. Use this if lost pallets have ever quietly turned into a five-figure annual replacement bill that nobody traced back to a specific dock or lane.

jobs.name: Pallet Jack Battery Charge Check
jobs.description: Checks electric pallet jack and other material-handling equipment battery charge levels against a minimum threshold, and flags units that need charging before the next shift. Use this if a pallet jack has ever died mid-shift because nobody caught its battery running low overnight.

jobs.name: Pallet Putaway Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks how long received pallets have been sitting in the receiving area before getting put away, and flags anything stuck too long. Use this if inventory has ever gone "missing" only to turn up still shrink-wrapped on a receiving pallet from three days ago.

jobs.name: Parent Consent Form Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks each child's on-file consent forms (photo/media release, sunscreen application, emergency medical treatment, standing local-trip permission) against their annual renewal date and flags any that have lapsed. Use this if a form has ever quietly expired and only got noticed when someone needed to actually rely on it.

jobs.name: Parent Pickup Authorization Verification Check
jobs.description: Checks each enrolled child's authorized pickup list and flags anyone with no authorized persons on file, or whose authorization form has expired. Use this if a front-desk staff member has ever had to make a judgment call at pickup time because the authorized-persons list on file was blank, outdated, or unclear.

jobs.name: Parent-Teacher Conference No-Show Tracker
jobs.description: Checks scheduled parent-teacher conferences against attendance and flags no-shows for follow-up. Use this if a family has ever missed a conference slot and nobody rescheduled it, especially for a student where that conversation actually mattered.

jobs.name: Parking Spot Allocation Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks assigned parking spots against active vehicle registrations and flags spots claimed by more than one member or member accounts with more registered vehicles than their plan allows. Use this if members have ever fought over a spot because two people were told the same numbered space was theirs.

jobs.name: Parking/Transportation Logistics Confirmation Tracker
jobs.description: Checks that parking arrangements, shuttle schedules, and rideshare drop-off/valet logistics are confirmed with the venue and vendors as the event date closes in, and flags anything still unconfirmed. Use this if attendees have ever arrived to a full parking lot because nobody confirmed the overflow lot arrangement until the morning of.

jobs.name: Parts Backorder Check
jobs.description: Checks ordered parts against their expected arrival date and flags anything overdue from the supplier. Use this if a repair has ever stalled for a week because a part was quietly backordered and nobody followed up with the supplier until a customer asked why their car wasn't ready.

jobs.name: Parts Low-Stock Reorder Check
jobs.description: Checks your truck/warehouse parts inventory against reorder thresholds and flags anything running low before a tech shows up on a job without the capacitor or valve they need. Use this if a job has ever been rescheduled because a common part was quietly out of stock.

jobs.name: Parts Department Reorder Point Check
jobs.description: Checks parts counter stock-on-hand against each SKU's reorder point and flags anything that's dropped below it, so a routine oil filter or brake pad isn't out of stock when a tech needs it mid-repair. Use this if a common part has ever run out because nobody was watching the shelf until it was already empty.

jobs.name: Passport Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before your passport expires — including the "6 months validity required" rule many countries enforce at the border. Use this if you've ever booked a trip and only checked your passport date after buying the ticket.
