jobs.name: Passport / ID Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you well ahead of your passport or government ID expiration date so you have time to renew before a trip or deadline forces a rush application. Use this if you've ever discovered an expired passport days before a flight.

jobs.name: Sensitive Account Password Rotation Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you when it's been long enough since you last rotated the password on a sensitive personal account (email, banking, password manager master password) that a refresh is due. Use this if you rely on memory to track when you last changed a critical password.

jobs.name: Patch Rollout Crash Watch
jobs.description: Checks your crash reporter for a spike tied to a specific build/patch version right after it ships, so a bad rollout gets caught in hours, not in next week's player reviews. Use this if a patch has ever shipped with a crash-on-launch bug that only got noticed once refund requests started piling up.

jobs.name: Allergy Patch Test Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags clients booked for a chemical service (color, lash tint, chemical peel) whose required patch test is missing or older than your salon's safe re-test window. Use this if a client has ever had a reaction during a color service because their patch test was months old and nobody re-checked it before the appointment.

jobs.name: Patent Maintenance Fee Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a patent maintenance (annuity) fee comes due so the patent doesn't lapse. Use this if a patent has ever gone abandoned because a maintenance fee deadline was missed.

jobs.name: Patient Adherence (PDC) Gap Check
jobs.description: Calculates each maintenance-medication patient's proportion of days covered (PDC) from their fill history and flags anyone who's dropped below your adherence target. Use this if you've ever wanted to catch a patient slipping on a chronic medication before it shows up as a bad quality-measure score at the end of the quarter.

jobs.name: Patient Balance Aging Report
jobs.description: Buckets outstanding patient balances by age (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days) from a billing export and flags accounts past a configurable threshold. Use this if patient balances have ever quietly drifted past 90 days because nobody had a standing view of the aging buckets, not just the total owed.

jobs.name: Overdue Patient Balance Aging Check
jobs.description: Buckets outstanding self-pay patient balances by how long they've been unpaid (30/60/90+ days) and flags the oldest ones for collections follow-up. Use this if patient balances have ever quietly aged past the point of easy recovery because nobody was reviewing accounts receivable by age, only by total dollar amount.

jobs.name: Patient Grievance/Complaint Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks logged formal patient complaints and grievances (billing disputes, care-quality concerns, staff conduct) against your resolution-window policy and flags anything aging past it. Use this if a formal complaint has ever sat open for weeks with no resolution because it lived in one person's inbox instead of a tracked log — distinct from patient-satisfaction-survey-tracking, which covers routine post-visit survey scores rather than a filed complaint that a practice's grievance policy requires a documented response to.

jobs.name: Patient Immunization Schedule Check
jobs.description: Checks which patients are due or overdue for a scheduled immunization and lists them for outreach. Use this if a patient (child or adult) has ever fallen behind on a vaccine series because nobody was tracking due dates against the immunization schedule between visits — this is for human patients, distinct from jobs/veterinary/pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml which tracks pet vaccines at an animal clinic.

jobs.name: Patient Portal Message Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks unanswered patient portal messages against a response-time SLA and flags anything overdue. Use this if a patient message has ever sat unanswered in the portal inbox for days because it scrolled off the top of a busy staff member's queue and nobody was tracking age.

jobs.name: Patient Recall Reminder
jobs.description: Finds patients due (or overdue) for a routine checkup, cleaning, or screening and lists them for outreach. Use this if recall/recare lists pile up and patients quietly fall off the schedule for a year or more.

jobs.name: Patient (Pet) Record Completeness Audit
jobs.description: Spot-checks a sample of recent patient records for missing required fields — weight, vaccine history, allergy flags, microchip number — and lists the gaps. Use this if a chart has ever been missing a documented drug allergy right when it mattered, because record completeness was never actually reviewed, only assumed.

jobs.name: Patient Review Response Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks how long new patient reviews from an exported reviews log (Google, Yelp, practice website) have sat unanswered and flags any past a response threshold. Use this if the practice has ever left a review — especially a critical one — unanswered for weeks because nobody was assigned to watch for new ones landing.

jobs.name: Patient Safety Incident Report Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Reviews logged patient safety incidents (falls, medication errors, wrong- site near-misses, equipment failures) for ones still missing a root-cause review, corrective action, or required regulatory notification. Use this if an incident report has ever sat "filed" in a binder with nobody confirming the actual follow-up — a root-cause review, a corrective action, a required notification — ever happened.

jobs.name: Dental Patient Satisfaction Survey Response Tracker
jobs.description: Tallies post-appointment satisfaction survey response rate and average score over a trailing window and flags when either drops below threshold. Use this if a slipping response rate or a dip in average score has ever gone unnoticed for weeks because nobody was watching the trend, not just the individual responses.

jobs.name: Patient Satisfaction Survey Response Tracking
jobs.description: Tallies patient satisfaction survey response rates and surfaces low scores with comments for follow-up. Use this if low-scoring survey responses have ever sat unread in an inbox, or a slipping response rate went unnoticed for months — distinct from generic online reviews, this tracks a practice's own post-visit survey instrument.

jobs.name: Podcast Membership/Patreon Fulfillment Check
jobs.description: Flags paid membership tier perks (bonus episodes, shoutouts, merch) that are overdue for the current period. Use this if a paying supporter has ever asked "where's my bonus episode?" before you'd noticed it hadn't gone out yet.

jobs.name: Pay Equity Band Outlier Check
jobs.description: Scans a salary-band export for employees paid outside their role's band or unusually far from the band midpoint, and summarizes any patterns worth a closer look. Use this if pay outliers have ever gone unnoticed for a review cycle simply because nobody cross-checked salaries against bands until an audit or a pay-equity complaint forced the issue.

jobs.name: Payer Desk Audit Response Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks PBM/payer desk audit requests (documentation requests for specific paid claims) against their response deadline and flags any still unanswered as the deadline nears. Use this if a payer audit letter has ever sat in a pile until the response window closed and the claim got recouped by default just because nobody sent the requested paperwork in time.

jobs.name: Payer Enrollment and Credentialing Status Check
jobs.description: Checks each provider's enrollment status with each insurance payer (Medicare, Medicaid, commercial plans) against revalidation and re-attestation deadlines and flags anything lapsing or stuck in process. Use this if a provider has ever been dropped from a payer panel — and their claims started denying — because a revalidation deadline passed unnoticed or a new-provider enrollment application sat pending too long.

jobs.name: Payer Recredentialing Deadline Check
jobs.description: Tracks each provider's recredentialing deadline with the insurance payers they're paneled with and flags anything approaching or past due. Use this if a provider has ever fallen off a payer's network mid-quarter because recredentialing paperwork lapsed — distinct from license-cde-credit-expiry-tracker.yaml, which tracks the state license/CDE requirement, not payer-panel credentialing.

jobs.name: Payment Processor Failure Rate Watch
jobs.description: Groups recent checkout transactions by payment processor and flags any single processor whose failure rate has spiked well above the others. Use this if a gateway outage or a broken integration has ever quietly eaten a chunk of a day's sales before anyone realized the failures were all landing on one processor.

jobs.name: On-Chain Payment Stream Balance Watch
jobs.description: Checks a real-time token payment stream (e.g. a Superfluid or Sablier stream) for its remaining runway and flags it before the sender's deposit buffer runs out and the stream stalls or gets force-closed. Use this if you've ever been on either end of a streamed payment and found out it had stopped only after checking your balance days later.

jobs.name: Payroll Run Cutoff Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you before the payroll submission cutoff so timesheets and changes get in on time. Use this if payroll has ever run late because a timesheet or new-hire update missed the cutoff by a day.

jobs.name: Payroll Funding/Factoring Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks that the funds needed to cover this week's payroll run (whether from the agency's own cash or a factoring/invoice-financing draw) will be available before the payroll cutoff. Use this if a payroll run has ever been at risk because a factoring draw request was submitted too close to the funding deadline.

jobs.name: Payroll Run Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the payroll submission deadline so employees actually get paid on time. Use this if payroll has ever run late because the submission cutoff snuck up during a busy week.

jobs.name: Paywall/Upgrade Prompt Conversion Check
jobs.description: Reviews how often users who hit a paywall or upgrade prompt actually convert, and flags prompts that are being seen a lot but converting poorly. Use this if an upgrade prompt has ever quietly annoyed users for months with a near-zero conversion rate and nobody looked at the numbers until a redesign project asked "does this even work?"

jobs.name: PBM Claim Rejection Triage
jobs.description: Reads today's export of rejected insurance/PBM claims and groups them by rejection reason (prior auth needed, refill too soon, non-formulary, plan terminated, etc.) so the pharmacist knows which ones are quick fixes and which need a prescriber call. Use this if rejected claims have ever piled up unsorted at the register while a line of patients waits.

jobs.name: PBM Reimbursement Rate Audit
jobs.description: Compares what a PBM actually paid against the contracted reimbursement rate for a sample of recent claims and flags underpayments. Use this if you've ever suspected a PBM was quietly paying below contract on some claims but never had time to check systematically.

jobs.name: PBM Rejection Reason Trend Watch
jobs.description: Rolls up a month of PBM claim rejections by reason code and payer to spot a reason that's climbing week over week, rather than just triaging each day's rejections in isolation. Use this if a slow-building systemic issue (a plan's formulary quietly narrowing, a payer's edits getting stricter) has ever only become obvious once someone finally pulled a month of data together, long after daily triage had already cleared each day's queue.

jobs.name: Peak Season Labor Ramp Plan Check
jobs.description: Compares projected peak-season order volume against the current headcount ramp plan (temp staffing, overtime authorization, training pipeline) and flags gaps well before the peak actually hits. Use this if a seasonal volume spike has ever arrived before staffing was ready for it because the ramp plan was drafted too late or never revisited.

jobs.name: Pediatric Fluoride Consent Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks pediatric patients' fluoride-varnish treatment consent forms against a configurable renewal interval and flags anyone whose consent has expired or is about to. Use this if a fluoride treatment has ever been given, or almost given, on an expired consent — distinct from sedation-consent-form-completeness-check.yaml, which checks sedation/nitrous consent tied to a specific upcoming appointment rather than a standing annual consent on file.

jobs.name: Peer Feedback Cycle Completion Tracker
jobs.description: Checks a performance-review cycle's peer/360 feedback requests and flags reviewers who still haven't submitted as the cycle deadline closes in. Use this if a performance review has ever gone out missing peer input because one reviewer's feedback request sat ignored in their inbox until it was too late to chase.

jobs.name: Peer-to-Peer Fundraiser Performance Check
jobs.description: Reviews individual participant fundraising pages in a peer-to-peer campaign (a walk, ride, or "friends-asking-friends" drive) and flags registered fundraisers who've raised little or nothing so they can get coaching before the campaign ends. Use this if a peer-to-peer event has ever hit its overall goal on the strength of a few top fundraisers while dozens of registered participants raised nothing at all, and nobody reached out to help them until it was too late.

jobs.name: Peering/Transit Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks upstream transit and peering agreements for upcoming renewal or auto-renew deadlines and warns with enough lead time to renegotiate. Use this if a transit contract has ever auto-renewed at last year's rate (or worse) because nobody flagged the deadline until the invoice changed.

jobs.name: Performance Review Cycle Reminder
jobs.description: Tracks the performance review cycle deadline and flags managers who haven't submitted reviews yet as the deadline approaches. Use this if a review cycle has ever closed with a chunk of reviews still missing because nobody chased the stragglers until HR asked.

jobs.name: Periodontal Maintenance Interval Check
jobs.description: Flags periodontal-maintenance patients who are overdue for their next visit based on their individual 3-4 month recall interval, not the standard 6-month hygiene recall. Use this if a perio-maintenance patient has ever slipped onto the regular 6-month recall list by mistake and gone twice as long as they should between cleanings, risking disease progression.

jobs.name: Permissions Clearance Tracker
jobs.description: Flags quoted material, images, lyrics, or other third-party content in a forthcoming title that still needs permissions clearance before the book goes to press. Use this if a title has ever gone to print with an uncleared quote or image because clearance status wasn't tracked centrally.

jobs.name: Permit Application Approval Backlog Check
jobs.description: Flags submitted permit applications that are still awaiting municipal approval past a reasonable turnaround window. Use this if a project has ever sat idle at the "waiting on the city" stage far longer than expected because nobody was tracking submission-to-approval time.

jobs.name: Permit Application Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks how many permit applications are sitting in review past your target processing time, from the issuing agency's side. Use this if applications have ever piled up in a queue for weeks with no one tracking total backlog size or average age.

jobs.name: Building Permit Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a building permit expires so work doesn't get caught without valid coverage. Use this if a permit has ever lapsed mid-project and forced a costly re-inspection or re-application.

jobs.name: Permit-Required Job Missing Permit Check
jobs.description: Cross-references scheduled jobs flagged as permit-required against your permit tracking log and flags any that are scheduled or already in progress without a filed permit on record. Use this if a job has ever been inspected, or reinspected, only to find out a permit was never pulled because nobody double-checked before the crew rolled out.

jobs.name: Personal Goal Progress Check-in
jobs.description: Periodically reviews a tracked list of personal goals or resolutions, summarizes progress, and flags any goal with no recent movement. Use this if you tend to set goals in January and lose track of where they stand by spring.

jobs.name: Personal Trainer Client Caseload Balance Check
jobs.description: Counts active clients per trainer and flags anyone carrying a caseload far above or below the target range, so overloaded trainers don't burn out and underloaded trainers don't sit idle while new sign-ups pile up elsewhere. Use this if a trainer has ever quietly ended up with double the clients of a teammate because new sign-ups kept defaulting to whoever was popular, without anyone rebalancing the roster.

jobs.name: Pest Control Service Due Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds facility staff when the next scheduled pest-control service visit under the facility's service contract is coming up. Use this if pest control visits have ever been missed or scheduled late because nobody was tracking the contract's service schedule.

jobs.name: Pest Control Treatment Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to schedule or perform your recurring pest control treatment based on how long it's been since the last one. Use this if you've ever had ants or spiders come back inside because the quarterly treatment quietly slipped to twice a year.

jobs.name: Pest/Disease Outbreak Alert
jobs.description: Checks regional pest and crop disease reports (extension service bulletins, degree-day pest models, or similar) for elevated risk near your fields and alerts you before an infestation gets out of hand. Use this if you've ever spotted an outbreak in your own field a week after neighboring farms already knew it was coming.

jobs.name: Pesticide/Chemical Application Log Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks that every chemical/pesticide application logged this week has the fields most state licensing boards require (applicator ID, product name, EPA registration number, site, rate) filled in, and flags rows missing any of them. Use this if you've ever been asked for application records during a state inspection and found gaps in the log.

jobs.name: Pesticide Applicator License Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each crew member's pesticide/herbicide applicator license expiration date and flags anyone expiring within your warning window. Use this if a technician has ever sprayed a client's lawn with an expired license because nobody was tracking renewal dates.

jobs.name: Pet Boarding/Sitter Booking Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to book a boarding kennel or pet sitter for your trip dates before good slots fill up, especially around holidays. Use this if you've ever started calling kennels two weeks out and found every one booked solid for your travel dates.

jobs.name: Boarding Vaccination Proof-on-File Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans your client roster for pets whose vaccination proof on file (rabies, bordetella, etc.) has expired or is expiring soon, which most boarding and daycare facilities require before admission. Use this if you've ever had a pet arrive for a stay only to discover at check-in that their paperwork was out of date. This just checks the records you already have on file for admission purposes — it does not administer or schedule the vaccines themselves.

jobs.name: Pet Care Instructions Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags boarded or daycare pets whose feeding, medication-administration, or special-care instructions on file haven't been reviewed or updated in a while. Use this if a pet's care routine has ever changed (new diet, new dosage) without the facility's notes catching up, leading to staff following outdated instructions. This is a record-freshness check, not a medical review.

jobs.name: Pet Insurance Claim Submission Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks completed visits flagged for pet-insurance claim submission and flags any where the claim still hasn't actually been filed with the insurer past a reasonable turnaround. Use this if a client's pet insurance reimbursement has ever been delayed for weeks because the clinic's own claim paperwork sat unsubmitted, not because the insurer was slow.

jobs.name: Pet Medication Refill Request Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks pending prescription/food refill requests against how long they've been waiting and flags anything past a reasonable turnaround. Use this if a client has ever run out of a pet's chronic medication (e.g. thyroid or seizure medication) because a refill request sat unanswered in the queue over a weekend.

jobs.name: Pet Microchip ID On File Check
jobs.description: Scans your boarding/daycare client roster for pets with no microchip ID recorded on file. Use this if a pet has ever gotten loose during a walk or play session and staff had nothing to give a shelter or scanner-holding finder beyond a physical description.

jobs.name: Client Pet Profile Field Completeness Check
jobs.description: Scans your client-pet profile records for required fields (allergies, medications, behavior notes, etc.) that were never actually filled in and lists which pets are missing which fields. Use this if a pet has ever started boarding or daycare with a blank allergy or medication field because intake was rushed and nobody caught it was empty.

jobs.name: Pet Vaccination Due Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you before your pet's next vaccination or booster is due so you can schedule a vet visit in time, rather than finding out at a check-up that a shot lapsed. Use this if you manage your pet's vaccine schedule yourself instead of relying on vet office reminders.

jobs.name: Pet Vaccine Due Reminder
jobs.description: Checks which patients are due or overdue for a vaccine and lists them for outreach. Use this if a pet has ever gone a year past due for a core vaccine because the reminder postcard got lost in the mail.

jobs.name: Petty Cash Float Reconciliation
jobs.description: Checks that a petty cash log's starting float minus logged expenses plus replenishments matches the expected remaining balance, and flags any variance. Use this if a physical cash box or float has ever come up short (or over) and nobody could explain why.

jobs.name: Pharmacist License and DEA Registration Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks each pharmacist's state pharmacy license and DEA registration expiration dates and warns before either lapses. Use this if you've ever worried a pharmacist could end up dispensing on an expired license or registration because renewal paperwork got missed.

jobs.name: Pharmacy-Initiated Prior Authorization Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks prior-authorization requests the pharmacy has submitted to a PBM or insurer on a patient's behalf and flags any still awaiting a decision past a reasonable wait time. Use this if a patient has ever been stuck without their medication because a PA request the pharmacy sent out got lost in someone's queue with no follow-up.

jobs.name: Pharmacy Technician Certification Tracking
jobs.description: Tracks each pharmacy technician's certification (e.g. PTCB/ExCPT) and state registration expiration dates and warns before either lapses. Use this if you've ever discovered a technician's certification had already expired when it came up during a routine check.

jobs.name: Phishing Simulation Failure Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Looks at the results of a phishing-simulation campaign for users who clicked the link or submitted credentials, then flags anyone who hasn't yet completed the required follow-up security training. Use this if past campaigns have found people who failed the test but training assignments quietly fell through the cracks afterward.

jobs.name: Photo Backup Verification Check
jobs.description: Checks recent shoots for a confirmed second/off-site backup copy and flags any shoot whose photos or footage still live on only one card or drive. Use this if you've ever realized days later that a wedding or event shoot had no backup and a single failed card would have meant losing it forever.

jobs.name: Photography Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks invoices issued to clients for shoots (weddings, portraits, commercial jobs) against your standard aging buckets and flags any that are still unpaid past the threshold you set. Use this if a client has ever taken delivery of their gallery or final edits without paying, and the overdue invoice just quietly sat there until you happened to notice.

jobs.name: Photography Liability & Equipment Insurance Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks the studio's general liability and camera/gear insurance certificates against their expiry date and flags any lapsing within your warning window. Use this if a venue has ever asked for a current certificate of insurance right before a shoot and you weren't sure whether yours had quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Photography Referral Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Flags clients who referred a new photography or videography booking but haven't yet been thanked or rewarded, and drafts the thank-you message. Use this if a client has ever sent you a great referral and you never got around to acknowledging it, so they quietly stopped sending more.

jobs.name: Shoot Day Reminder Drafts
jobs.description: Reads tomorrow's scheduled shoots and drafts a short reminder message for each client confirming the date, time, location, and what to bring or wear. Use this if a client has ever shown up late, at the wrong location, or in the wrong outfit because nobody sent a reminder the day before.

jobs.name: Physician Order Verification Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks new physician orders (medication changes, new treatments, diet or care-level changes) for ones that haven't been countersigned or verified by a licensed nurse within the required window, and flags the ones running behind. Use this if a physician order has ever sat unverified for days because a verbal or faxed order got logged but nobody circled back to formally sign off on it.

jobs.name: Physician Peer Review Case Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags cases referred for medical staff peer review that haven't been completed within a configurable time window. Use this if a peer review case has ever sat open for months, leaving a quality concern unresolved and a credentialing file incomplete — distinct from patient-safety-incident-report-followup-check.yaml, which tracks general safety incident follow-up, not the formal medical staff peer review process specifically.

jobs.name: Piano & Specialty Item Insurance Check
jobs.description: Checks scheduled moves that include declared specialty or high-value items (piano, art, safe, and similar) against whether supplemental insurance coverage was offered and documented, and flags any that weren't. Use this if a piano or safe has ever been damaged in transit and the customer found out only afterward that nobody offered them extra coverage for it.

jobs.name: Pick/Pack Error Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks recent order fulfillment error rate (wrong item, wrong quantity, missing item) against a target and flags it when it climbs. Use this if a fulfillment error rate has ever crept up for weeks before a spike in return/complaint volume made the problem impossible to ignore.

jobs.name: Pet Pickup Authorization Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks today's scheduled boarding and daycare pickups against each pet's list of authorized pickup people, and flags any pickup entry naming someone not on that list. Use this if a pet has ever nearly been released to someone who wasn't actually authorized because the front desk didn't have the list handy at the moment.

jobs.name: Pipeline Hygiene Audit
jobs.description: Finds open deals missing basic required fields, like an amount, a close date, or a next step, so forecasts and reports aren't quietly built on bad data. Use this if a forecast has ever been wrong because half the pipeline had blank fields nobody was checking for.

jobs.name: Pipeline Stage Conversion Check
jobs.description: Reviews conversion rates between hiring stages (applied, screened, onsite, offer) and flags whichever stage is bleeding candidates faster than usual. Use this if a role has ever quietly stalled because one specific stage — like phone screens never converting to onsites — was the real bottleneck and no one had looked at the funnel that way.

jobs.name: Pitch Win-Rate Trend Check
jobs.description: Compares the agency's new-business win rate (opportunities won divided by opportunities closed, won or lost) over the current period against the trailing baseline, and flags a meaningful drop. Use this if the pitch team has ever gone a whole quarter losing more often than usual before anyone compared the numbers to prior quarters instead of just talking about the latest loss. Distinct from new-business-pipeline-stale-check, which flags individual opportunities that have gone quiet rather than the aggregate win-rate trend across all closed pitches.

jobs.name: Placement Fill-Rate vs Open Orders Check
jobs.description: Compares how many open job orders from clients got filled with candidates this period against how many came in, and calls out branches or recruiters whose fill rate is dropping. Use this if you only find out fill rate is slipping once a client complains about slow turnaround.

jobs.name: Planned Giving / Bequest Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Reviews donors who've expressed a planned gift or bequest intention and flags ones who haven't been stewarded in a while, since these relationships need ongoing care for years before the gift ever materializes. Use this if a bequest intention has ever been logged once and then forgotten for years, only for the organization to lose touch with the donor long before the estate was ever settled.

jobs.name: Planogram Compliance Audit Check
jobs.description: Reviews a store's shelf/floor photos against the current planogram and flags sections that are out of compliance. Use this if a reset has ever quietly drifted out of plan for weeks — wrong facings, missing end-caps, product in the wrong bay — before a district visit caught it.

jobs.name: Plant Watering Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to water a specific plant once it's due. Use this if you've ever lost a plant to "I'll water it tomorrow."

jobs.name: Platform Certification Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Warns you before a console platform's certification/submission deadline (TRC, XR, Lotcheck, or a store compliance re-check) arrives. Use this if a cert deadline has ever slipped past because it lived in one producer's memory instead of anyone's calendar, delaying a launch or risking a platform holder relationship.

jobs.name: Platform Policy and Algorithm Change Monitor
jobs.description: Checks official platform blogs/changelogs for monetization, community guideline, or algorithm updates that could affect your channel. Use this if a policy change has ever hit your monetization or reach before you'd even heard it was coming.

jobs.name: Esports Player Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a roster player's or staff member's contract expires. Use this if a player has ever gone unsigned mid-season because a contract end date slipped past without anyone flagging it in time to negotiate a renewal.

jobs.name: Player Retention Cohort Watch
jobs.description: Checks your game's Day-1/Day-7/Day-30 player retention rates and flags when a recent cohort is falling off faster than usual. Use this if you've ever shipped a change and only found out weeks later, from a quarterly report, that new players stopped coming back.

jobs.name: Playground Equipment Safety Inspection Check
jobs.description: Checks each piece of playground equipment against its required inspection interval and flags anything overdue. Use this if a swing, climber, or piece of fall-surfacing has ever gone past its inspection window without anyone noticing until a parent or inspector pointed out visible wear.

jobs.name: Daycare Playgroup Compatibility Note Check
jobs.description: Checks recently added dogs in each daycare playgroup for a logged compatibility/pairing observation note, and flags anyone still missing one past your observation window. Use this if a new dog has ever kept running with the same playgroup week after week without any staff member actually logging how it's getting along with the others.

jobs.name: Playtest Feedback Digest
jobs.description: Summarizes new closed-beta or playtest survey responses and bug reports into recurring themes so design and QA don't have to read every submission individually. Use this if valuable playtester feedback has ever sat unread in a form's response sheet until the build was already locked.

jobs.name: PMS and Channel Manager Inventory Sync Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares room availability counts exported from your PMS against what the channel manager shows for the same room types and dates, and flags any mismatch. Use this if a room has ever sold on an OTA after it was already blocked out-of-order in the PMS, because the channel manager sync silently fell behind.

jobs.name: PO Receiving Quantity Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares the quantity ordered on each purchase order line against the quantity actually logged as received and flags shortages or overages past a threshold. Use this if a supplier has ever shorted or over-shipped a PO and it only got noticed weeks later when a count came up wrong.

jobs.name: Sales-Led POC Conversion Tracker
jobs.description: Flags sales-assisted proof-of-concept (POC) engagements approaching or past their end date with no closed-won or closed-lost outcome recorded. Use this if an enterprise POC has ever quietly run past its agreed end date with no clear owner pushing toward a decision.

jobs.name: Podcast Download Drop Watch
jobs.description: Compares a new episode's early download numbers against your recent average and flags a real drop. Use this if a listenership decline has ever gone unnoticed for months because nobody compared episode numbers side by side.

jobs.name: Educational Podcast/Lecture Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts how many items are queued in your "to listen/watch" list of educational podcasts or lecture recordings and warns if the backlog has grown too large to realistically get through. Use this if your queue of "I'll listen to that later" talks and episodes only ever grows.

jobs.name: Podcast Rating/Review Watch
jobs.description: Checks for new ratings and reviews on your podcast platforms and flags a negative one or a rating drop worth looking into. Use this if a critical review has ever sat unanswered for months because nobody checks the ratings page between episodes.

jobs.name: Pole Attachment Audit Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds staff when it's time to run the periodic audit comparing third-party attachments (telecom and cable lines) physically found on utility-owned poles against what's on file in the billing records, and surfaces poles whose last audit is overdue. Use this if your utility leases pole space to telecom/cable companies and wants to catch attachments that were never added to billing, so you're not leaving attachment-fee revenue on the table or carrying unauthorized equipment.

jobs.name: Policy Cancellation & Lapse Rate Monitor
jobs.description: Calculates the weekly policy cancellation/lapse rate and flags it when it climbs past a healthy baseline, so retention teams can react before a leaky book turns into a shrinking one. Use this if a rising lapse rate has ever gone unnoticed until a quarterly report showed the book had quietly shrunk.

jobs.name: Policy Reinstatement Window Tracker
jobs.description: Checks policies that have already lapsed for non-payment against each carrier's reinstatement deadline and flags anyone still inside the window who hasn't been contacted. Use this if a policy has ever slipped past its reinstatement deadline and became a brand-new (and underwritten-from-scratch) application instead of a same-terms reinstatement, just because nobody reached out in time.

jobs.name: Policy Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before an insurance policy's renewal date so you have time to shop around or review coverage, instead of auto-renewing on autopilot. Use this if you've ever realized a policy renewed months ago at a higher rate without you noticing.

jobs.name: Pool Chemical Balance Check Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to test and balance your pool's chemical levels based on how long it's been since the last test. Use this if you've ever opened the pool to cloudy water or algae because testing slipped for a couple of weeks.

jobs.name: Pool Water Chemistry Log Check
jobs.description: Reviews logged pool chlorine and pH readings against safe operating ranges and flags any reading out of range or any day with a missing reading entirely. Use this if your facility has a pool and a reading has ever been skipped on a busy day, leaving a gap that would look bad in a health-inspector review or, worse, an actual chemistry problem that went unnoticed until a member complained.

jobs.name: Port Congestion Watch
jobs.description: Checks a port's average vessel wait time and flags it once congestion crosses your threshold. Use this if a congested port has ever blown up a shipping timeline before anyone checked the wait times.

jobs.name: Portfolio Rebalance Check
jobs.description: Compares your current asset allocation to your target and flags drift worth rebalancing. Use this if your portfolio only gets rebalanced whenever you happen to remember to look.

jobs.name: POS End-of-Day Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the POS system's expected cash-drawer total against what was actually counted at close and flags any shift over the acceptable variance. Use this if a drawer has ever come up short (or suspiciously over) and nobody traced it back to which shift it happened on.

jobs.name: POS Till Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Checks each register's end-of-day cash count against expected POS totals and flags any discrepancy. Use this if a till has ever come up short for days running before anyone connected the pattern to a specific shift or register.

jobs.name: POS Void & Refund Anomaly Tracker
jobs.description: Flags cashiers or registers with an unusually high rate of transaction voids and refunds instead of treating each one as an isolated event. Use this if register-level fraud or sweethearting has ever gone unnoticed for months because void/refund activity was never rolled up per employee.

jobs.name: Post-Event Lead/Attendee CRM Export SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since the event ended and whether the attendee/lead data has been exported to the CRM yet, and flags it once the export SLA is at risk. Use this if a sales team has ever lost momentum on hot event leads because the attendee list sat in a spreadsheet for two weeks before anyone loaded it into the CRM.

jobs.name: Post-Event Survey Response Rate Watch
jobs.description: Compares how many attendees were sent a post-event survey against how many actually responded, and flags events with a weak response rate. Use this if you've ever sent a feedback survey after an event and had no idea whether the response rate was normal or a sign nobody cared to reply.

jobs.name: Post-Event Vendor Invoice Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: After an event wraps, compares each vendor's final invoice against what was actually contracted (and any signed change orders) and flags mismatches before you pay. Use this if you've ever paid a final invoice that quietly included a fee never approved, because nobody checked it against the contract.

jobs.name: Post-Purchase Upsell Email Performance Watch
jobs.description: Checks your automated post-purchase upsell/cross-sell email flow's recent performance against its own baseline and digs into whether a drop is a broken template or stale recommendation logic rather than waning customer interest. Use this if that flow has ever quietly under-performed for months because nobody looked past the "it's still sending" status.

jobs.name: Post-Trip Expense Report Submission Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you daily after a business trip ends that the expense report itself still needs to be submitted, until it's marked done. Use this if you've ever collected every receipt perfectly during a trip and then let the actual report submission slip past the deadline anyway.

jobs.name: Powered Industrial Truck License Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each operator's powered industrial truck (forklift/PIT) certification expiry date and flags anyone due for recertification soon or already expired. Use this if an operator has ever kept driving a forklift on an expired certification because nobody was tracking individual recert dates separately from the equipment's own inspection schedule.

jobs.name: PPAP Submission Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks Production Part Approval Process (PPAP) packages owed to customers and flags ones approaching or past their commitment date. Use this if a customer has ever put a program on hold because a PPAP submission was late and nobody was watching the date.

jobs.name: Technician PPE & Safety Equipment Inspection Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews logged safety-equipment inspections (harnesses, gas monitors, ladders, insulated gloves) against your required inspection interval and flags any technician overdue for a check. Use this if a tech has ever shown up to a job with expired gloves or an unchecked gas monitor because nobody was tracking the last inspection date.

jobs.name: PPO Fee Schedule Write-Off Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares billed and allowed amounts from a payments log against a reference PPO fee schedule, per CDT code, and flags procedures where the write-off or reimbursement drifts past a configurable percentage from what the fee schedule says it should be. Use this if a PPO plan has quietly started underpaying (or the practice's fee schedule reference has gone stale) and it's only visible by comparing many claims at once.

jobs.name: PQL-to-Sales Handoff SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it took a sales rep to first respond after a product-qualified lead was flagged, and reports any that breached the response-time SLA. Use this if PQLs get correctly identified but then sit untouched in a queue for days because there's no check on what happens after the flag is raised.

jobs.name: Skill Practice Streak Check
jobs.description: Checks a practice log file for a skill you're building (language, instrument, coding kata, technical interview practice problems) and warns if too many days have passed since the last logged session. Use this if a daily practice habit has ever quietly lapsed without you noticing until weeks had gone by. Generic and log-format agnostic — point log_file_path at any file with one dated entry per line (plain date, or a CSV with the date as the first column).

jobs.name: Pre-Employment Background Check Tracker
jobs.description: Checks pending new-hire background checks against their scheduled start date and flags any that won't clear in time. Use this if you've ever had a new hire show up on day one before their background check actually came back clean.

jobs.name: Pre-Trip Packing List Reminder
jobs.description: Generates a packing checklist tailored to your trip length, destination climate, and purpose a few days before departure. Use this if you've ever packed in a rush the morning of a flight and forgotten something obvious.

jobs.name: Pre-Visit Intake and Consent Form Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming appointments for patients who haven't completed required intake paperwork or consent forms yet, so the front desk can chase it down before the visit instead of during check-in. Use this if a visit has ever run late, or a procedure got delayed, because a patient showed up without a completed intake packet or a required consent form on file.

jobs.name: Premium Payment Delinquency Tracker
jobs.description: Scans the book of business for policyholders past due on premium payments and flags accounts approaching cancellation-for-nonpayment, so collections or retention outreach can happen before a policy lapses. Use this if delinquent accounts have ever piled up unnoticed until a batch of policies cancelled all at once.

jobs.name: Insurance Premium Payment Due Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before an insurance premium payment is due, separate from the policy's renewal date. Use this if a policy has ever lapsed for non-payment even though the renewal itself was months away, because a monthly or quarterly premium payment was missed.

jobs.name: Preorder Allocation Oversell Check
jobs.description: Compares preorders taken for a not-yet-arrived product against the units your supplier has actually confirmed and allocated, and flags any SKU that's oversold or getting close to it. Use this if a preorder campaign has ever taken more orders than the incoming shipment could actually cover, leaving you to cancel or delay orders after taking people's money.

jobs.name: Pre-Order Campaign Milestone Tracker
jobs.description: Checks pre-order counts against the campaign's milestone targets ahead of publication day, so a lagging campaign can get an extra marketing push while there's still time. Use this if a pre-order push has ever quietly underperformed and nobody noticed until launch week, when it was too late to course-correct.

jobs.name: Prep List vs. Actual Usage Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares how much of each item was prepped against how much was actually used or sold, flagging items where prep consistently runs far above or below actual demand. Use this if the kitchen has ever guessed at prep quantities and you suspected over-prepping (and wasting) or under-prepping (and 86'ing) certain items but never measured it.

jobs.name: Prescriber DEA Number Validation Check
jobs.description: Checks each controlled-substance prescription's prescriber DEA number against the standard DEA checksum format and flags any that fail the check before the fill goes out. Use this if a malformed or mistyped DEA number has ever slipped through on a controlled-substance script and only gotten caught (or not) well after the fact.

jobs.name: Prescription Refill Request Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks pending prescription refill requests against how long they've been waiting and flags anything past a reasonable turnaround. Use this if a refill request has ever sat in a queue long enough that a patient ran out of a maintenance medication before the practice got to it.

jobs.name: Press Release Media Pitch Drafter
jobs.description: Looks at pending press releases and your media contact list, then drafts a short, tailored pitch note for each contact whose beat matches the release. Use this if press releases have ever gone out as one generic blast to the whole media list instead of a pitch that actually speaks to what each outlet or journalist covers.

jobs.name: Press Release Pickup Tracking
jobs.description: Searches for media pickups of a recent press release and reports which outlets ran it. Use this if a press release has ever gone out and nobody actually confirmed whether any outlets picked it up.

jobs.name: Pressure Ulcer Risk Assessment Due Check
jobs.description: Checks each resident's most recent standardized skin/pressure-injury risk assessment (e.g. Braden Scale) against the required reassessment interval and flags anyone whose assessment is due or overdue. Use this if you want a standing check that skin-risk scores stay current instead of being assumed accurate months after they were last done.

jobs.name: Preventive Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Flags equipment coming due for scheduled preventive maintenance. Use this if a machine has ever failed unexpectedly that would've been caught by a PM visit nobody scheduled in time.

jobs.name: Price Match Guarantee Request Tracker
jobs.description: Checks logged price-match-guarantee requests against how long the policy allows for them to be resolved, and flags any request still sitting open past that window. Use this if customers submit price-match requests and you want to make sure none are quietly going stale and souring a customer who is waiting on a refund or adjustment.

jobs.name: Price Tag Audit Accuracy Check
jobs.description: Reviews photos of shelf price tags against the current POS price file and flags mismatches. Use this if a customer has ever caught a scan-versus-tag price discrepancy at the register before the store did — those add up fast in refunds, complaints, and occasional fines.

jobs.name: Pricing Page Bounce Rate Watch
jobs.description: Pulls the pricing page's bounce rate from your analytics API and flags when it climbs above a healthy ceiling. Use this if the pricing page is the highest-intent page on the site but nobody watches its bounce rate the way they'd watch checkout conversion, even though a spike usually means confusing tiers, a broken layout, or a recent price change scaring people off.

jobs.name: Print Lab Order Status Check
jobs.description: Checks outstanding print, canvas, and album orders sent to your lab against their expected turnaround time and flags any running late. Use this if a client has ever emailed asking where their prints or wedding album are before you'd even noticed the lab was behind.

jobs.name: Print Run Reorder Threshold Check
jobs.description: Flags titles whose warehouse stock has dropped below the reorder threshold, so a reprint can be queued before the book goes out of stock. Use this if a title has ever gone unavailable for weeks because nobody noticed the print run was running low until it was already sold out.

jobs.name: Print Sales Upsell Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Flags clients whose digital gallery was delivered a while ago but who haven't ordered any prints, canvases, or albums yet, and drafts a gentle upsell message before the gallery expires. Use this if you've ever left real print revenue on the table because nobody followed up before a client's gallery access quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Print Vendor Quality Claim Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks open quality-control claims filed against a print vendor (binding defects, color mismatch, damaged stock) and flags ones nearing the vendor's response or credit deadline unresolved. Use this if a printing defect claim has ever gone stale and the vendor's claim window closed before you got a credit or reprint commitment.

jobs.name: Printer Supply Level Check
jobs.description: Checks the toner and paper levels reported by shared print stations against a low-supply threshold, so members don't hit a mid-print "out of paper" or "toner low" wall with no one around to fix it. Use this if you want a heads-up on which print stations need restocking before it becomes a member complaint.

jobs.name: Prior Authorization Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks treatment-specific prior-authorization requests for approvals about to expire before the procedure happens, and for requests still stuck awaiting payer response. Use this if a procedure has ever been delayed or denied because the prior auth expired, or the payer never responded and nobody was tracking it — distinct from insurance-eligibility-verification-check, which covers general visit eligibility rather than a specific treatment's authorization.

jobs.name: Ticket Priority-Severity Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Reads tickets marked low or normal priority and checks whether their content or how long they've dragged on actually reads as more severe than the priority field suggests. Use this if a ticket has ever sat quietly in the standard queue for days because it was tagged "low" at intake, when the customer's own words described a business-critical outage.

jobs.name: Private Event Booking Pipeline Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Flags private event and group booking inquiries that have gone quiet without a follow-up in too long, so leads don't die from neglect. Use this if an event inquiry has ever sat in an inbox for weeks with no one circling back until the prospect booked somewhere else.

jobs.name: Privileged Account Inactivity Check
jobs.description: Scans admin, root, and other privileged accounts across identity or directory systems for ones that haven't logged in for a long stretch of time, then flags those dormant accounts as a standing risk. Use this if you want to catch forgotten admin access before an attacker finds it first, since an unused privileged account is a bigger target than an unused regular one.

jobs.name: Proactive Outage Notification Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks the time between a logged product incident's detection and the customer-facing status notification going out, and flags a lag past a configurable target. Use this if customers have ever found out about an outage from filing their own tickets before the company said anything — distinct from support-tool-outage-impact-check.yaml, which watches the support platform's own uptime, not communication lag on a product-side incident.

jobs.name: Probation Period Review Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a new hire's probation period ends so a manager can complete the required review before it lapses automatically. Use this if a probation deadline has ever passed with no review on file and nobody caught it until it became a compliance headache.

jobs.name: Procurement Bid Opening Reminder
jobs.description: Checks upcoming public procurement bid/solicitation opening dates and flags the ones coming up soon so staff can prep the public bid opening (room booked, bid tabulation sheet ready, witnesses lined up). Use this if a bid opening has ever been scrambled together at the last minute because nobody was watching the calendar of open solicitations.

jobs.name: Producer Continuing Education Credit Hour Tracker
jobs.description: Adds up each licensed producer's logged continuing-education (CE) credit hours per state against what that state requires before their license renewal deadline, and flags anyone pacing behind. Use this if a producer has ever discovered a week before their license renewal that they're still short several required CE hours in one of the states they're licensed in.

jobs.name: Product A/B Test Significance Check
jobs.description: Runs a two-proportion z-test on a running in-product experiment's conversion counts and reports whether the result has reached statistical significance. Use this if experiments get called early ("variant B looks better!") or left running for months after the answer was already clear, because nobody wants to do the stats by hand.

jobs.name: Product & Chemical Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags skincare products, dye lots, wax, and other chemical inventory approaching their expiration or period-after-opening date. Use this if an esthetician or colorist has ever applied a product past its safe-use date because the expiry label was never checked against today's date.

jobs.name: Product Drop Launch Readiness Check
jobs.description: Checks your pre-launch checklist for an upcoming merch or product drop and flags anything still pending as the launch date closes in. Use this if a drop has ever gone live with the listing unpublished, samples never approved, or promo content never posted, because nobody re-checked the checklist in the final days.

jobs.name: Product Feed Health Check
jobs.description: Scans your product catalog export for listings that are live but broken in some way — missing title, missing description, missing image, a zero/blank price, or marked out-of-stock while still visible to shoppers. Use this if a product has ever sat on your storefront for weeks with a broken image or a $0 price because nobody was checking feed quality after the initial upload.

jobs.name: Product-Qualified Lead (PQL) Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews free/trial users' in-product usage for signals that they're ready for a sales conversation — hitting usage limits, inviting teammates, using premium-gated features — and flags them as PQLs. Use this if self-serve users who are clearly ready to buy only get noticed when they email support asking how to upgrade.

jobs.name: Classroom Product Safety Recall Check
jobs.description: Checks your classroom equipment and toy inventory (cribs, high chairs, toys, playpens) against recently issued CPSC recall notices and flags any match. Use this if a recalled crib, toy, or piece of equipment has ever stayed in use in a classroom for weeks after a recall notice went out simply because nobody was cross-checking the inventory against it.

jobs.name: Production Line Downtime Watch
jobs.description: Checks how long a production line has been stopped and flags it once it crosses a threshold. Use this if a line has ever sat down far longer than anyone realized because the stoppage alert never made it to the right person.

jobs.name: Production Schedule Adherence Check
jobs.description: Compares actual output against the planned production schedule and explains any meaningful variance. Use this if a schedule slip has ever gone unexplained until it was too late to recover the shift, because nobody compared plan vs. actual until the week was already over.

jobs.name: Professional Association Membership Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before your professional association or industry body membership (IEEE, PMI, ACM, a bar/medical/CPA license body, etc.) lapses. Use this if you've ever lost member pricing or a credential status because a renewal email got buried in your inbox.

jobs.name: Program Outcome Data Collection Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds program staff to submit outcome metrics ahead of a grant or board reporting cycle, and drafts the request. Use this if outcome data — people served, results achieved — has ever been scrambled together the night before a report was due because nobody asked for it early enough.

jobs.name: Podcast Programmatic Ad Fill Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks your ad network's impression fill rate from its delivery report and flags a run of underdelivery. Use this if you've ever assumed programmatic ad revenue was steady only to find out weeks later the network had been leaving a chunk of your ad inventory unsold.

jobs.name: Project Budget vs. Actual Cost Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual spend against budget by cost code for each active project and flags codes running over threshold. Use this if a project has ever "felt fine" right up until closeout, when the actual cost report showed a cost code had been bleeding over budget for months unnoticed.

jobs.name: Project Closeout Checklist Check
jobs.description: Checks recently completed client projects against the standard closeout checklist (final assets delivered and archived, usage rights transferred, final invoice sent, retainer/SOW closed out, post-mortem scheduled) and flags any project marked done with steps still open. Use this if a project has ever been called "finished" only for someone to discover weeks later that the final files were never archived or the closing invoice never went out.

jobs.name: Project Closeout Document Collection Tracker
jobs.description: Checks the closeout checklist for a project nearing substantial completion and flags which required documents, like O&M manuals, warranties, as-builts, and final lien waivers, are still missing so final payment isn't held up chasing paperwork at the last minute. Use this if final payment or retainage release has ever stalled for weeks because closeout documents trickled in one at a time after the punch list was already done.

jobs.name: Project Profitability Check
jobs.description: Compares each active project's actual hours and cost logged so far against its budgeted hours and cost, and flags the ones trending over budget. Use this if a project has ever quietly eaten its margin because nobody noticed logged hours creeping past what was budgeted until the project was already closed out.

jobs.name: Promotional Rate Expiry Transition Check
jobs.description: Lists tenants whose introductory or promotional rental rate is about to roll over to the standard published rate, so staff can notify them ahead of the increase instead of it showing up unannounced on a bill. Use this if you offer move-in specials or discounted first months and have ever had a tenant complain about a surprise rate jump.

jobs.name: Proof-of-Delivery Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Checks shipments marked delivered against whether a signed proof-of- delivery has actually been received and filed. Use this if a delivery dispute has ever dragged on for weeks because nobody could produce the POD to settle it.

jobs.name: Property Access Info Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since each client's property-access details (garage codes, key locations, alarm codes, gate codes) were last confirmed and flags anyone overdue for a re-verification call or text. Use this if a crew has ever shown up to a job and the door code no longer worked because the client changed it and nobody updated the file.

jobs.name: Customer Property Access Instructions Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags customer property access notes (gate codes, lockbox codes, dog warnings, parking instructions) that haven't been confirmed or updated in longer than your target interval, since stale access notes are a common cause of tech delays and no-shows. Use this if a tech has ever arrived to a locked gate with an old code, or gotten surprised by a dog nobody flagged, because the access notes hadn't been checked in over a year.

jobs.name: Client Property-Access Note Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks each client's property access notes (gate codes, dog warnings, key locations) for how long it's been since they were last confirmed and flags any that are older than your staleness window. Use this if a crew has ever been locked out by a changed gate code, or surprised by a dog nobody warned them about because the notes hadn't been updated in a year.

jobs.name: Property Damage Waiver Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each client's signed property-damage waiver or liability acknowledgment against its expiry or renewal date and flags anyone whose waiver has lapsed or is about to. Use this if a damage claim has ever come up on a job and nobody could confirm whether a current, signed waiver was actually on file for that client.

jobs.name: Property Listing Syndication Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks each active vacancy listing's syndication endpoint and flags listings that haven't been refreshed recently or that return an error, so a unit doesn't sit invisible on Zillow or the MLS while marked "active" internally. Use this if a listing has ever gone stale on a syndication site while your internal system still showed it as live.

jobs.name: Property Maintenance Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Tracks when each property was last inspected and flags any that are due for their next routine walkthrough. Use this if a property has ever gone a year or more without a proper inspection because nothing forced anyone to schedule one.

jobs.name: Property Tax Assessment Appeal Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: From the assessor's office side, checks filed property assessment appeals against their statutory hearing or decision deadline and flags any at risk of missing it. Use this if an appeal has ever blown past its required hearing deadline and gotten resolved in the property owner's favor by default because the board of review ran out of time.

jobs.name: Property Tax Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a property tax payment is due for a tracked property. Use this if a property tax bill has ever gone unpaid past the deadline because it arrived by mail and got buried, resulting in penalties or a lien risk.

jobs.name: Proposal Follow-Up Nudge
jobs.description: Checks which sent proposals/quotes have had no reply after a set number of days and drafts a short follow-up nudge for each. Use this if a proposal has ever gone quiet after you sent it, and only much later did you realize nobody had followed up.

jobs.name: Protocol Audit & Bug Bounty Status Watch
jobs.description: Checks whether a DeFi protocol you use still has an active bug bounty program and no newly published audit findings of concern, and flags it if the bounty lapsed or a new audit surfaced an unresolved issue. Use this if you've ever picked a protocol partly for its audit/bounty reputation and never checked again whether that was still true.

jobs.name: Protocol Exploit/Hack News Monitor
jobs.description: Checks security news sources and a protocol's official channels for reports of an exploit, hack, or exchange/protocol pause affecting a project you have funds in. Use this if you've ever heard about a hack secondhand a day later, after you could have moved funds out in time.

jobs.name: Protocol/DAO Treasury Runway Watch
jobs.description: Calculates how many months of runway a DAO or protocol treasury has left given its current balance and monthly burn rate, and flags it once runway drops below a threshold. Use this if a project you're invested in or contribute to has ever announced a sudden funding crunch that, in hindsight, the numbers had been signaling for months.

jobs.name: Pseudoephedrine Sales Log Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews the pharmacy's logged pseudoephedrine (and other Combat Methamphetamine Epidemic Act-tracked) sales for a day and flags any entry missing an ID record, or any buyer approaching the legal purchase limit across recent purchases. Use this if a pseudoephedrine sale has ever been logged without full ID info, or a buyer's running total has ever gone unchecked until an audit caught it.

jobs.name: Psychotropic Medication Gradual Dose Reduction Review Check
jobs.description: Checks residents on an ongoing psychotropic medication (antipsychotic, antianxiety, antidepressant, or sedative/hypnotic) for the required periodic gradual-dose-reduction (GDR) or clinical-necessity review and flags anyone whose review is due or overdue. Use this if you want to catch a psychotropic order that's been on autopilot past its required review point, a common focus of state and federal unnecessary-drug-use surveys.

jobs.name: PTO Balance Check
jobs.description: Warns you before unused PTO expires or resets. Use this if you've ever lost vacation days because you forgot they don't roll over.

jobs.name: Holiday / PTO Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Scans upcoming PTO in a shared calendar export and flags any day where too few team members are covering, or where a designated role (on-call, approver) has nobody available. Use this if you've ever discovered on a Monday morning that half the team was out the same week and nobody planned coverage.

jobs.name: Company-Wide PTO Use-It-or-Lose-It Check
jobs.description: Scans the full employee roster for anyone whose unused PTO balance is above the policy cap or won't be usable before the year-end reset, so HR/payroll can send a bulk nudge. Use this if payout or forfeiture disputes have ever come up in December because nobody flagged high balances company-wide until it was too late to schedule time off. This is the HR-wide roster check — for tracking just your own balance, use team/pto-balance-check instead.

jobs.name: Public Comment Period Closing Check
jobs.description: Checks open public comment periods for pending rules or proposals against their close date and flags the ones closing soon. Use this if a comment period has ever expired with barely any public input logged because nobody was tracking the closing date.

jobs.name: Public Meeting Notice Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks that an upcoming public meeting's notice was posted with enough lead time to meet open-meetings law requirements. Use this if a meeting has ever gotten challenged, or had to be redone, because notice went out a day late.

jobs.name: Legal Notice Publication Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming hearings or actions that require a statutory legal notice to run in a newspaper of record (or other designated medium) and flags ones where the required publication lead time is about to run out. Use this if a hearing has ever had to be postponed because the legal ad didn't get submitted to the paper in time to meet the required number of days, or insertions, before the hearing date.

jobs.name: Public Records Retention Purge Check
jobs.description: Checks records against their retention schedule and flags anything past its retention period as eligible for archival review or purge. Use this if a records room has ever quietly kept documents years past their legally required retention window simply because nobody was tracking expiry dates.

jobs.name: Public Works Work Order Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts open public infrastructure maintenance requests (potholes, streetlights, sidewalks, signage, storm drains) sitting past your target response time and flags the oldest ones first. Use this if a resident-reported hazard has ever sat open for weeks with nobody tracking total queue size or how old the oldest ticket really is.

jobs.name: Punch List Completion Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks open punch list items against the project's target closeout date and flags projects falling behind on completion rate. Use this if a closeout has ever dragged on for months because punch items trickled in one at a time with nobody watching the overall burn-down.

jobs.name: Puppy/Kitten Vaccine Series Compliance Check
jobs.description: Tracks young patients partway through their initial multi-dose vaccine series and flags anyone who missed the next dose window. Use this if a puppy or kitten has ever fallen off after the first shot in a series, leaving them under-protected because nobody tracked series progress separately from routine adult booster due dates — distinct from pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml, which tracks single due-date reminders rather than a multi-dose series with its own interval rules.

jobs.name: Purchase Order / Invoice Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Three-way matches purchase orders against received invoices and flags invoices whose amount or quantity doesn't match the PO within a configurable tolerance. Use this if a vendor invoice has ever gotten paid at a different price or quantity than what was actually ordered because nobody cross-checked it against the PO — distinct from duplicate-payment-detection.yaml, which catches the same invoice paid twice, not a mismatched amount on a single payment.

jobs.name: Purchase Order Receiving Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks open purchase orders to suppliers against their expected delivery date and flags any that are overdue and not yet marked received. Use this if stock has ever run out — or a supplier has ever gone quiet on a PO — because a purchase order was quietly late and nobody chased it until shelves were already empty.

jobs.name: Quality Defect Rate Check
jobs.description: Pulls today's defect rate from your quality inspection records so the number is ready without anyone running the query by hand. Use this if a quality problem has ever run for a full shift before anyone pulled the numbers and noticed.

jobs.name: Quality Hold Stock Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags inventory sitting on a quality/QA hold, quarantine, or recall-pending status for longer than a set number of days without a disposition decision (release, return to supplier, or scrap). Use this if stock has ever sat untouched on "hold" for weeks because nobody owned deciding what to do with it, tying up space and value in the meantime.

jobs.name: Clinical Quality Measure Care Gap Tracking
jobs.description: Checks a panel of patients against HEDIS-style clinical quality measures (A1c screening, colorectal cancer screening, blood pressure control, and similar) and lists who's still an open gap as the measurement period winds down. Use this if a quality measure's performance rate has ever come in lower than expected at year-end only because nobody was tracking open gaps until the reporting deadline forced a scramble.

jobs.name: Quarterly Estimated Tax Calculator
jobs.description: Calculates a suggested quarterly estimated tax payment from your logged year-to-date income and a target tax rate, and warns as the next IRS-style quarterly due date approaches. Use this if you're self-employed or have untaxed income and want the actual dollar amount worked out, not just a bare date reminder (see tax-deadline-reminder for a generic multi-jurisdiction deadline list).

jobs.name: Quarterly Learning Goal Review
jobs.description: Every quarter, reviews your stated learning goals against what you've actually logged and helps you decide what to keep, drop, or add. Use this if you set ambitious learning goals in January and never look at them again until next January.

jobs.name: Queue Depth Check
jobs.description: Checks how backed up a job queue is and warns if it crosses a threshold. Use this if a stuck worker has ever let a queue silently balloon until someone noticed customers weren't getting emails.

jobs.name: Quota Attainment Check
jobs.description: Compares a rep's closed-won revenue this period against their quota pace and flags whether they're on track. Use this if a rep has ever found out they missed quota only at the end of the quarter, instead of with enough runway left to fix it.

jobs.name: Sales Quote Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Flags outstanding price quotes that are about to expire before the customer has accepted them. Use this if a quote has ever lapsed and forced a re-negotiation because nobody followed up before the locked-in pricing ran out.

jobs.name: Quote-to-Bind Conversion Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates the quote-to-bind conversion rate over the trailing period and flags it when it drops below target, so sales/underwriting leaders catch a pricing or process problem while it's still small. Use this if a falling close rate has ever gone unnoticed for a full quarter because nobody was watching quotes lost, only policies written.

jobs.name: Quote-to-Invoice Conversion Follow-Up
jobs.description: Flags quotes/estimates that were sent to a customer but never approved or converted into a scheduled job after a set number of days, and drafts a follow-up nudge for each. Use this if quotes have ever gone quiet after being sent — no yes, no no, just silence — and nobody circled back to close the sale. Applies to any vertical that sends a quote/estimate and waits on a yes: e.g. a moving company can track binding vs. non-binding estimates and flag ones with an upcoming requested move date by adding an `estimate_type` and target-date column to the CSV and treating them as extra `job_description` detail (see `optional_columns` note below) — no separate job needed.

jobs.name: Rabies Certificate/Tag Issuance Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks patients who received a rabies vaccine and flags any where the signed rabies certificate and tag haven't actually been issued to the owner within a reasonable window. Use this if a rabies vaccine has ever been given and logged, but the client left without the paper certificate or tag that's legally required for licensing — distinct from pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml, which tracks upcoming/overdue vaccine due dates rather than post-administration paperwork issuance.

jobs.name: Rack Structural Inspection Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks pallet racking structural inspection records against the required inspection interval and flags any rack run overdue for its next inspection. Use this if a damaged upright or beam has ever gone unnoticed between annual rack safety inspections.

jobs.name: Radiograph Exposure Log Audit
jobs.description: Checks the radiograph exposure log for missing dose or frequency-interval records, and flags patients x-rayed more often than the configured minimum interval allows. Use this if radiograph logging is easy to skip in the moment and only matters when a radiation-safety (ALARA) audit or an insurer asks to see it — distinct from a general equipment maintenance check, since this is about the exposure record itself, not the machine.

jobs.name: Radiograph Retake Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates the rate of x-rays that had to be retaken due to poor image quality over a trailing window, and flags it against a threshold. Use this if retakes have crept up without anyone noticing the aggregate rate — distinct from radiograph-exposure-log-audit.yaml, which checks the completeness and spacing of exposure records rather than image-quality outcomes.

jobs.name: Radon Test Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to re-test indoor radon levels based on how long it's been since the last test. Use this if you've ever assumed one clean test at move-in means you're covered for good, when levels can shift as a home settles or is renovated.

jobs.name: Rate Case Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks the active rate case's docket calendar for upcoming deadlines — testimony, discovery responses, briefs, filing dates — and reminds regulatory and finance staff which ones are due soon. Use this if a rate case filing has ever slipped or a discovery response nearly missed its deadline because it was tracked only in someone's inbox.

jobs.name: Rate Increase Notice Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming tenant rate increases against the required advance-notice period from the tenant's state and lease, and flags any increase where the notice hasn't gone out with enough lead time. Use this if you want an early warning before a rate increase becomes legally unenforceable, or triggers a complaint, because the required notice period wasn't met.

jobs.name: RAW File Retention Purge Check
jobs.description: Flags shoots whose RAW files have passed your retention policy window and are due for either archival to cold storage or deletion, so active drives don't quietly fill up with years of RAW captures nobody will ever touch again. Use this if you've ever run out of working storage mid-edit because RAW files from shoots two years old were still sitting on your primary drive.

jobs.name: Raw Material Shortage Risk Check
jobs.description: Compares raw material stock against what the production schedule needs over the next planning window, and flags anything that'll run short. Use this if a production run has ever stalled mid-shift because a component ran out and nobody had cross-checked stock against the schedule beforehand.

jobs.name: Read Replica Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks how far behind a database read replica has fallen relative to its primary and flags it when the lag exceeds an acceptable threshold. Use this if anything reads from the replica (dashboards, reports, read-only API traffic) and stale data would be confusing or wrong.

jobs.name: Reading Inbox Processing Reminder
