jobs.description: Flags customer callbacks (a return visit for the same issue within the warranty window) that are still open past a set number of days. Use this if a rework job has ever slipped through the cracks and the customer had to call a second time to get it actually fixed.

jobs.name: Unscheduled Treatment Value Report
jobs.description: Sums the dollar value of diagnosed-but-unscheduled treatment plan line items from a practice export, grouped by how long they've sat unscheduled. Use this if diagnosed treatment has ever piled up in the chart without anyone tracking how much recoverable case value was sitting there unbooked.

jobs.name: Unsigned Encounter Note Check
jobs.description: Checks completed patient encounters for clinical notes that still haven't been signed/closed by the provider and flags anything past a reasonable turnaround. Use this if a chart has ever stayed open for weeks after the visit because a note sat unsigned in a provider's queue, which can hold up billing and leaves the record legally incomplete.

jobs.name: Unused API Key Cleanup Check
jobs.description: Checks an API key usage log for keys with no recorded activity within a configurable window and flags them as candidates for revocation. Use this if an old API key has ever sat around unused and forgotten, wide open as an attack surface nobody was watching — distinct from secrets-rotation-overdue-check.yaml, which tracks whether an active key was rotated on schedule, not whether a key is unused entirely.

jobs.name: Unused Seat Invite Check
jobs.description: Finds team invites that were sent by an account admin but never accepted within a reasonable window, and lists them for a nudge or cleanup. Use this if admins invite teammates during onboarding, half those invites go stale in someone's inbox, and it's never tracked separately from whether existing seats are actually being used.

jobs.name: Unused Streaming Subscription Check
jobs.description: Compares your personal streaming and app subscriptions against actual usage logs and flags any you haven't touched in a while as cancellation candidates. Use this if you suspect you're paying for a few apps you forgot you even have.

jobs.name: Upload Cadence Consistency Check
jobs.description: Looks at your actual upload history and flags when the gaps between posts have been drifting longer than your normal rhythm — even if nothing's technically overdue yet. Use this if your posting pace has ever crept from weekly to "whenever" without any single missed post ever standing out on its own.

jobs.name: Room Upsell and Upgrade Conversion Tracker
jobs.description: Analyzes offered room upgrades and add-on upsells (early check-in, view upgrade, breakfast package) against how many guests accepted, broken down by channel and shift. Use this if front desk upsell offers have ever quietly tapered off because nobody was tracking whether the team was actually still asking.

jobs.name: Uptime Ping Check
jobs.description: Pings a URL on a schedule and flags it if it stops responding. Use this if you want a basic "is my site down" alert without paying for a monitoring service.

jobs.name: Client Usage License Expiry Check
jobs.description: Tracks time-limited commercial usage licenses you've granted clients for photos or video (e.g. a one-year ad-campaign license) and flags any approaching expiry. Use this if a commercial client has ever kept running your images in their marketing past the license window you actually sold them, without anyone offering a renewal first.

jobs.name: Usage Rights & License Expiration Check
jobs.description: Checks licensed creative assets — stock photos, video, music, or fonts used in client work — for usage-rights terms nearing their expiration date, and flags the ones that need renewal or replacement soon. Use this if the agency has ever kept using a licensed asset in live client work past its rights window without realizing it.

jobs.name: Content Usage Rights Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks how long a brand or licensee is allowed to keep using content you sold/granted usage rights for (whitelisting, paid ads, resyndication) and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if a brand has ever kept running your face in their paid ads months after your usage-rights window actually ended.

jobs.name: USDA Report Release Reminder
jobs.description: Checks for upcoming USDA NASS/WASDE report releases (Crop Progress, Grain Stocks, WASDE, and similar) relevant to a tracked commodity within the next few days, so you know a market-moving report is about to drop. Use this if you've ever been caught off guard by a price swing right after a report you didn't know was coming.

jobs.name: Used Vehicle Inventory Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks used vehicle inventory against days-on-lot and flags anything past your reconditioning or pricing review threshold. Use this if a used car has ever sat on the lot for two months quietly losing value before anyone noticed it needed a price cut.

jobs.name: Utility Bill Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Compares each newly logged utility bill against your recent average for that utility and flags a reading that spikes well beyond normal. Use this if a bill has ever jumped because of a hidden leak or a device left running, and you only found out once the bill arrived.

jobs.name: Utility Bill-Back Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares submetered tenant utility charges against the property's master utility bill and flags a mismatch beyond a set tolerance. Use this if tenant bill-backs have ever quietly drifted from the actual master bill, either undercharging the owner or overcharging tenants.

jobs.name: Vacant Unit Marketing Listing Check
jobs.description: Compares currently vacant, rent-ready units against what's actually posted on the facility's online listing or marketing site, and flags units that are ready to rent but aren't listed yet. Use this if empty units have ever sat unrented longer than they should because someone forgot to add them to the website after they were cleaned and made ready.

jobs.name: Vaccine Fridge Cold-Chain Temperature Log Check
jobs.description: Scans today's logged vaccine refrigerator temperature readings and flags any reading outside the safe cold-chain range. Use this if a vaccine fridge has ever drifted out of range for hours unnoticed, putting an entire batch of vaccine inventory at risk of no longer being viable — distinct from medication-inventory-expiry-check.yaml, which tracks expiry dates rather than whether storage temperature was actually maintained.

jobs.name: Valet and Parking Incident Log Check
jobs.description: Scans the valet/parking incident log for entries still open past your target response window, and immediately flags any theft or injury report regardless of age. Use this if a scratched bumper or a missing car has ever sat in a notebook for days before anyone escalated it to the guest or insurance.

jobs.name: Validator Uptime & Slashing Risk Watch
jobs.description: Checks a staked validator's recent attestation/block performance and any slashing or penalty events via a public explorer, and flags degrading uptime before it costs real rewards or triggers a slash. Use this if you run or delegate to a validator and have ever found out about a missed- attestation streak or a slashing event only after checking weeks later.

jobs.name: Van Line Network Claim Reimbursement Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks damage claims you've filed with your van line network for reimbursement and flags any that have gone unpaid past a set number of days. Use this if a claim has ever been submitted to the van line for network reimbursement and then sat unresolved for months while your agency covered the customer payout out of pocket.

jobs.name: Van/Tool Inventory Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares a truck's expected tool and equipment list against the count from its last physical audit or scan, and flags any mismatches. Use this if a specialty tool or piece of diagnostic equipment has ever gone missing from a van for weeks before anyone noticed it wasn't there.

jobs.name: VAT/GST Filing Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks upcoming VAT/GST filing deadlines per jurisdiction and flags ones approaching or past due. Use this if the business files in more than one country or region and a VAT/GST return has ever been late because the deadlines weren't tracked in one place — distinct from tax-deadline-reminder.yaml and quarterly-estimated-tax-calculator.yaml, which cover domestic income-tax deadlines and estimates, not jurisdiction-by-jurisdiction indirect-tax filings.

jobs.name: Vegetation Management Clearance Check
jobs.description: Scans the vegetation-management tracking system for power line right-of-way segments where tree/brush clearance has fallen below the required distance or the last trim date is overdue for its cycle, and lists them ordered by how overdue they are. Use this if a utility has ever had an outage or wildfire ignition traced back to a tree limb nobody scheduled a trim crew for in time.

jobs.name: Vehicle Decommission & Disposal Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews vehicles marked for retirement and checks whether every decommission step — telematics and fuel card deactivation, plate surrender, final odometer capture, insurance removal, title transfer — actually got done before the vehicle left the fleet. Use this if a retired vehicle has ever kept racking up insurance premiums or fuel card charges for months because nobody formally took it off the books.

jobs.name: Vehicle Emissions/Smog Test Due Check
jobs.description: Checks fleet vehicles against their state emissions or smog test due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a vehicle has ever failed a registration renewal because its separate emissions certification quietly expired and nobody was tracking it apart from the registration itself.

jobs.name: Vehicle Extended Warranty/Service Contract Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's extended warranty or service contract against its expiry date (by calendar date or mileage) and warns before coverage runs out. Use this if a repair bill has ever come out of pocket that would have been covered, because nobody noticed the warranty had already lapsed by date or mileage.

jobs.name: Vehicle History Report Spend Check
jobs.description: Reviews vehicle history report (CarFax/AutoCheck-style) pulls from the past month and flags cost overruns against your monthly budget or a spike in reports pulled per vehicle appraised, so per-report fees don't quietly erode used-vehicle appraisal margin. Use this if the vehicle history report bill has ever come in high and nobody could say why.

jobs.name: Vehicle Idle Time Check
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's daily engine idle time against a threshold and flags the ones burning excess fuel sitting still. Use this if a telematics report has ever shown a surprise fuel bill and nobody could tell how much of it came from vehicles just left running. Excess idle can also mean a tech running personal errands or a truck sitting at the wrong job site too long, so this is useful for field-service fleets as well as general fleet operations.

jobs.name: Vehicle State/DOT Inspection Due Check
jobs.description: Checks fleet vehicles against their state or DOT inspection due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a vehicle has ever gotten pulled off a job by an inspector because its inspection sticker quietly expired — separate from routine maintenance or registration renewal. Also applies to dealership or repair-shop fleets: a lapsed inspection or emissions sticker on a shop or loaner vehicle can fail a customer handoff just as easily as it can fail a roadside stop.

jobs.name: Fleet Vehicle Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Flags fleet vehicles due for scheduled maintenance by date or mileage. Use this if a fleet vehicle has ever broken down on a job because its service interval quietly passed.

jobs.name: Finished Vehicle Pickup Reminder
jobs.description: Flags vehicles marked ready for pickup that the customer hasn't collected yet, so the lot doesn't fill up with finished cars nobody's chasing. Use this if a completed car has ever sat in the lot for a week because the "ready" call was made once and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Vehicle Pool Scheduling Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans upcoming pool vehicle reservations for double-bookings and flags overlaps before two employees show up for the same vehicle. Use this if a pool vehicle has ever been double-booked because reservations were tracked in a shared calendar or spreadsheet with no overlap check.

jobs.name: Fleet Vehicle Registration Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a fleet vehicle's registration expires. Use this if a vehicle has ever gotten pulled over, or failed a job site check-in, because its registration quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Personal Vehicle Registration Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you of an upcoming registration renewal deadline for your personal car so plates and tags don't lapse. Use this if you've ever gotten a late fee, or worse a ticket, because the registration sticker expired before you got around to renewing it.

jobs.name: Vehicle Storage Title Documentation Check
jobs.description: Checks units rented for RV, boat, or vehicle storage against the registration and title/proof-of-ownership documents on file, and flags units missing required paperwork or with documents that have expired. Use this if your facility rents outdoor or covered vehicle/RV/boat spaces and needs to keep ownership and registration documentation current for liability and lien-law reasons.

jobs.name: Vehicle Total Cost of Ownership Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews each vehicle's running cost per mile (fuel, maintenance, insurance, depreciation) against a threshold and flags vehicles that have quietly become more expensive to keep than to replace. Use this if an aging vehicle has ever stayed on the road years past the point it made financial sense.

jobs.name: Vehicle Title & Lien Document Tracker
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's title and lien paperwork status and flags loans that were paid off without the lien release being recorded, or titles that were never filed after purchase. Use this if a vehicle has ever been ready to sell or trade in but got stuck for weeks because nobody could locate a clean title or lien release letter.

jobs.name: Vehicle Utilization Rate Check
jobs.description: Flags fleet vehicles running well below or above a target utilization rate (miles or days driven per period). Use this if a vehicle has ever sat mostly idle in a lot racking up lease and insurance costs while another vehicle got run into the ground.

jobs.name: Vendor Certificate of Insurance Expiration Check
jobs.description: Checks the certificates of insurance on file for freelancers, production vendors, and subcontractors doing on-site or client-facing work, and flags anyone whose coverage is expiring soon or missing entirely. Use this if a freelance photographer or production crew has ever shown up to a client shoot on a certificate of insurance that had already quietly lapsed, leaving the agency exposed if something went wrong. Distinct from subcontractor-nda-compliance-check, which tracks signed NDAs and vendor agreements, not liability insurance coverage.

jobs.name: Vendor Certificate of Insurance Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Checks certificates of insurance you've collected from vendors and contractors and warns before any expire, so a lapsed COI doesn't sit unnoticed in the file. Use this if a vendor's insurance has ever lapsed mid-contract and nobody found out until a claim needed it.

jobs.name: Vendor and Contractor Certificate of Insurance Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags maintenance vendors and contractors whose certificate of insurance (COI) on file has expired or is about to expire, so nobody gets dispatched to a job site without valid coverage. Use this if a contractor has ever kept working on your properties after their liability policy lapsed because nobody was tracking COI dates.

jobs.name: Vendor Early-Pay Discount Tracker
jobs.description: Flags vendor invoices with an early-payment discount (like "2/10 net 30") whose discount window is about to close. Use this if you've ever paid a bill on the regular due date and only afterward realized you could've saved a couple percent by paying ten days earlier.

jobs.name: Vendor/Subcontractor Invoice Approval Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks vendor and subcontractor invoices sitting in an "awaiting approval" queue and flags any that have been waiting longer than the target turnaround, regardless of whether they're due yet. Use this if a vendor invoice has ever sat unreviewed in someone's inbox for weeks, not because it wasn't due, but because nobody was watching the approval queue itself. Distinct from freelancer-contractor-payment-reminder, which tracks invoices already approved and counting down to their due date.

jobs.name: Event Vendor Payment Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a vendor deposit or balance payment for an event is due. Use this if a vendor has ever threatened to cancel because a payment deadline slipped past unnoticed.

jobs.name: Vendor Payment Terms Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares actual days-to-pay per vendor invoice against that vendor's contracted payment terms and flags vendors being paid consistently earlier or later than agreed. Use this if payment timing has ever drifted away from negotiated terms without anyone noticing the pattern — distinct from vendor-early-pay-discount-tracker.yaml, which flags a specific missed early-pay discount opportunity, not a general terms-drift trend across all payments to a vendor.

jobs.name: Vendor Security Review Recertification Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since each third-party vendor's security review was last completed and flags any past your recertification window. Use this if a vendor's SOC 2 report or security questionnaire has ever sat unreviewed for years after the initial onboarding check because nobody was tracking the review date.

jobs.name: Vendor W-9 Missing Check
jobs.description: Checks vendors paid over the reportable threshold so far this year for a W-9 (or equivalent tax form) on file, and flags any that are missing one. Use this if you've ever scrambled in January to chase down tax forms for 1099 filing because nobody confirmed the paperwork was collected when the vendor first crossed the payment threshold.

jobs.name: Venue Capacity / Fire-Code Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares confirmed attendee count against the venue's legal occupancy limit and flags it before you're over. Use this if you've ever added "just a few more" invitees without checking whether the room's fire-code capacity could actually hold them.

jobs.name: Venue & Location Shoot Permit Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags location shoot permits (parks, museums, private venues, city film/photo permits) that are expiring soon or that a booked shoot doesn't yet have a permit for at all. Use this if you've ever shown up to shoot at a park or venue only to find your permit had lapsed, or realized too late that a location required one you never applied for.

jobs.name: Veterinary Staff CE Credit Tracking
jobs.description: Reviews each veterinarian and licensed vet tech's continuing education (CE) credit hours against what their state board requires by license renewal, and flags anyone on track to fall short. Use this if a provider has ever discovered close to renewal that they were short on RACE-approved CE hours needed to keep their license active — distinct from dvm-license-dea-registration-expiry-check.yaml, which tracks the license's own expiry date rather than the ongoing education requirement to renew it.

jobs.name: Video Ad Completion Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks the view-through and completion rate of running video ads against a baseline and flags a meaningful drop. Use this if a video ad has ever quietly stopped holding attention (creative fatigue or a targeting problem) while spend kept flowing because nobody was watching completion rate specifically, as opposed to general clicks.

jobs.name: Video Transcript Missing Check
jobs.description: Scans pages containing embedded video for a linked transcript or a captions/subtitles track, and flags videos where neither is found. Use this if you publish video content and want to catch accessibility gaps and missed opportunities for search engines to index the video's spoken content as text.

jobs.name: VIP Ticket Priority Check
jobs.description: Checks that open tickets from your VIP or high-value customer segment are actually flagged priority and within their tighter response window. Use this if a top-tier account has ever waited in the same queue as everyone else because the VIP tag didn't make it into the ticket.

jobs.name: VIP Tier Reclassification Check
jobs.description: Checks each customer's year-to-date spend against your VIP tier thresholds and flags anyone due to move up or down a tier, drafting a short outreach note for new upgrades. Use this if a top customer has ever crossed your VIP spend threshold months ago and never got the perks (or the acknowledgment) because nobody was tracking tier crossings.

jobs.name: Viral K-Factor Trend Watch
jobs.description: Computes the viral coefficient (invites sent per user times the conversion rate of those invites) for the current period and compares it against the prior period. Use this if a referral or invite loop was built to be "viral" and nobody's tracked since launch whether it's actually compounding growth or just producing a trickle of invites.

jobs.name: Virtual Office Mail Forwarding SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks scanned or physical mail items logged for virtual office members that haven't been forwarded or scanned within your promised turnaround time. Use this if a virtual office member has ever complained about a forwarded check or letter showing up late, or not at all.

jobs.name: Visa/Residency Document Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a visa, residency permit, or similar document expires. Use this if you're living or working abroad and a document deadline has ever crept up on you.

jobs.name: Visual Merchandising Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews store-front and window display photos against the current visual merchandising directive and flags stores that haven't executed it. Use this if a seasonal window or entrance display has ever stayed up stale for weeks after corporate sent the new directive.

jobs.name: Vendor-Managed Inventory Stockout Risk Check
jobs.description: Compares current vendor-managed inventory (VMI) bin levels against min/max replenishment thresholds and flags bins at risk of stocking out before the vendor's next scheduled restock. Use this if a VMI-supplied bin has ever run dry on the line because the vendor's restock cadence didn't keep up with actual consumption.

jobs.name: VoIP Call Quality (MOS Score) Degradation Check
jobs.description: Checks recent VoIP call quality samples (MOS scores) per trunk or route and flags any averaging below an acceptable threshold. Use this if customers have ever complained about choppy or garbled calls on a route for days before anyone noticed the MOS scores had quietly dropped.

jobs.name: Volunteer Background Check Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks volunteer background-check/clearance expiration dates and flags anyone whose clearance is about to lapse before their next scheduled shift. Use this if a volunteer has ever worked a shift with clients or minors on an expired background check because renewal dates weren't tracked centrally.

jobs.name: Volunteer Hours Shortfall Check
jobs.description: Compares logged volunteer hours against a program's target and flags a shortfall. Use this if a program has ever fallen behind on a grant's volunteer-hour commitment without anyone noticing until the report was due.

jobs.name: Volunteer/Staff Shift Confirmation Reminder
jobs.description: Flags individually assigned event shifts that a staffer or volunteer hasn't confirmed yet, as their shift date gets close. Use this if a shift has ever gone unstaffed on the day because the person assigned to it never actually confirmed they'd show up, and nobody checked until they didn't.

jobs.name: VPN Access Recertification Check
jobs.description: Compares every active VPN access grant against the date it was last reviewed or recertified, then flags any grant that has gone past the periodic review window. Use this if you want to make sure someone regularly double-checks who still needs VPN access, instead of grants silently living on forever once approved.

jobs.name: WAF Rule Change Watch
jobs.description: Diffs your current WAF rules against a saved baseline and flags drift. Use this if a WAF rule has ever been loosened "just for testing" and never put back.

jobs.name: Waiting Room Time Check
jobs.description: Compares each day's logged check-in-to-roomed times against a target wait time and flags days or providers running consistently long. Use this if patient wait times have ever crept up gradually — a schedule template that's too tight, a provider consistently running behind — without anyone noticing until it started showing up as complaints.

jobs.name: Waitlist-to-Seated Conversion Check
jobs.description: Analyzes waitlist app data to see what share of people who joined the waitlist actually got seated versus walked away, and whether quoted wait times matched reality. Use this if you suspect an overly optimistic quoted wait time is quietly driving guests to leave before their table is ready.

jobs.name: Waitlist-to-Confirmed Conversion Outreach
jobs.description: Drafts outreach to people on an event waitlist when spots open up from cancellations, so seats don't sit empty while people who wanted in never find out. Use this if an event has ever had a waitlist and empty seats at the same time because nobody got around to reaching out.

jobs.name: Waitlist Unit Availability Match Check
jobs.description: Compares the self-storage facility's unit waitlist against units that were just vacated, and flags any waitlisted prospect whose requested size or type now has a match. Use this if prospects who asked to be notified about a specific unit size sometimes miss out because staff advertised the unit publicly before checking the waitlist first.

jobs.name: Wake-up Call Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks today's logged wake-up call requests and flags any that are past their requested time without being marked completed. Use this if a guest has ever missed a flight because a wake-up call was logged at the front desk but never actually placed.

jobs.name: Walk-In Cooler Temperature Log Check
jobs.description: Scans today's logged cooler/freezer temperature readings and flags any that fall outside the safe range. Use this if an out-of-range reading has ever sat unnoticed in a paper log until a health inspector found it.

jobs.name: Dog Walker / Pet Sitter Route Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans today's dog-walking or pet-sitting visit schedule for any walker or sitter booked onto two visits that overlap, or booked back-to-back with too little travel time between addresses. Use this if a walker has ever shown up late (or had to rush a visit) because the schedule quietly double-booked them or left no buffer between two stops.

jobs.name: Wallet Balance Watch
jobs.description: Checks a public wallet address's balance and alerts if it drops below a threshold, without needing any private key or exchange API access. Use this if you've ever wanted a heads-up when a hot wallet's gas/funding balance ran low.

jobs.name: Warehouse Cold Storage Temperature Excursion Alert
jobs.description: Checks cold storage / freezer zone temperature sensor readings against the required range and flags any excursion long enough to put stored product at risk. Use this if a cold-chain product has ever been quietly compromised because a freezer drifted out of range overnight and nobody was paged until the next morning walk-through.

jobs.name: Warehouse Damage Write-Off Review
jobs.description: Reviews inventory damaged inside the facility during handling (dropped in putaway, forklift contact, racking collapse) and flags cases pending a write-off decision, along with any recurring cause worth fixing. Use this if damaged inventory has ever sat on a "to be reviewed" pallet for weeks because nobody owned the write-off decision.

jobs.name: Warehouse Fire Suppression Inspection Due Check
jobs.description: Checks sprinkler, fire pump, and fire suppression inspection records against the required inspection interval and flags any system overdue. Use this if a fire-suppression inspection has ever lapsed quietly because it was buried in a facilities spreadsheet nobody reviewed.

jobs.name: Warehouse Near-Miss & Incident Rate Watch
jobs.description: Reviews the safety incident log for a trend in near-misses and minor injuries on the warehouse floor against a rolling benchmark, and looks for a common thread (location, shift, equipment) before it becomes a serious injury. Use this if near-misses have ever piled up in the log unread until a lost-time injury made someone finally go looking for a pattern that was there the whole time.

jobs.name: Warehouse Space Utilization Check
jobs.description: Reviews storage location occupancy against total capacity by zone and flags zones running near overflow or sitting oddly empty. Use this if a zone has ever hit effective capacity without warning, forcing overflow pallets into aisles because nobody was watching utilization trend toward full.

jobs.name: Warehouse Storage Capacity Check
jobs.description: Checks the moving company's warehouse or storage-in-transit facility utilization against its total capacity and flags any facility approaching full. Use this if you've ever accepted a new storage booking only to find out at drop-off that the warehouse had no room left for it.

jobs.name: Warehouse Transfer Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags inter-location stock transfers that shipped but haven't been marked received after a set number of days, a sign a shipment is stuck, lost, or just never logged in. Use this if a transfer has ever quietly vanished between two locations because nobody was tracking how long it had been in transit.

jobs.name: Warranty Claim Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks open warranty claims against the manufacturer's submission deadline and flags any about to expire unfiled. Use this if a claim has ever gone unpaid because it was submitted a day past the manufacturer's filing window.

jobs.name: Warranty Claim Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks open equipment warranty claims (HVAC units, water heaters, appliances) against the manufacturer's filing deadline and flags any about to lapse unfiled. Use this if a claim has ever been denied because it was submitted a day after the manufacturer's window closed.

jobs.name: Warranty Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before an appliance or product warranty expires. Use this if you've ever discovered a warranty lapsed the week before whatever it covered broke.

jobs.name: Wash Sale 30-Day Window Check
jobs.description: Checks whether a planned or recent purchase falls within 30 days before or after selling the same or a substantially identical security at a loss, which would trigger the wash sale rule and disallow the loss. Use this if you've ever sold a position at a loss for tax purposes and then bought it back too soon without realizing it undid the tax benefit.

jobs.name: Washing Machine & Dishwasher Hose Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to inspect washing machine and dishwasher supply hoses for bulging, cracking, or corrosion based on how long it's been since the last check. Use this if you've ever heard about a burst supply hose flooding someone's house while they were away and realized you'd never actually looked at yours.

jobs.name: Watchlist Price Target Alert
jobs.description: Checks a stock on your watchlist against a price target and alerts when it crosses the level you set. Use this if you're waiting for a stock to hit a buy or sell price and don't want to keep checking it manually.

jobs.name: Water Filter Replacement Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to swap your fridge or whole-house water filter cartridge based on how long it's been since the last change. Use this if you've ever kept drinking through a filter for a year past its rated life because there's no dashboard light to tell you otherwise.

jobs.name: Water Heater Anode Rod Replacement Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to inspect and replace the water heater's sacrificial anode rod based on how long it's been since the last replacement. Use this if you've ever had a water heater fail years earlier than its rated life because the anode rod was never checked and the tank itself started corroding instead.

jobs.name: Water Heater Flush Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to flush sediment out of your water heater tank based on how long it's been since the last flush. Use this if you've ever noticed banging noises or slower hot water because sediment had been building up for years.

jobs.name: Water Intake Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to drink water a few times a day toward a daily goal. Use this if you sit at a desk all day and forget to drink water until you've got a headache.

jobs.name: Water Main Break Repair Aging Check
jobs.description: Lists open water main break repair orders that have stayed unresolved longer than the target repair window, ordered by how long they've been open. Use this if a main break has ever stayed under a barricade for days longer than it should have because the repair crew's backlog wasn't visible to anyone outside the field office.

jobs.name: Water Quality Sample Due Reminder
jobs.description: Checks the regulatory sampling schedule for required water-quality tests (such as bacteriological or lead & copper sampling) and reminds compliance staff which sampling events are coming due soon. Use this if a water utility has ever missed a required sampling window and had to explain the gap to a regulator.

jobs.name: Water Rights / Well Permit Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a list of water rights and well permits against their expiration dates and warns before any lapse, so your irrigation isn't running on an expired permit. Use this if you've ever discovered a permit had lapsed only when an inspector or neighbor pointed it out.

jobs.name: Water Softener Salt Check Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to check and refill your water softener's salt level based on how long it's been since the last check. Use this if you've ever let the brine tank run dry and ended up with hard water again without noticing for weeks.

jobs.name: Watermark & Copyright Infringement Scan Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews a list of your portfolio images against reported or suspected unauthorized reuse (social posts, blogs, print shops) and drafts a polite licensing-or-takedown message for each confirmed hit. Use this if you've ever found one of your wedding or commercial photos on someone else's website with the watermark cropped out and had no idea how to follow up.

jobs.name: Waterway Buffer Chemical Application Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks your chemical application log for entries where the logged distance from a waterway is inside the required buffer zone and flags the violation. Use this if a fertilizer or pesticide application has ever been made too close to a stream, pond, or storm drain and only been caught after a regulatory complaint.

jobs.name: Wave/Batch Picking Efficiency Check
jobs.description: Checks completed picking waves against a target completion time and flags waves that ran long. Use this if a wave has ever spilled past its window and pushed the whole outbound schedule back before anyone noticed the wave itself, not the individual pickers, was the problem.

jobs.name: Weather Delay Impact Log
jobs.description: Reviews logged weather delay days against the project's schedule float and flags when accumulated weather delays threaten a milestone, plus checks whether the delay documentation is complete enough to support a time-extension claim later. Use this if a weather delay claim has ever been rejected because the daily documentation didn't clearly tie the weather to lost work.

jobs.name: Weather-Delay Rescheduling Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's forecast against your rain/wind thresholds and, if the route would need to be delayed, lists which scheduled stops need to be pushed to the next available day. Use this if a crew has ever headed out into a downpour because nobody checked the forecast before route assignments went out.

jobs.name: Frost/Freeze Risk Alert
jobs.description: Checks the forecast for your fields and warns if frost or freeze temperatures are coming, so you have time to cover crops or run frost-protection irrigation. Use this if a surprise cold snap has ever cost you a harvest.

jobs.name: Webhook Delivery Failure Check
jobs.description: Checks recent outgoing webhook delivery logs for a spike in failed deliveries and flags it so someone can investigate whether the problem is on your side or the receiving endpoint's side. Use this if downstream integrations depend on your webhooks arriving and silent delivery failures have ever gone unnoticed for days.

jobs.name: Webinar Attendance Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a list of webinars/workshops you've registered for and flags any happening soon so you can block the time and prep. Use this if you've ever signed up for a webinar and completely forgotten about it by the time it started.

jobs.name: Webinar Registration/Attendance Check
jobs.description: Checks a webinar's registration count and show-up (attendance) rate against targets, with enough lead time to boost promotion or send reminders. Use this if a webinar has ever gone live to a nearly empty room because registration numbers looked fine on paper but nobody checked the actual show-up rate trend.

jobs.name: Wedding Timeline Confirmation Check
jobs.description: Flags upcoming weddings that still don't have a confirmed shot-list timeline on file within your lead-time window. Use this if you've ever arrived at a wedding not knowing when the first look, ceremony, and toasts actually start because the couple never sent back a finalized timeline.

jobs.name: Weekly Creator Analytics Digest
jobs.description: Pulls the week's key numbers (views, subscribers/followers gained, top and bottom performing posts, revenue if available) across your platforms into one short summary. Use this if you've ever opened five different analytics dashboards on a Monday just to piece together how last week actually went.

jobs.name: Weekly Priorities Planning Reminder
jobs.description: Sends a Monday-morning reminder to set the week's top 3 priorities before the week gets away from you. Use this if you've noticed weeks slipping by reactively, with no clear sense of what actually mattered most until Friday.

jobs.name: Weekly Progress Report
jobs.description: Rolls up a week's worth of commits and progress into a short report you can hand to your team. Use this if you dread writing the Friday status update from scratch every week.

jobs.name: Welcome Email Drip Check
jobs.description: Checks that everyone who signed up recently actually received the welcome email, and flags anyone who fell through the cracks. Use this if a welcome-email automation has ever silently failed for a batch of new users and nobody noticed until support tickets started asking "where's my onboarding email?"

jobs.name: Well Water Test Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to send a well water sample out for bacterial and contaminant testing based on how long it's been since the last test. Use this if you're on a private well and have ever gone years between tests because municipal water drinkers don't have this chore to remind you of it. Works for a single household well; if you're tracking several sources (e.g. a farm/ranch well plus separate livestock or irrigation sources), keep one of these per source, or adapt the command to read a CSV of source/last-tested/interval rows.

jobs.name: Whale Transaction Watch
jobs.description: Checks a tracked wallet address for outgoing or incoming transactions above a size threshold since the last check, and summarizes them. Use this if you follow a "whale" wallet, project treasury, or exchange hot wallet and want a heads-up when it moves a large amount instead of refreshing a block explorer all day.

jobs.name: Wheel Alignment Machine Calibration Due Check
jobs.description: Checks each alignment machine's last calibration date against the manufacturer-recommended interval and flags any machine that's due, so alignment jobs (and ADAS calibrations that depend on a true reference) aren't run on a drifted rack. Use this if an alignment machine has ever gone a year or more without anyone checking when it was last calibrated.

jobs.name: Whistleblower Hotline Report Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open whistleblower or ethics hotline reports for ones nearing their internal investigation follow-up deadline and drafts a status summary for compliance, so a report doesn't stall without a documented next step. Use this if an ethics hotline report has ever sat open for weeks without any visible follow-up because tracking lived only in someone's inbox.

jobs.name: Wifi Bandwidth Utilization Alert
jobs.description: Checks how much of your network's total bandwidth capacity is being used during peak hours and flags when usage is trending toward saturation. Use this if members have ever started complaining about slow wifi before anyone on staff noticed the network was creeping toward its limit.

jobs.name: Will-Call Bin Aging Check
jobs.description: Scans filled prescriptions still sitting in the will-call bin and flags any that have gone unpicked-up past your store's return-to-stock window. Use this if the will-call bin has ever quietly filled up with old prescriptions that should have been returned to stock weeks ago.

jobs.name: Win-Loss Interview Backlog Tracker
jobs.description: Flags recently closed-won and closed-lost deals above a minimum size that haven't had a win-loss interview scheduled or completed yet. Use this if your win-loss program has ever quietly stopped happening because reps were busy and nobody was tracking which deals still needed a call.

jobs.name: Win-Back Reactivation Campaign Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks how canceled customers targeted by a win-back campaign are responding, and can draft the next outreach touch for non-responders. Use this if a win-back campaign has ever gone out once and then nobody followed up with the customers who didn't respond.

jobs.name: Work-in-Progress Limit Violation Check
jobs.description: Counts how many tasks are sitting in "in progress" on your task tracker and flags it when the count exceeds a sane single-tasking limit. Use this if you keep starting new work before finishing what's already open, and your "in progress" column has quietly become a second backlog.

jobs.name: Wire Transfer Dual Approval Check
jobs.description: Flags outbound wire transfers above a configurable amount that don't have a recorded second approver on file, catching a gap in your dual-control requirement. Use this if wires have ever gone out with only one person's sign-off when policy requires two — this is bank-internal ops, distinct from the `finance` category's personal/business bookkeeping jobs.

jobs.name: Wishlist Abandonment Check
jobs.description: Checks customer wishlists for items that have sat untouched for a while and drafts a nudge email when there's a real reason to reach out — a price drop or the item is back in stock — instead of a generic "you still want this?" reminder. Use this if you've ever had a wishlist feature that quietly collects intent and never converts any of it back into a sale.

jobs.name: WMS Integration Error Queue Check
jobs.description: Scans the warehouse management system's integration error queue (failed order imports, ASN mismatches, inventory sync failures) and flags anything sitting unresolved past a target age. Use this if a failed inbound order sync has ever sat quietly in an error queue for days while the warehouse floor had no idea the order even existed.

jobs.name: WordPress Plugin & Theme Update Check
jobs.description: Compares the plugin versions listed in your local manifest against the latest versions published on the WordPress.org plugin directory. Use this if an outdated plugin has ever been the reason your site broke or got flagged for a security issue.

jobs.name: Work Authorization Re-Verification Deadline Check
jobs.description: Scans worker work-authorization expiration dates (e.g. visa or employment-authorization document expiry) and flags anyone whose document needs re-verification within the coming window, so the agency never lets someone's authorization to work lapse mid-assignment. Use this if a worker's authorization has ever expired before HR caught it, forcing an emergency pull from a client site.

jobs.name: Work Order Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts open production work orders that have sat unstarted or unfinished past their planned completion date. Use this if a work order has ever quietly aged for weeks in the queue while everyone assumed someone else had picked it up.

jobs.name: Worker Safety Training Expiry Check Per Assignment Type
jobs.description: Checks each active temp worker's required safety training (forklift, OSHA 10, site-specific inductions, etc.) against what their current assignment type requires and flags anyone whose certification has expired or is about to. Use this if a worker has ever been sent to a warehouse or industrial site with an expired safety certification and it only surfaced during a client audit.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Audit Premium True-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks policyholders due for their annual workers' compensation payroll audit and flags any whose actual-payroll true-up hasn't been completed or invoiced within the target window after the policy period ends. Use this if an audit premium true-up has ever gone unbilled for so long that the additional premium became hard to collect or the policyholder forgot why they suddenly owed money.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Certificate Expiry Check Per Client Site
jobs.description: Checks the agency's workers' compensation certificate of insurance on file for each client site and flags any expiring soon or already lapsed. Use this if a client has ever demanded a current COI on short notice and the agency scrambled to find out whether theirs had lapsed.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Claim Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews open workers' compensation claims and flags any that haven't had a status update or adjuster contact within a set number of days, so an injured employee's claim doesn't stall in silence. Use this if a workers' comp claim has ever gone weeks without anyone checking in on it because the incident report was filed and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Claim Status Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Reviews open workers' compensation claims for injured temp workers and drafts a status-check follow-up for any claim that hasn't been updated recently. Use this if an open workers' comp claim has ever sat untouched for weeks because nobody was assigned to keep checking on it.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Claim Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Checks your workers' compensation claims log for open claims that haven't had a follow-up logged within your check-in interval and flags them. Use this if an injured crew member's claim has ever gone quiet for weeks because nobody was tracking whose turn it was to check in with the adjuster or the employee.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Checks open workers' compensation claims with the carrier and flags ones that have gone quiet or are approaching an expected return-to-work date with no update. Use this if an injured employee's claim has ever stalled with the carrier for weeks with nobody at the company noticing or following up.

jobs.name: Billing Write-Off Approval Threshold Audit
jobs.description: Checks logged billing write-offs against an approval-required dollar threshold and flags any write-off above that threshold with no recorded approval. Use this if a large balance has ever been quietly written off without a manager sign-off, and nobody caught it until the books didn't reconcile.

jobs.name: Yard Trailer Detention Watch
jobs.description: Checks trailers currently parked in the facility's own yard against their free-time window and flags any at risk of detention charges. Use this if a trailer has ever sat in the yard so long that a detention invoice showed up before anyone realized it was still parked out there.

jobs.name: Yield Farming APY Comparison
jobs.description: Checks current APY across a shortlist of DeFi pools/vaults for a given asset and reports which one is currently paying best, so you're not leaving yield on the table in a pool that quietly dropped its rate. Use this if you've ever parked funds in a farm and never checked whether a better rate showed up elsewhere.

jobs.name: YouTube Clip Repurposing Draft
jobs.description: Checks for a newly published long-form video and drafts a shortlist of moments worth cutting into shorts/clips for other platforms. Use this if a video has ever gone up and just sat there as one long upload instead of becoming five pieces of content.
